rubrics_scientific.d1: Accuracy of airway microanatomy and scale relationships: clear hierarchical representation of oral cavity–pharynx–trachea–bronchus–terminal bronchiole–alveolar structures; structural proportions and diameter scales are appropriate; mucosal and mucus layer texture and thickness conform to physiological ranges; particle size distribution of the drug matches the scales of the aforementioned anatomical structures.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Scientific accuracy of aerosol transport and deposition mechanisms: The jet plume and the inhalation-induced flow field are consistent; the relative contributions of particle inertial impaction, gravitational settling, and Brownian diffusion vary reasonably with particle size and airflow conditions; wetting spread, adhesion, and resuspension behaviors along moist surfaces conform to fluid and particle dynamics principles.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Multiscale presentation of molecular-level interactions is consistent: the wetting, dissolution, surface tension, and viscoelastic effects of saliva/mucus with particles are coordinated across nano- to microscale spatial and temporal sequences; the amplitude and frequency of molecular thermal motion are appropriate and neither confused with nor exaggerated relative to tissue-level imagery.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Correct drug delivery and absorption mechanisms: rational dissolution and diffusion of particles in mucus, plausible pathways and relative timing for trans-epithelial transport into capillaries, with appropriate representation of alveolar absorption predominance and the influence of surfactant environment.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Consistency between device and physiological parameters: The particle size distribution, nozzle initial velocity, inhalation flow rate, and actuation-inhalation timing settings of the metered-dose inhaler correspond with the deposition distribution results; the hygroscopic growth and morphological change trends of particles induced by the high-humidity airway environment are appropriate.

rubrics_visual.d1: High image clarity with detailed and precise representation of microtextures and fine structural features.
rubrics_visual.d2: High accuracy in 3D modeling, with realistic materials and surface textures that accurately represent microscopic moisture and adhesiveness characteristics.
rubrics_visual.d3: The motion and interactions of particles with fluids/surfaces are coherent and smooth, exhibiting a natural rhythm consistent with the visual principles of microscopic diffusion and interactions.
rubrics_visual.d4: Lighting effects, volumetric scattering, and depth of field control are natural and well-defined, with clear layering and delicate transitions between highlights and shadows.
rubrics_visual.d5: Color reproduction and contrast are naturally balanced, with high recognizability of key elements, avoiding color casts and oversaturation.

rubrics_instruction.d1: The evaluation fully presents the core journey of the metered-dose inhaler's spray nozzle entering the oral cavity and progressing into the narrow airways, maintaining a microscopic perspective throughout, with clear depiction of the pathways and stages.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Highlight the dynamic process of particles spreading along the moist and textured mucosal surface, accurately demonstrating the interactions between particles and saliva molecules, as well as the diversity in particle shape and size.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Scientific restoration of the human airway microstructure and texture, including the bronchi and alveolar sacs, elastic tissues, capillary networks, as well as the visual details of the mucus inner layer gloss and cellular landscape.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Present particle movement, sedimentation distribution, and absorption mechanisms with scientific consistency; ensure that motion trajectories and interactions conform to biophysical principles, avoiding unreasonable exaggerations or misleading phenomena.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Adherence to technical and presentation specifications in the task: including close-up shots and shot continuity at the micro level, pacing and duration requirements, visual clarity suitable for professional educational purposes, and explicitly emphasizing the role of correct inhaler usage in drug delivery efficacy.

任务: Under the microscope, a surgeon uses surgical instruments to make precise incisions on the finely layered nasal mucosa, gently lifting the mucosa to expose the elastic and clearly textured nasal septal cartilage. The background is simple, the motion natural, highlighting the meticulous surgical procedure and the microscopic details of the tissue structure.
具体要求: Create a breathtaking microscopic world video vividly depicting the complexity of the nasal septum, with a focus on its anatomical structure and the surgical intervention process of septoplasty. The central subject in the microscopic scene is the nasal septum, presented with extreme precision, composed of anterior soft, flexible cartilage and posterior bone, all covered by delicate nasal mucosal tissue. In this instructive scene, convey the detailed surgical procedure for correcting a deviated nasal septum, emphasizing the moment the surgeon makes an incision on the mucosa, skillfully lifts it to expose the septum, and performs precise cuts on the cartilage to relax it, effectively resolving septal deviation. Highlight the surgeon's expert manipulation of surgical instruments, demonstrating how they work to remove the deviated portion of the septum while preserving sufficient cartilage to maintain structural support. Capture the detailed textures visible during surgery, from the complex layering of the mucosa to the glinting surgical tools, as well as the tactile and elastic properties of the cartilage being shaped to restore normal airflow. Showcase the delicate process of suturing the incision and placing splints to maintain septal alignment during recovery, presenting this captivating medical procedure with vivid clarity and depth to engage viewers and provide educational insights into septoplasty, nasal septal deviation, and respiratory function within the realm of medical animation.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accurate anatomical representation of the nasal septum and its adjacent tissues: the anterior cartilaginous part, the posterior bony components, and the coverage and layering relationships of the bilateral nasal mucosa, with thickness and morphological proportions consistent with anatomical standards.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Correctness of Surgical Intervention Steps and Principles: The mucosal incision is made at a scientifically appropriate position and direction; dissection is performed in the submucosal–perichondrial/periosteal plane to expose the septum; relaxation incisions or limited resection/remodeling are conducted at the deviated segments while preserving sufficient structural support (such as the L-strut).
rubrics_scientific.d3: Scale and spatial relationships are appropriate: at microscopic magnification, the tissue scale, instrument dimensions, incision depth, and exposure range are coordinated, with the relative thickness of cartilage and mucosa and the interlayer distances corresponding to actual anatomical conditions.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Organizational biomechanics and physiological response demonstrate scientific validity: cartilage elastic recoil, mucosal moisture and blood supply, tissue deformation caused by cutting and traction, hemorrhage and hemostatic response, and suture edge tension and apposition conforming to physiological and physical principles.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Accuracy of postoperative reconstruction and fixation: clear realignment and reduction of the septum, continuous mucosal suturing to prevent perforation and dead space, appropriate placement and stabilization effect of the nasal splint.

rubrics_visual.d1: High image clarity with discernible microscopic details; clear tissue stratification, sharp textures and boundaries without excessive sharpening.
rubrics_visual.d2: The 3D modeling and texturing are realistic, with clear separation of tissue layers and accurate differentiation of the textures of soft tissue, cartilage, and bone.
rubrics_visual.d3: Lighting and microscopic depth of field are controlled naturally; highlights, subsurface scattering, and shadow transitions correspond appropriately to scale; volumetric presence and layering are prominently emphasized.
rubrics_visual.d4: Animation smoothness and instrument–tissue interaction naturalness: motion trajectories are smooth, deformation and rebound are coherent, with no frame skipping or interpenetration.
rubrics_visual.d5: Color and contrast accurately reproduce reality; white balance is precise; saturation is appropriately controlled; highlights and shadows retain sufficient detail.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Comprehensively demonstrate the core procedures of microscopic septoplasty, encompassing mucosal incision, elevation and exposure of the septum, cartilage reshaping to correct deviations, closure, and fixation, with a clean background and natural dynamic presentation.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Accurately reconstruct the anatomical structure and tissue layers of the nasal septum, clearly delineating the anterior cartilaginous and posterior bony components, the stratification and detailed texture covered by the nasal mucosa, as well as the elasticity and deformation characteristics of the cartilage.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Using a microscopic perspective with stable focus centered on the nasal septum, highlighting the professional manipulation of surgical instruments and critical maneuvers, ensuring image clarity and accurate representation of microscopic details.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Meets technical specifications and performance quality requirements; camera is stable with appropriate focus and lighting; duration and pacing support stepwise presentation of key processes; audiovisual elements do not interfere with core content.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Clearly convey the medical and popular science intentions, explain the purpose of correcting deviation, the principle of preserving structural support, and the outcome of restoring airflow, with information organized in a clear and logical manner.

任务: From a microscopic perspective, depict the release of drug particles at the connection between the metered-dose inhaler (MDI) and the spacer. The particles enter the airway through the smooth mouthpiece of the spacer. Dynamically illustrate the detailed interactions between the drug particles and the respiratory epithelial cells, highlighting the particle trajectories and the microscopic structure of the airway. The environment is kept minimalistic, emphasizing the microprocesses of drug delivery and the structural details of the spacer.
具体要求: Create a stunning microscopic world video demonstrating the complex process of effectively delivering medication to the airways of patients with asthma or chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) using a metered-dose inhaler (MDI) and a spacer. The scene captures the moment the inhaler is activated, releasing drug particles that pass through the spacer into the oral cavity. Emphasize the critical connection between the inhaler and the spacer to ensure the medication reaches the airway rather than remaining in the mouth. As the drug particles move, the video should reveal detailed and engaging interactions between the particles and the respiratory epithelial cells, showcasing the delicate textures and structures involved in inhalation, such as the tight seal formed by the lips and teeth around the mouthpiece, the gentle yet steady inhalation, and the subsequent expansion and contraction of the pulmonary airways. Special attention should be given to the complexity of the spacer design, highlighting its grooves and the smooth surface of the mouthpiece, as well as the intricate lattice system of the medication container’s valve mechanism. The video should outline the dispersion of the aerosolized drug, its navigation through the respiratory system, and how breath control optimizes the precision of drug absorption, emphasizing the microscopic complexity of human physiology and medical technology.

rubrics_scientific.d1: The particle size distribution, morphology, and velocity evolution of the drug aerosol comply with aerosol dynamics, exhibiting a reasonable pattern of deposition in the upper airway through inertial impaction, sedimentation, and diffusion after deceleration and deagglomeration in the holding chamber.
rubrics_scientific.d2: The hierarchical and scale relationships of the airway and oral cavity microstructures are accurately represented, including the epithelium–mucus–cilia layers, bifurcations, and caliber levels, and appropriately proportioned relative to device components such as the mouthpiece and reservoir chamber.
rubrics_scientific.d3: The respiratory and flow field processes are scientifically reliable, reflecting the impact of coordinated compression-inhalation, low-velocity stable inhalation on delivery efficiency, the deceleration and mixing characteristics within the holding chamber, as well as the inhibitory effect of lip sealing on aerosol leakage.
rubrics_scientific.d4: The key structures and working mechanisms of the delivery device are accurately presented, demonstrating the valve opening and atomization/dispersion processes, the role of the propellant, as well as the buffering effect of the aerosol canister geometry on particle velocity and spatial distribution.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Cellular-level interactions and outcomes are coherent, demonstrating directional mucus trapping and ciliary clearance, as well as the temporal sequence of dissolution/absorption following epithelial contact, while avoiding overestimation of instantaneous penetration or trans-tissue diffusion.

rubrics_visual.d1: Image clarity and fine depiction of microscopic details are ensured, with high discernibility of key microstructures and particle morphologies; edges are clean, and texture layers are well-defined.
rubrics_visual.d2: The animation exhibits high smoothness and consistency with particle dynamics, featuring continuous motion trajectories and natural variations in velocity. Interactive feedback such as collisions, adhesion, and dispersion is coherent and credible.
rubrics_visual.d3: 3D modeling accuracy and material realism are high, with clear structural hierarchy and consistent scale, and surface roughness, reflectivity, and transparency characteristics are appropriately represented.
rubrics_visual.d4: Lighting and shadow effects as well as depth of field are handled naturally; volumetric scattering and translucent media are accurately represented; shadow transitions are smooth; focal points effectively guide the key motion paths.
rubrics_visual.d5: Color and contrast are properly controlled, white balance is stable, saturation is moderate, and important elements exhibit clear color differentiation with a consistent style.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Fully reproduce the core process from inhaler actuation to the delivery of drug particles through the spacer into the airway, emphasizing the particle transport pathways and the airway microanatomy involved in interaction with epithelial cells.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Accurately present the critical connections and structural details between the metered-dose inhaler and the spacer, reflecting the drug delivery mechanism and the functional logic of the device.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Key elements of the task requirements and human-machine interaction components, such as particle release and dispersion, oral sealing and steady inhalation, as well as breath control and pulmonary dynamics.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Meets the requirements of a microscopic perspective and technical specifications; the camera is stable and trackable, composition and pacing are clear, and duration and environmental simplicity comply with instructions.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Significant omissions or misleading presentations contrary to the instructions (such as missing critical stages or connections, predominantly remaining at the oral cavity level, neglecting particle-epithelium interactions, or deviating from the microscopic perspective).

任务: Under the microscope, the enlarged prostate gland compresses the urethra, causing urethral narrowing. Dynamically demonstrate the obstruction of urine flow, meticulously presenting the microscopic structures of prostate cells and fibrous tissue, highlighting the interaction between the tissue and the urethra as well as changes in fluid dynamics.
具体要求: Create a captivating microscopic world video focusing on the complexity of benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH), emphasizing the enlargement of the prostate gland surrounding the urethra. Depict the dynamic interaction between the prostate gland and the urethra, highlighting the progressive compression of the urethra by the enlarging prostate tissue and the consequent obstruction of urine flow. Capture the detailed texture of prostate fibrous tissue and its cellular architecture, showcasing the vitality and complexity of the glandular surface. Illustrate the urethra passing through the prostate, detailing the fluid movement and occasional blockages caused by urethral narrowing due to gland enlargement. Convey the microscopic changes in prostate tissue associated with aging, meticulously presenting the complex biochemical environment driving prostate growth and BPH symptoms. Integrate visual elements representing pharmacological agents affecting the prostate, bladder, and urethral musculature—such as alpha-adrenergic receptor antagonists and PDE5 inhibitors—that improve urine flow. Cover surgical interventions like transurethral resection of the prostate (TURP), providing close-up views of electrocautery resection of hypertrophic tissue to enlarge the urethral lumen. Reveal the interactions of light and tissue in minimally invasive procedures involving laser, microwave, radiofrequency, and electrical energy. Showcase precise surgical maneuvers in open prostatectomy, offering comprehensive views of the capsule and suturing. Highlight lifestyle modifications impacting symptoms at the microscopic level, depicting fluid dynamics changes following adjustments in alcohol and caffeine intake. Provide vivid imagery of the cellular environment optimizing bladder emptying during double voiding. Employ professional visual storytelling techniques to capture the essence of prostate health, integrating rich textures and detailed patterns to emphasize the BPH condition and associated therapeutic approaches.

rubrics_scientific.d1: The spatial topology and scale proportions between the prostate and urethra are accurate, demonstrating the prostate encircling the urethra, with hyperplasia-induced deformation and displacement causing luminal narrowing consistent with human anatomical and microscopic scales.
rubrics_scientific.d2: The visualization of urine flow velocity, pressure gradient, and shear stress within the stenotic segment, as well as the transition between laminar and turbulent flow, conforms to fluid dynamics principles. The dynamic progression of obstruction and intermittent blockage is consistent with the underlying physical causality.
rubrics_scientific.d3: The histological architecture and texture of prostatic glandular epithelium, stromal fibrous tissue, and smooth muscle, as well as cellular morphology, nucleo-cytoplasmic ratio, glandular lumen, and basement membrane microstructures, correspond accurately to microscopic-level characteristics.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Pathophysiology-Function-Intervention Consistency Clarity: The causal chain linking benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH) progression to urethral stricture and consequent urinary obstruction is accurately presented; the mechanisms of action and effects of pharmacological agents (e.g., α-adrenergic antagonists, PDE5 inhibitors) targeting smooth muscle tone and the NO-cGMP signaling pathway are scientifically described; the interactions between energy modalities such as transurethral resection of the prostate (TURP), laser, microwave, and radiofrequency with tissue, as well as their hemostatic effects and resultant urethral dilation, align with clinical principles; the depiction of lifestyle modifications on detrusor muscle function and urodynamics is appropriately articulated.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Scientific error is effectively controlled: excludes malignant infiltration or infection unrelated to BPH; avoids misleading tissue optical and mechanical properties through exaggerated lighting effects or incorrect color encoding; prevents tissue deformation and fluid responses that violate principles of mass conservation, material elasticity, and physiological strain limits.

rubrics_visual.d1: High image clarity with effective anti-aliasing and noise reduction; clearly defined microstructural hierarchy (distinct cellular and fibrous textures); consistent scale without over-sharpening of details.
rubrics_visual.d2: The animation and structural deformation are coupled naturally; fluid flow and lumen stenosis are continuously coupled; velocity and vortex variations are smooth, without jitter, mesh penetration, or stretching artifacts.
rubrics_visual.d3: Material and lighting realism and consistency: tissue translucency and subsurface scattering are plausible; liquid refraction and specular highlights are authentic; instrument reflections are accurate; volumetric lighting and shadow gradations appear natural; color saturation and contrast are harmonious.
rubrics_visual.d4: 3D Modeling and Cinematography Specialty: Geometric accuracy and topological conformity; seamless normals and texture mapping; stable depth of field and camera movement with focused emphasis on key interaction areas; clear occlusion management and hierarchical relationships.
rubrics_visual.d5: Good visual uniformity and information readability: consistent color coding and labeling elements, balanced transitions and pacing, annotations unobstructed to key content, free from color banding, noise, and compression artifacts.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Comprehensively presents the core pathology and interaction pathways: From a microscopic perspective, the dynamic process of prostate gland enlargement surrounding and compressing the urethra, resulting in urethral lumen narrowing and obstructed urine flow, is clearly visible.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Key microscopic elements and structural textures are accurately represented: the microarchitecture of prostatic epithelial and fibrous tissues, the urethral course and parietal characteristics, as well as fluid morphology and shear variations are meticulously depicted, with the interactions among tissue, urethra, and fluid prominently highlighted and scale relationships consistently maintained.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Visualization coverage of intervention and treatment pathways: incorporating multiple types of interventions including pharmacological modulation, transurethral/minimally invasive energy therapies, open surgical procedures and suturing, as well as lifestyle and behavioral strategies, and presenting comparative pre- and post-intervention effects on urinary flow and conduit morphology.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Compliance with Procedural and Technical Specifications: The dynamic process is coherent, with sufficient dwell time and readability at key stages; consistency is maintained among framing, scale, and microscopic perspective; duration and pacing meet task requirements, and image clarity and informational layering support comprehension.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Penalty for Severe Deviations: Omissions of core scenarios or predominance of non-microscopic perspectives, confusion of anatomical structures or energy–tissue interaction mechanisms, failure to demonstrate stenosis and flow obstruction caused by tissue enlargement, resulting in the inability to achieve the instructional objectives.

任务: Under a high-definition microscopic perspective, dark, deformed cancer cells appear on the surface of healthy pink lung cells. The cell membrane texture is delicate and clear, dynamically displaying the early morphological changes and localized proliferation of cancer cells. There is a vivid color contrast between healthy cells and cancer cells. The background features a simplified representation of pulmonary alveoli and blood vessels, highlighting the morphological and color changes of early-stage lung cancer cells.
具体要求: Create an engaging and educational microscopic world video that depicts the dynamic and complex processes occurring at the cellular level within the human lung. The main content should illustrate the transformation of normal lung cells into cancerous cells, portraying the initial changes and their eventual proliferation leading to tumor formation. In this scene, vividly depict healthy lung cells surrounded by their natural environment, including alveoli and blood vessels, which perform critical oxygen and carbon dioxide exchange. Subsequently, emphasize the emergence of abnormal cancer cells, highlighting their active proliferation and aggregation into tumors, followed by invasion and destruction of surrounding healthy lung tissue. The narrative should progress to show how these cancer cells spread through the blood and lymphatic systems, symbolizing potential metastasis to other parts of the body. Attention to detail is crucial; capture the delicate texture of the cell membrane, the dynamic movement of cellular activity, and the alarming transition from transparent healthy cells to opaque, deformed cancer cells. Focus on the tonal contrast between healthy pink lung tissue and malignant black tumors, underscoring their stark differences and the urgency of early detection. This high-definition video should convey the complexity and severity of lung cancer, providing viewers with an immersive experience while educating them about the critical stages of lung cancer development and the importance of early screening.

rubrics_scientific.d1: The morphology and scale proportions of cells, capillaries, and alveolar structures conform to histological and microscopic dimensional relationships (including cell diameter, alveolar wall thickness, relative sizes of erythrocytes and vascular lumen, and hierarchical nesting).
rubrics_scientific.d2: The structure of the alveolar-capillary interface and the gas exchange process are accurately represented, with oxygen and carbon dioxide diffusing along their concentration gradients, and the direction of blood flow exhibiting appropriate laminar flow characteristics.
rubrics_scientific.d3: The sequential stages and manifestations of the progression from normal pulmonary epithelium to tumor are consistent with tumor biology (dysplasia/carcinoma in situ → local invasion → clonal expansion forming clusters), with a reasonable temporal sequence of proliferation and morphological changes.
rubrics_scientific.d4: The pathways and key events of cancer cell invasion into the surrounding stroma and metastasis via the blood and lymphatic systems are accurately presented (including basement membrane disruption, intravasation/extravasation, survival in circulation, and colonization).
rubrics_scientific.d5: Cellular and molecular movements adhere to microscale physical and biochemical constraints, including Brownian motion and diffusion scales, velocity and deformation within viscous environments, as well as adhesion- and cytoskeleton-driven shape changes and migration.

rubrics_visual.d1: High image clarity with finely distinguishable cell membranes and microtextures; edges are sharp and free of blur; details remain consistently stable in close-up and motion shots.
rubrics_visual.d2: Color rendition is natural and accurate, with healthy pink-stained tissue forming a distinct yet undistorted contrast against the darker cancer cells. Overall saturation and contrast are well-defined and layered, without color bias.
rubrics_visual.d3: The animation sequencing and motion are smooth; changes in cell morphology and localized proliferation processes are coherent and stable; camera transitions are seamless without jitter, motion blur, or frame skipping.
rubrics_visual.d4: The 3D modeling and material rendering are credible, with cellular structures proportionally coordinated with pulmonary alveoli and blood vessels; surface texture and translucency exhibit natural characteristics, and deformation and contact interactions are consistently represented.
rubrics_visual.d5: The gradation of light and shadow and depth of field control are natural, with a prominent hierarchy; focus and bokeh guide the viewer’s attention without compromising critical microscopic details.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Complete implementation of the core evolutionary trajectory from healthy lung cells to carcinogenesis, encompassing early morphological alterations, localized proliferation, tumor formation, invasion of surrounding tissues, and initial dissemination through blood and lymphatic systems.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Accurate representation of key elements and contrast: distinct tonal contrast between healthy pink lung cells and dark, atypical cancerous cells; fine and clear texture of the cell membranes; background comprising simplified alveoli and blood vessels.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Conformance to high-definition microscopic perspective and technical specifications: the image is clear and stable, details are discernible, depth of field and focus emphasize early-stage variations, and the cinematographic language facilitates microscopic observation.
rubrics_instruction.d4: The dynamic process narration is coherent and appropriately paced in duration: each phase advances logically, with sufficient emphasis on key transitions to ensure their recognition, without omitting important intermediates.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Effective Communication of Educational and Scientific Information: Emphasizes the critical stages of lung cancer development and the importance of early detection, with content that is rigorous and engaging.

任务: High-definition microscopic visualization comparing squamous cell carcinoma cells with normal cells, highlighting the abnormal nuclei, irregular morphology, and dynamic proliferation of cancer cells, with distinct contrast in cytoplasmic texture and coloration. The process of immune cells attacking cancer cells is clearly visible, focusing on a single microscopic field, scientifically accurate, suitable for a 5-second microscopic world video.
具体要求: Create a stunning microscopic world video centered on squamous cell carcinoma, showcasing its complex cellular and molecular composition as the primary focus. The scene unfolds with squamous cells undergoing mutation and proliferation, demonstrating how cancer cells form and spread to tissues such as the nose, nasal sinuses, oral cavity, pharynx, larynx, and salivary glands. Engage the audience with vivid cellular interactions, emphasizing the dynamic process of metastasis and disruption of normal function. The video should delve into the intricate texture of cancer, presenting details such as abnormal nuclei, irregular cell shapes, and chaotic growth patterns. Emphasize the contrasting textures between healthy and cancerous cells, capturing their vivid colors and distinctive features. Incorporate visual representations of potential treatment options within the scene, including microsurgery, radiotherapy, chemotherapy, targeted therapy, and immunotherapy interactions with cancer cells. Convey the effects of these treatments through changes in cellular structure and movement, such as checkpoint protein blockade and immune cell-mediated cancer cell attack. Showcase the fluidity and dynamics of these interactions to engage and educate viewers about head and neck cancer, ensuring the video consistently respects scientific integrity and medical significance. Utilize high-definition imagery to bring the microscopic world to life, providing an unparalleled perspective on the complexity of squamous cell carcinoma, and ensure the content is both relevant and informative for a broad audience interested in cancer research and education.

rubrics_scientific.d1: The morphological differences between squamous cell carcinoma and normal squamous epithelial cells, including cellular and nuclear morphology, nuclear-to-cytoplasmic ratio, and relative size proportions, are accurately represented; the scale ratio between immune cells and target cells is appropriately maintained.
rubrics_scientific.d2: The dynamic sequence and causal relationships among cell proliferation, infiltration and migration, as well as immune cell recognition-binding-killing, conform to pathophysiological principles, with temporal compression that does not disrupt the logical integrity of critical steps.
rubrics_scientific.d3: The correspondence between treatment modalities and cellular-level mechanisms is accurate (radiotherapy manifests as increased DNA damage and apoptosis markers; chemotherapy/targeted therapy inhibits proliferation or induces apoptosis; immunotherapy relieves checkpoint inhibition to enhance T cell cytotoxicity; microsurgery involves localized physical excision).
rubrics_scientific.d4: The style and color scheme of microscopic imaging are consistent with the indicated staining or fluorescence channels, with uniform depth of field and resolution within a single microscopic field. Inter-tissue diffusion is expressed through reasonable spatiotemporal transitions to avoid scale confusion caused by the simultaneous presence of organ-level and cellular-level features within the same field.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Scientific misrepresentation caused by non-biological motion trajectories, discontinuities in scale, or exaggerated coloration introduced to enhance visual appeal

rubrics_visual.d1: Image clarity and fine depiction of microscopic details; distinct stratification of cell nuclei, membranes, and microstructures; edges are sharp without noticeable blur.
rubrics_visual.d2: High accuracy in 3D modeling and realistic material representation, with well-proportioned shapes; consistent rendering of translucency, viscosity, and granular textures.
rubrics_visual.d3: The animation transitions and motion trajectories are smooth and coherent, with stable speed and rhythm in cellular and molecular interactions, free from jitter and motion blur.
rubrics_visual.d4: Color reproduction, saturation, and contrast are naturally balanced; distinct differentiation is maintained across various structural color regions; highlights and shadows retain detailed information.
rubrics_visual.d5: Lighting and shadow effects as well as depth of field control are natural; volumetric scattering, refraction, and soft shadow rendering are stable; the subject is focused with prominent layering.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Complete implementation of the specified microscopic topic and core scenario, focusing on the comparison between pathological objects and normal cells under the microscope.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Accurately depicting key microscopic elements and dynamic processes, including atypical nuclei, irregular morphology, disordered proliferation and metastasis, immune cell attack, as well as the visualization and impact of therapeutic options on cancer cell interactions.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Maintain scientific integrity and medical accuracy by ensuring that the expression of cellular structures, processes, and mechanisms is precise, verifiable, and free from misleading exaggeration.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Complying with technical specifications and perspective requirements, high-definition imagery, approximately 5 seconds duration, stable microscope viewpoint, single microscopic scene, with clear contrast in color and texture.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Presence of macroscopic views or multiple camera angle switches causing deviation from microscopic focus, or omission of core contrasts and critical interactions (proliferation, immune attack, therapeutic effects)

任务: From a microscopic perspective, display healthy lung cells alongside abnormal lung cancer cells, highlighting the significant differences in cellular morphology and surface texture between the two. The background features the lung tissue microenvironment with clear cellular structures. The lung cancer cells exhibit slight proliferation and motility dynamics, reflecting their abnormal morphology and microenvironmental characteristics.
具体要求: Create a captivating animation that takes the audience on a profound journey into the microscopic world of lung cancer cells, capturing the intricate details of this devastating disease as it unfolds within the human body. The central scene should visually present a group of abnormal lung cancer cells at various developmental stages, from their initial transformation from healthy cells to the formation of aggressive tumors. Witness the dynamic behavior of these cancer cells rapidly proliferating, invading surrounding healthy lung tissue, and observe how these tumor clusters interact with blood vessels and lymph nodes, emphasizing their potential for systemic metastasis. The animation should capture the distinct textures and colors marking the transition from healthy lung tissue to cancerous cells, showcasing the contrast between smooth, elastic alveoli and the irregular, sclerotic structures of malignant tumors. Include detailed visual narratives of both small cell lung cancer and non-small cell lung cancer, highlighting the rapid growth of the former and the insidious progression of the latter, enriched by realistic surface microtextures, cellular dynamics, and authentic depictions of their varied microscopic appearances. This video aims to educate and inform, providing viewers with a detailed and realistic perspective on how lung cancer spreads, thereby underscoring the importance of early detection and the associated risks during its development, such as smoking and environmental factors.

rubrics_scientific.d1: The morphology, nuclear-to-cytoplasmic ratio, and surface microtexture of healthy alveolar epithelial cells are accurately contrasted with those of abnormal lung cancer cells, and the relative size ratios of cells and their major substructures to the surrounding tissues are appropriate.
rubrics_scientific.d2: The anatomical hierarchies and spatial relationships of the pulmonary microenvironment are accurately presented, including the structures and arrangements of the alveolar walls, interstitium, blood vessels, and lymphatic vessels.
rubrics_scientific.d3: The morphological transformation from healthy to cancerous states, the rate of cell proliferation, the sequential stages of mitosis, and the temporal scale and processes of cell motility all conform to the principles of cell biology and tumor biology.
rubrics_scientific.d4: The mechanisms underlying cancer cell invasion into surrounding tissues and dissemination via the vascular and lymphatic systems are accurately described, including basement membrane disruption, extracellular matrix degradation, angiogenesis, as well as transendothelial migration processes and hemodynamic scale considerations.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Distinctive morphological features differentiating small cell lung carcinoma from non-small cell lung carcinoma are accurately identified, with variations in cell size, nuclear-to-cytoplasmic ratio, aggregation patterns, and growth rates consistent with established medical consensus.

rubrics_visual.d1: High image clarity with well-defined edges of key subcellular structures, rich surface microtextural and scale hierarchies, and stable details free from aliasing or smearing artifacts.
rubrics_visual.d2: The animation exhibits smooth motion, with the timing of cell division, migration, proliferation, and interactions, as well as morphological deformations, appearing natural and coherent, free from jitter, frame drops, and interpolation artifacts.
rubrics_visual.d3: High fidelity in 3D modeling accuracy and material representation, with precise geometric shapes and consistent rendering of micro-material properties such as translucency, roughness, and microsurface details.
rubrics_visual.d4: The lighting and microscopic imaging style are natural, with stable volumetric lighting, depth of field, and soft shadows. The luminance dynamic range is reasonable, without excessive highlight blooming or pitch-black shadows.
rubrics_visual.d5: Color and contrast convey scientific coherence, with clear yet not exaggerated hue differentiation between healthy and abnormal tissues; the overall style is consistent, and the hierarchy of information is well-defined.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Healthy lung cells and abnormal lung cancer cells are presented side by side, emphasizing the contrast in morphology, coloration, and surface microtexture, with a clear focus on differences at the center of the scene.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Demonstrates the staged evolution of cancer cells transitioning from healthy to aggressive tumor states, encompassing the narrative trajectory of early transformation, cluster formation, and expansion.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Reflections of microscopic dynamics and interactive behaviors: cellular proliferation and motility, invasion of surrounding lung tissue, and contact and interactions with the vascular and lymphatic systems.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Restoration of the pulmonary tissue microenvironment and clarity of cellular structures, utilizing a microscopic perspective and stable cinematographic techniques, in accordance with technical specifications for duration and pacing.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Differentiate and present the characteristic morphology and growth features of small cell lung carcinoma versus non-small cell lung carcinoma, reflecting educational and public science communication objectives.

任务: From a microscopic perspective, synaptic vesicles in healthy neurons within the hippocampus release neurotransmitters, which traverse the synaptic cleft and bind to receptors. Action potentials propagate along dendrites. The synaptic vesicles exhibit distinct texture, with charges flickering in rainbow colors. The background features a detailed neural network structure. The scene is vividly colored and dynamically smooth, highlighting the active communication between neurons.
具体要求: Create a breathtaking microscopic world video that delves deeply into the brain's cognitive functions, focusing on the complex neural networks involved in memory formation and decline within the hippocampus. The scene vividly recreates neurons engaged in active communication: observing dendrites receiving chemical signals and the resulting cascade of action potentials. Visualize neurotransmitters dancing across the synaptic cleft, binding to receptors, showcasing the elegance and complexity of neuronal communication. Emphasize the vivid detail and texture of synaptic vesicles, the rainbow-like glow of charges, and the flickering neurotransmitters. When narrating the impact of Alzheimer's disease, reveal the progressive accumulation of extracellular contrast agents—sticky amyloid plaques—that obstruct neural communication in the inter-neuronal space. Penetrate individual neurons to display how abnormal tau proteins distort microtubules into tangled formations—neurofibrillary tangles—disrupting the orderly intracellular transport system. Highlight the degradation process over time, including synaptic loss and neuronal death, ultimately leading to widespread neural network collapse. Include contrasting microscopic visualizations of healthy and diseased states, using vivid colors, detailed textures, and immersive sound design to emphasize the poignant beauty of the breakdown process. This underscores the severity of Alzheimer's disease effects while providing viewers with an educational and visually captivating experience that allows them to appreciate the complexity and fragility of their own brain cells.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accuracy of the relationship between neuroanatomical structures and scale: The morphology, relative size, and spatial hierarchy of hippocampal neuron cell bodies, dendrites, axons, presynaptic/postsynaptic structures, synaptic vesicles, synaptic clefts, and microtubules conform to established quantitative scales.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Correct causal sequence of synaptic transmission: presynaptic membrane depolarization triggers Ca2+ influx → SNARE-mediated vesicle fusion and neurotransmitter quantum release → neurotransmitter diffusion in the synaptic cleft and binding to specific receptors → receptor-gated ion channels or G-protein pathways alter the postsynaptic membrane potential
rubrics_scientific.d3: Accuracy of Electrical Signal Propagation Mechanisms and Directionality: Action potentials originate at the axon initial segment and propagate forward along the axon; dendritic signals are primarily localized potentials, and features such as dendritic sodium/calcium spikes or backpropagation must be clearly distinguished from axonal action potentials.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Pathological localization and impact of Alzheimer's disease: Amyloid plaques are located extracellularly and disrupt synaptic and network transmission; abnormal tau accumulates intracellularly, inducing microtubule instability and neurofibrillary tangles, leading to axonal transport deficits, synaptic loss, and the temporal progression of network activity decline.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Visualization and temporal/physical consistency: Molecular diffusion and receptor binding occur on a millisecond to second timescale; vesicle recycling and replenishment occur on a second to minute timescale; network plasticity occurs on a minute to hour timescale. The artistic representation of color and lighting effects does not violate electrochemical gradients, ion selectivity, or conservation laws.

rubrics_visual.d1: Image clarity and fine depiction of microstructural details, with clear hierarchical organization and readable texture and microstructure.
rubrics_visual.d2: Color saturation and contrast are natural and realistic, with stable chromatic relationships; key elements are prominent while maintaining overall harmony.
rubrics_visual.d3: The animation and motion exhibit good coherence, with appropriate rhythmic pacing of microscopic particles and signal transmission, and smooth camera movements and scene transitions.
rubrics_visual.d4: High fidelity in 3D modeling accuracy and material representation, consistent scale, and high restoration of translucency and volumetric texture.
rubrics_visual.d5: Lighting and shadow effects and depth of field are natural; volumetric scattering and highlight/shadow consistency are well-maintained; spatial layering and focal guidance are clearly defined.

rubrics_instruction.d11: Fully realize the core narrative objectives of the hippocampal microenvironment: clearly depict synaptic chemical transmission and action potential cascades in healthy neurons, with a seamless transition to the neurodegenerative progression and network collapse characteristic of Alzheimer's disease stages.
rubrics_instruction.d22: Accurately covers and integrates the key biological elements and processes specified by the task: vesicle release under healthy conditions → neurotransmitter trans-synaptic transmission → receptor binding → complete propagation of electrical signals along dendritic pathways; during pathological stages, the specified pathological markers, structural abnormalities, and synaptic decline progressively manifest, with all elements present and clear causal relationships.
rubrics_instruction.d33: Perspective and visual style comply with standards: consistent microscopic perspective with detailed neural network background, reflecting the specified material texture and luminescence/color characteristics; overall vivid coloration and smooth dynamics; clear contrast between health and disease states; audiovisual integration enhances immersion and educational communication.
rubrics_instruction.d44: Compliance with Narrative Structure and Temporal Progression: The stages from health to pathological changes are clearly delineated, with the degradation process progressively exacerbated; shot transitions are smooth, and the duration and pacing meet the technical specifications and coherence requirements of the task.
rubrics_instruction.d55: Negative constraints on consistency with task specifications and scientific accuracy: content conflicting with task requirements or fundamental neuroscience knowledge (e.g., incorrect anatomical localization, non-microscopic perspectives, misleading causal interpretations, or inappropriate visual metaphors) shall be penalized.

任务: Under high-resolution microscopy, healthy ovarian cells and ovarian cancer cells are displayed side by side within the same microenvironment, meticulously presenting differences in cellular texture and morphology as well as abnormal proliferation of cancer cells. The subtle interactions between cells are highlighted, with the focus on a single cell population. The imagery is scientific and clear, suitable for a 5-second microscopic world video.
具体要求: Create a stunning video that intricately explores the microscopic world of ovarian cancer, illustrating the fundamental mechanisms of the disease. The central subject should be an ovary under the microscope, showcasing the subtle textures and vivid details between healthy ovarian cells and cancer cells. This scene should depict the rich complexity of the reproductive system, emphasizing the critical role of the oocyte traversing the fallopian tube and its function within ovarian physiology. Simultaneously, demonstrate cancer originating from the ovarian surface epithelium, highlighting the insidious nature of epithelial ovarian cancer as cancer cells proliferate uncontrollably and potentially metastasize to other regions. Emphasize the profound textures of ovarian cells and various tumor types, including germ cell tumors formed within oocytes and stromal tumors arising from hormone-producing tissues. Accurately visualize different stages of ovarian cancer, showing cellular-level differences and appearances under high-resolution imaging techniques. Capture the remarkable transition from stage I cancer confined to the ovary to stage IV malignant cells breaching the peritoneum and reaching distant organs. Every detail should be visible, reflecting abnormal growth and subtle interactions with surrounding peritoneal structures, with textures so refined that viewers can distinguish minute differences between normal and altered tissues. The video should provide an immersive educational journey, deeply exploring microscopic complexity and cellular architecture, designed for medical professionals, educators, and students seeking to understand this disease at the molecular level.

rubrics_scientific.d1: The morphology, texture, and size proportions of cellular and subcellular structures conform to biological characteristics, with clear yet not exaggerated distinctions between healthy and pathological phenotypes.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Scale relationships and spatial hierarchies are consistent; within the same microscopic field of view, the sizes and positional relationships of cells, extracellular matrix, and microvasculature are合理, avoiding the direct incorporation of organ-level structures or processes.
rubrics_scientific.d3: The temporal scales and causal logic of physiological and pathological processes are scientifically accurate; the manifestations of cell proliferation, apoptosis, migration, and differentiation conform to established patterns; the 5-second duration is achieved through time compression or sequencing rather than instantaneous transitions.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Accurate depiction of cell–microenvironment interactions, consistent with intercellular junctions, adhesion and matrix interactions, chemical signal gradients, as well as the direction and outcomes of mechanical forces.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Imaging features are consistent with the claimed microscopy technique, exhibiting resolution, depth of field, contrast mechanisms, and noise texture that are physically plausible, without displaying details beyond the optical resolution limit or incorrect fluorescence/pseudocolor encoding.

rubrics_visual.d1: High image clarity with well-defined microscopic structural textures and edge details; overall clean and free of blurring.
rubrics_visual.d2: Lighting and depth of field are naturally controlled, with clearly defined layers at a microscopic scale; focal transitions are smooth, avoiding overexposure and underexposure.
rubrics_visual.d3: Color rendering is scientifically consistent, with natural saturation and contrast; hue is accurate and faithful, enhancing structural recognition.
rubrics_visual.d4: The animation motion and transitions are smooth, with coherent dynamics of cells and microparticles; the camera remains stable without jitter or motion blur.
rubrics_visual.d5: The 3D modeling and material textures are realistic, with consistent proportions and scale; surface details and transparency are appropriately rendered, and edges are free of interpenetration artifacts.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Healthy and pathological cells are concurrently presented within the same microenvironment, clearly highlighting differences in morphology and texture, abnormal proliferation, and microscopic interactions.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Utilizes high-resolution microscopic perspective focusing on a single cell population, with stable composition and discernible details, and duration meeting task constraints.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Reflects the microscopic pathological progression and perceptible transitions from early to advanced stages, with coherent actions and changes, and a complete expression of key processes.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Hierarchical coverage of the key elements required by the task (normal tissue organization, lesion types, and microenvironment composition), with information organized in a scientifically clear manner, possessing educational and scientific communication value.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Inclusion of macroscopic scenes inconsistent with microscopic contexts, excessive visual effects, or irrelevant content leading to thematic deviation and omission of instructions.

任务: In the microscopic environment of lymph nodes, healthy lymphocytes are morphologically distinct from abnormal lymphoma cells, including Reed-Sternberg cells. The abnormal cells proliferate rapidly and spread, with cellular structural details clearly visible. The background features richly textured lymphatic tissue, highlighting the early microscopic characteristics and dynamic cellular changes of lymphoma.
具体要求: Create an engaging and informative video that delves into the microscopic realm of lymphoma to enhance understanding of this complex disease and its impact on the human body. Begin by focusing on the intricate network of the lymphatic system, emphasizing its critical role in immune response and disease prevention. In active scenes, highlight the dynamic transformation of normal lymphocytes within the lymph nodes into abnormal cancerous cells, using detailed animations to depict these cellular transitions and uncontrolled proliferation. Capture the unique morphology and behavior of Reed-Sternberg cells, illustrating their strategic dissemination through the lymphatic network in Hodgkin lymphoma, contrasted with the more chaotic spread of cancer cells in non-Hodgkin lymphoma. Utilize richly detailed textures to showcase the contrast between healthy and diseased lymphocytes, demonstrating clear differences at the microscopic level. Integrate visually impactful representations of common lymphoma symptoms, such as lymph node enlargement filled with rapidly expanding abnormal cells, set against the backdrop of the immune system’s efforts to control the malignancy. Conclude this visual journey with an educational narration introducing lymphoma staging, risk factors, and the importance of ongoing medical dialogue, ensuring the audience gains a comprehensive understanding of the disease and its various forms while seeking clarity and insight.

rubrics_scientific.d1: The microscopic anatomy and spatial organization of the lymph node (cortex/paracortex/medulla, lymphatic sinuses and follicles, medullary cords) are accurately presented, with reasonable structural positioning relationships and connectivity.
rubrics_scientific.d2: The typical morphological features, nuclear-to-cytoplasmic ratio, and size comparisons between normal lymphocytes and aberrant lymphoma cells (including Reed-Sternberg cells) are consistent with pathological characteristics, with reliable detail in the cell membrane and nuclear texture.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Tumor cell proliferation kinetics and dissemination patterns are consistent with subtype-specific biology: Hodgkin lymphoma disseminates contiguously along the lymphatic network, whereas non-Hodgkin lymphoma exhibits a more diffuse or irregular spread; mitotic activity and clonal expansion occur within biologically plausible temporal scales.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Accurate representation of the immune microenvironment composition and cellular interactions (including interactions among dendritic cells, T cells, macrophages, and tumor cells; adhesion and migration behaviors; as well as flow and retention within lymphatic sinuses), consistent with physiological and physicochemical principles.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Avoid the erroneous description of a large number of healthy lymphocytes undergoing instantaneous transformation into tumor cells within a short period without underlying genetic or molecular events, and prevent unrealistic movement trajectories and scale distortions caused by confusion with macroscopic blood flow or organ-level scales.

rubrics_visual.d1: Image clarity and precise resolution of microscopic details, with cell boundaries, subcellular structures, and tissue textures remaining sharp and free of blur during both static and dynamic conditions.
rubrics_visual.d2: High accuracy in 3D modeling and realistic material representation, with cells and tissues exhibiting anatomically and proportionally accurate morphology, topology free of mesh errors, and demonstrating microscopic textures such as translucency and subsurface scattering.
rubrics_visual.d3: Animation smoothness and dynamic coherence: cell movement, proliferation, and transition rhythms are natural; interpolation is smooth; camera motion is stable without jitter or motion blur.
rubrics_visual.d4: Lighting, volumetric lighting and shadows, and depth of field are handled naturally; the light source direction is consistent; volumetric scattering and soft shadow gradients are clearly defined; depth of field emphasizes the subject without obscuring critical information.
rubrics_visual.d5: Color mapping and contrast are appropriately controlled, with clear hue differentiation and consistent saturation and luminance, effectively preventing overexposure, crushed blacks, and banding artifacts.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Complete implementation of core scenarios and narrative objectives: unfolding within the lymph node microenvironment, centered on the microscopic features of lymphoma, emphasizing the distinct contrast between healthy and abnormal cells as well as early dynamic changes, thereby forming a coherent narrative from introduction to conclusion.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Accurately reflects the key elements and dynamic processes specified by the task: meticulously depicts the transformation of normal lymphocytes into abnormal cancerous cells, uncontrolled proliferation, and dissemination; clearly presents the designated special cell types and their characteristic features (e.g., Reed–Sternberg cells) and distinguishes the dissemination patterns of different disease types.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Scene and visual fidelity: The background features richly textured lymphoid tissue with clear microscopic details; the contrast in texture and morphology is utilized to enhance differentiation between healthy and pathological states, combined with visual representations of immune system responses and common symptoms such as lymphadenopathy.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Technical and Audiovisual Compliance with Guidelines: Meets duration and perspective specifications (consistent microscopic viewpoint, camera work and pacing facilitate comprehension); animation is coherent and emphasizes cellular-level dynamics; subtitles/labels are coordinated with narration without causing cognitive overload.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Achievement of Educational Value and Information Completeness: Conclude with a popular science summary that encompasses lymphoma staging, risk factors, and the importance of ongoing medical dialogue, thereby facilitating a comprehensive understanding of the disease and its diverse manifestations.

任务: From a microscopic perspective, insulin molecules (key-shaped) attempt to bind to insulin receptors (lock-shaped) embedded in the translucent, flexible lipid bilayer of the cell membrane under hyperglycemic conditions, but fail to bind due to insulin resistance. The background shows numerous spherical glucose molecules in the blood, highlighting the molecular details of impaired insulin signaling in type 2 diabetes.
具体要求: Create an engaging microscopic world video that depicts the complex interaction between insulin and cellular receptors in response to elevated blood glucose levels, with a focus on cellular structural details related to type 2 diabetes. The video should begin with a scene illustrating glucose molecules as vivid spherical entities entering the bloodstream from the small intestine, showcasing their journey toward the pancreas. As the narrative progresses, visually capture the intricate dance between insulin molecules and insulin receptors on the cell surface, emphasizing the key-shaped insulin molecules attempting to bind the lock-shaped receptor system but failing due to insulin resistance. Highlight the texture of the cell membrane, stressing its translucent, flexible lipid bilayer interspersed with detailed protein channels. Vividly portray the interaction between glucose and insulin with meticulous detail, allowing viewers to sense the tension caused by glucose accumulation in the blood leading to hyperglycemia, and the overworked pancreas striving to compensate by producing more insulin. Using microscope-level precision, demonstrate the progressive dysregulation of insulin signaling, focusing on the molecular structure of insulin and its receptor binding sites to elucidate how this normally harmonious interaction is disrupted in type 2 diabetes. By integrating captivating visual effects with complex biological details, produce a video that immerses viewers in the astonishing complexity of these cellular processes while enhancing their understanding of the microscopic interactions underlying diabetes.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Scientific representation of insulin–receptor interaction and insulin resistance mechanisms: the receptor is a transmembrane dimer possessing specific ligand-binding sites; in type 2 diabetes, resistance is primarily manifested by changes in receptor density/affinity and impaired downstream signaling cascades and glucose transporter translocation efficiency, rather than a universal “complete inability to bind.”
rubrics_scientific.d2: Accurate representation of the cell membrane lipid bilayer and membrane protein structure and topology: proper depiction of the fluid mosaic characteristics, hierarchical organization of hydrophilic headgroups and hydrophobic tails, and membrane flexibility; transmembrane spanning and mosaic distribution of receptors and channel/transporter proteins consistent with biological reality.
rubrics_scientific.d3: The relationship between scale and relative abundance is reasonable: glucose is smaller than insulin, and insulin is smaller than the extracellular domain of the receptor; the ratio of membrane thickness to protein size is appropriate; hyperglycemia is represented by an increase in numerical density without violating physiological concentration and volume fraction ranges.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Molecular and intramembrane dynamics conform to physicochemical principles: convective blood flow superimposed with diffusion and Brownian motion, lateral diffusion within the membrane, and dynamic microdomain clustering are all plausible; ligand–receptor binding is reversible, with affinity and occupancy varying according to concentration and time.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Scientific accuracy of digestion, absorption, circulatory pathways, and temporal sequence: Glucose is absorbed through the intestinal epithelium into the bloodstream and enters the circulatory network; pancreatic β-cells sense blood glucose levels and secrete insulin accordingly; insulin is transported via the bloodstream to act on target tissues such as the liver, muscle, and adipose tissue; the causal chain and temporal scale are appropriately represented.

rubrics_visual.d1: High image clarity and superior micro-detail resolution, with sharp edges, well-defined texture layering, and effective control of noise and compression artifacts.
rubrics_visual.d2: The 3D modeling and material rendering are realistic, with appropriately proportioned microstructures; the optical and deformation characteristics of translucent and soft materials are accurately represented.
rubrics_visual.d3: Animation and dynamics are smooth and physically plausible; particle/molecular trajectories are coherent; transitions between interactions and non-binding processes are natural; no mesh penetration or jittering occurs.
rubrics_visual.d4: Lighting and depth-of-field control are natural and stable; translucency scattering, volumetric lighting, and shadow transitions are smooth; exposure remains stable without flickering; key objects achieve effective light separation.
rubrics_visual.d5: Color and visual hierarchy are clear, with moderate saturation and contrast; key objects are distinctly separated from background colors, avoiding overexposure, color cast, and color conflicts.

rubrics_instruction.d11: Covers the key temporal and causal sequences described in the task, comprehensively presenting the core scenario from the entry of high glucose into the bloodstream and pancreatic response to the failed attempt of insulin receptor binding and subsequent signaling pathway dysregulation.
rubrics_instruction.d22: Accurately represents the key elements and structural relationships, including key-shaped insulin, lock-shaped receptors, a translucent flexible lipid bilayer with protein channels, and an environment with high-density spherical glucose molecules and their interactions.
rubrics_instruction.d33: Adhering to the microscopic perspective and image specifications, maintaining consistent scale and clearly visible molecular and membrane details; the composition of shots and duration scheduling meet the phased presentation requirements specified in the instructions.
rubrics_instruction.d44: Reflect the dynamic processes and logical transitions clearly, demonstrating the integration of impaired uptake, glucose accumulation, and enhanced pancreatic secretion, while highlighting the dysregulation progression characteristic of type 2 diabetes.
rubrics_instruction.d55: Critical Violation Items: Occurrence of significant content conflicting with the instructions or relational errors (such as stating that insulin successfully activates the receptor, omitting the hyperglycemic context, or adopting a non-microscopic perspective).

任务: From a microscopic perspective, vividly and delicately depict the instantaneous dynamics of hormone molecules binding to receptors on the surface of ovarian follicular cells, triggering cellular activities. The background should feature the ovarian cellular tissue structure, with detailed presentation of the microscopic mechanisms of hormonal regulation. The visuals should be educational and visually striking, emphasizing the impact of hormones on ovarian cells during the menstrual cycle.
具体要求: Produce an engaging and educational microscopic world video that deeply explores the complex and dynamic processes of the menstrual cycle. The main content should focus on the intricate interactions within the female reproductive organs, including the ovaries, fallopian tubes, uterus, cervix, and vagina, and how they respond to fluctuating hormone levels. The scenes should capture the cyclical nature of these events, demonstrating how hormones influence changes in these organs to prepare for potential pregnancy. Integrate vivid molecular-level depictions of hormone activity, illustrating how these natural chemicals regulate the physiological functions of the reproductive organs. Details should include the texture of tissue layers within these organs, the fluid dynamics of hormone flow, and the cellular transformations occurring, all presented with stunning clarity to highlight the microscopic beauty and complexity of the menstrual cycle. This immersive experience should educate viewers on the biological orchestration of menstruation while briefly explaining how devices such as intrauterine devices (IUDs) interact with these processes. The video should emphasize accuracy and visual grandeur, aiming to expand viewers' understanding of reproductive health and serve as an indispensable educational resource.

rubrics_scientific.d1: The specificity, spatial orientation, and affinity kinetics of hormone-receptor binding conform to principles of molecular recognition; the temporal and spatial range as well as the intensity of signal transduction following receptor activation are appropriate.
rubrics_scientific.d2: The hierarchical organization and spatial relationships of ovarian follicular cells and female reproductive organs (ovary, fallopian tube, uterus, cervix, and vagina) are accurately represented, with morphology, scale, and histological proportions consistent.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Hormonal fluctuations during the menstrual cycle are consistent with the sequential order of key events (follicular development → ovulation → luteal phase → menstruation), and organ responses correspond appropriately to the temporal scale.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Molecular and body fluid movements conform to the laws of diffusion/convection and Brownian motion; hemodynamics and interstitial fluid dynamics are represented accurately; the rates and directions of binding-dissociation and transmembrane processes are scientifically consistent; visual symbols and special effects do not violate physicochemical principles.
rubrics_scientific.d5: The mechanism by which intrauterine devices affect the uterine environment and reproductive processes is described accurately (e.g., the impact of local ion or hormone release on cervical mucus and the endometrium), consistent with known physiological responses.

rubrics_visual.d1: Image clarity and level of detail are well-defined; microstructural boundaries are clean, and texture details are consistent. Both foreground and background exhibit good readability.
rubrics_visual.d2: The rendering of lighting and materials is realistic, with natural and coherent volumetric effects, subsurface scattering, depth of field, and shadow transitions; color and contrast are naturally stable, exhibiting clear gradation that effectively emphasizes the subject.
rubrics_visual.d3: The animation demonstrates smoothness and dynamic coherence, with appropriately paced molecular interactions and fluid motions. Camera transitions and cuts are seamless, exhibiting no stuttering, jittering, or inter-frame inconsistencies.
rubrics_visual.d4: Modeling accuracy and scale consistency are well maintained, with harmonious proportions across multiple scales; geometric topology and details are fully realized; material textures correspond appropriately to camera distance; no issues such as intersection or stretching are present.
rubrics_visual.d5: Visible artifacts and noise issues are prominent (such as aliasing, banding, compression blocks, moiré patterns, and detail loss caused by excessive sharpening or denoising), which interfere with the readability and visual perception of the subject.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Clearly depict the instantaneous dynamics of hormone-receptor binding on the surface of follicular cells from a microscopic perspective, and subsequently trigger downstream cellular activities within the context of ovarian tissue.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Comprehensively demonstrate the phasic and cyclical nature of the menstrual cycle, emphasizing the synergistic effects of hormones on the ovary, fallopian tubes, uterus, cervix, and vagina.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Accurately reflects the critical details and hierarchical levels of hormonal regulatory mechanisms (molecular activities, tissue-level textures, fluid dynamics, cellular transformation) with clear educational orientation.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Meets technical and presentation standards (consistent microscopic perspective, clear and stable visuals, duration aligned with narrative pacing, balanced visual impact and information hierarchy), and includes an explanation of the interaction between the instructed device/intervention and physiological processes (e.g., IUD).
rubrics_instruction.d5: Deviation caused by scientific errors or omissions of key instructions (misleading mechanisms, missing essential organs or cycles, failure to represent hormone-receptor binding)

任务: Under an ultra-high-definition microscopic perspective, Treponema pallidum elegantly spirals within a realistic human tissue environment, with enhanced lighting clearly showcasing its distinctive helical morphology, axial filaments, and smooth outer sheath details. The bacteria dynamically coil and maneuver among cellular and tissue structures, highlighting the pathogen's microscopic architecture and motility characteristics.
具体要求: Create a stunning immersive microscopic world video that deeply explores Treponema pallidum—the microscopic spirochete responsible for syphilis—emphasizing its complex structure and lifecycle stages. The scene begins with an ultra-realistic view of these bacteria gracefully spiraling and coiling within a simulated human tissue environment, demonstrating their motility and interactions. As the sequence progresses, the video transitions through the various stages of syphilis, illustrating its impact on the human body, including bacterial penetration of mucous membranes and initiation of infection. Emphasize the spirochete’s helical shape and subtle surface details and textures, capturing the pathogen’s smooth, twisted form under enhanced lighting, highlighting its unique axial filaments and thin outer sheath. Focus on disease progression, showing bacterial migration and replication leading to ulcer formation in the primary stage, followed by the appearance of characteristic rashes in the secondary stage, accompanied by microscopic views of damaged cellular structures. Reveal the hidden and often silent latent stage, depicting dormant bacteria within body tissues. Finally, the video should powerfully portray the rare and destructive tertiary stage, where bacteria invade the brain, eyes, and heart, using dramatic visuals to underscore the potential for severe damage. Employ high-definition resolution and seamless transitions to ensure a comprehensive exploration of syphilis, delivering content that is both educational and visually impactful, supplemented with appropriate medical annotations and explanations, ultimately presenting an informative and visually stunning video experience.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Spirochete morphology and ultrastructural features are accurately presented: the helical shape is continuous, the axial filament is located within the outer sheath, and the outer sheath is smooth without extraneous surface appendages.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Locomotion mechanism consistent with the environment: helical propulsion combined with bending and twisting movements within a viscous extracellular matrix, with trajectory and velocity conforming to fluid dynamics and frictional conditions.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Multiscale proportions and temporal sequences are appropriate: the relative sizes and spacing among bacteria, epithelial cells, blood cells, and collagen fibers correspond to physiological scales, and the temporal rhythms of movement, proliferation, and migration are not exaggerated.
rubrics_scientific.d4: The description of the infection process and disease stages is scientifically accurate: mucosal invasion, local primary lesions, systemic dissemination with rash, latency, and late-stage organ involvement are anatomically localized and sequenced in accordance with medical consensus.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Point deduction for major scientific errors: Deduction applies when nonexistent organelles or surface structures are depicted, when their portrayal of intracellular replication, modes of division, or physiological mechanisms is incorrect, or when motility and optical characteristics contradict fundamental physicochemical principles.

rubrics_visual.d1: The image exhibits high clarity and discernibility of microscopic details, with clean and stable edges, and clear, non-blurred presentation of fine structures and micro-surface textures.
rubrics_visual.d2: Illumination and light-shadow gradations appear natural, with precise control over volumetric lighting, shadows, depth of field, and highlights; diffuse/specular reflection, subsurface scattering, and refraction within microscopic media are realistically rendered; color reproduction, contrast, and saturation are well-balanced, exhibiting no overexposure or color cast.
rubrics_visual.d3: High realism in 3D modeling and material texturing, with consistent form proportions and scale cues; surface roughness/aniso­tropy, normals, and micro-displacement details are rich and coherent with the environment.
rubrics_visual.d4: The animation and camera movements are smooth, with coherent micro-scale motion trajectories; velocity and acceleration curves are natural; collision/soft body/fluid coupling feedback is credible; edits transition seamlessly, and motion blur and temporal sampling are clean.
rubrics_visual.d5: The presence of noticeable noise, aliasing, texture flickering, color banding, compression artifacts, or reflection/refraction flickering causes visual defects that impair image stability and readability.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Complete implementation of core scenarios and microscopic perspective requirements: presenting the characteristic motility of target microorganisms and their spatial relationships with host structures within a hyper-high-definition microscopic view of a realistic human tissue environment.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Completeness and coherence of the narrative on life cycle/disease progression stages: gradual presentation from initial invasion through each stage of development and their impact on the tissue, with smooth transitions between sequences and clearly defined stage boundaries.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Coverage of Key Elements and Emphasis on Structural Details: Accurately presenting the morphology and critical structural components of the target microorganism (such as motility apparatus and surface coatings) while demonstrating interactions with the host’s microstructures.
