rubrics_instruction.d4: Technical specifications and cinematographic language align with the task: Ultra-high definition resolution and enhanced lighting ensure detail discernibility; stable camera work and depth of field control; duration and pacing correspond to the narrative; seamless transitions between segments and scenes.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Educational and annotation support for information transmission: Medical/scientific annotations are accurate, use standardized terminology, and are synchronized with visuals to enhance understanding without disrupting immersive experience.

任务: Under the microscope, the synthetic mesh tension-free vaginal tape (TVT) closely adheres to the periurethral cellular tissue, highlighting the textural contrast between the tape fibers and biological tissue. It dynamically demonstrates the microscopic contact and supportive relationship between the tape and cells, meticulously presenting the gradual healing process as the tissue adapts to the implant. The visuals are focused and concise, suitable for a 5-second microscopic world video.
具体要求: Create a stunning microscopic world video that thoroughly showcases the tension-free vaginal tape (TVT) procedure, which is critical for addressing stress urinary incontinence. The central focus of the scene should be the subtle interaction at the microscopic level between the synthetic mesh tape and the surrounding biological tissue, providing a precise view of how the tape supports the urethra. Capture the dynamic process of the needle penetrating the body, illustrating how the mesh tape is inserted and adjusted around the urethra to prevent urine leakage. The video should reveal detailed features of the woven mesh structure and its interaction with adjacent tissues, emphasizing the formation of scar tissue over time as a stabilizer for the mesh. Highlight the unique textures of the synthetic material in contrast with the smooth, complex surfaces of the organic cellular environment, showcasing the geometric shape of the tape against the human tissue. Include vivid close-up shots of suturing during the cellular healing process and the gradual tissue adaptation to the implanted tape, ensuring viewers understand the role of the surgical incision and the body's natural healing mechanisms. Display the microscopic details and texture of the synthetic mesh, emphasizing its protective and supportive function in maintaining urinary function. This engaging educational video should serve as a visual reference for hospital staff, medical students, and researchers exploring modern surgical solutions for urinary incontinence.

rubrics_scientific.d1: The spatial relationship and orientation between the urethra and its surrounding tissue layers and the synthetic mesh sling are precise, demonstrating a contact state that closely supports rather than compresses.
rubrics_scientific.d2: The tension-free support mechanism and the force behavior at the contact interface conform to biomechanical principles, with the transmission path, deformation, and frictional responses between the needle device and the mesh belt accurately represented under dynamic conditions.
rubrics_scientific.d3: The temporal sequence of tissue response and healing post-implantation is appropriate, demonstrating morphological changes and rates of inflammatory response, cellular migration and adhesion, collagen deposition, and scar maturation that align with physiological norms.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Accurate representation of microscale spatial and temporal dimensions; the size proportions of cells, fibers, microvessels, and pores are consistent with the microscopic magnification; microscopic movements conform to physicochemical principles.
rubrics_scientific.d5: The microstructure of the synthesized mesh and the material–tissue interface characteristics demonstrate scientific validity, with fiber diameters consistent with weaving geometry, pore size distribution and surface texture appropriate, as well as rational protein and cell adhesion behavior.

rubrics_visual.d1: High image clarity with sharp and natural edges of microstructures, rich hierarchical details, and absence of noise, blur, or over-sharpening artifacts.
rubrics_visual.d2: High precision in 3D modeling and realistic material texturing, accurate structural proportions, intact mesh and normals/UVs without damage, and credible representation of surface microtextures and roughness.
rubrics_visual.d3: The lighting effects and microscopic depth of field control are natural; the light source direction and intensity are appropriate; highlights are not overexposed, and shadows exhibit gradation; focus is stable with smooth transitions; volumetric and subsurface scattering are well-coordinated.
rubrics_visual.d4: Animation smoothness and micro-interaction dynamics credibility; motion velocity and acceleration exhibit smooth transitions; contact and support relationships are coherent without interpenetration; deformable body/viscoelastic deformation recovery appears natural.
rubrics_visual.d5: Color reproduction and contrast are natural, with stable white balance and moderate saturation. Color separation is clear and emphasizes subject layering, avoiding color cast and excessive grading.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Fully accomplish the micro-level core scenarios and main objectives specified in the task, emphasizing the close-range interaction and supportive relationship between the designated composite implant and the target tissue.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Coherent presentation of key dynamic processes and temporal evolution, including puncture implantation, positional adjustment, microscopic contact, tissue adaptation, and scar/healing formation.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Enhanced microscopic texture contrast between reinforcement materials and structures, clearly showcasing details of mesh geometry and tissue surfaces, with stable close-up shots and focused imaging.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Meets technical specifications and presentation constraints, including a microscopic perspective, approximately 5 seconds duration, concise visuals, appropriate information density, and clear educational expression.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Presence of content conflicting with instructions or omission of critical elements (deviation from a microscopic perspective, lack of emphasis on the core subject, missing key steps, or cluttered visuals)

任务: Microscopically demonstrate the tension and release of masticatory muscle fibers within the temporomandibular joint (TMJ), highlighting the muscle fiber texture and inflammatory details on the joint surface. Rendered in high-resolution true color, focus on the microscopic dynamics of joint abnormalities and visualize the instantaneous effect of a stabilization splint alleviating muscle tension at the cellular level, showcasing the microscopic interaction between the splint and muscle fibers.
具体要求: Produce a stunning microscopic world video illustrating the complex dynamics of temporomandibular joint (TMJ) disorders, with an emphasis on mandibular joint abnormalities and tension within the masticatory muscles. Visualize the microscopic interactions inside the TMJ, prominently displaying the movement and stress of the joint and surrounding muscles as they undergo subtle contraction and release, capturing the essence of discomfort. Pay particular attention to the texture and detail of muscle fiber organization, the smooth yet tense surface of the mandibular joint, and the progressive inflammation characteristic of this condition. Emphasize the appearance of the stabilization splint, demonstrating its cellular-level effects as it relieves muscle tension and realigns the mandible, illustrating how it supports the teeth and promotes healing. Use vivid colors and high-resolution visuals to capture this microscopic drama, ensuring every cell and fiber depicts the reality of TMJ-related pain and recovery, creating an immersive and informative visual experience tailored for medical professionals, students, and patients seeking an in-depth understanding of this common yet critical disorder.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accurate depiction of the microanatomical structures and spatial relationships of the temporomandibular joint and masticatory muscles: the morphological hierarchy and relative positioning of the articular surfaces, articular disc, synovium, surrounding muscle bundles, muscle fibers, and collagen matrix conform to anatomical standards.
rubrics_scientific.d2: The dynamics of muscle contraction and relaxation in relation to joint loading conform to physiological principles: the changes in muscle fiber texture and force transmission pathways, as well as the coupling relationships of mandibular movement, are scientifically consistent; the appearance and resolution sequence of inflammatory manifestations (congestion, exudation, cellular infiltration) align with pathophysiological processes.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Reasonable spatial and temporal scale relationships: the size proportions of cells, muscle fibers, collagen bundles, blood vessels, and joint surface textures are consistent with microscope magnification; the temporal rhythms of rapid mechanical changes and slower inflammatory processes are clearly distinguished.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Scientific basis of the micro-mechanism of stabilization splints: Visualization of the alteration in occlusion and load distribution, reduction of muscle fiber tension and synovial shear stress, and triggering of neuromuscular feedback that aligns with biomechanical and neurophysiological principles, without presenting instantaneous repair effects beyond plausible mechanisms.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Microscopic biophysical processes conform to physical laws: synovial fluid flow exhibits viscoelasticity; molecular diffusion and chemotaxis; tissue elasticity and recoil; friction and shear demonstrate appropriate behaviors and magnitudes; particle and molecular movements display characteristics of Brownian motion and other thermal fluctuations.

rubrics_visual.d1: The image exhibits high clarity and accurate restoration of microscopic details, with distinct boundaries of tissue textures and cellular structures, devoid of noise and over-sharpening.
rubrics_visual.d2: The animation exhibits smoothness and consistency with microscopic dynamics; the contraction and relaxation rhythms are natural; minor deformations and stress transmission are continuous; camera movements and focus transitions are seamless.
rubrics_visual.d3: High fidelity in 3D modeling and material realism, clear hierarchical organization of tissue structures, accurate representation of fiber anisotropy and surface roughness/wettability, and appropriate scale and material matching between intervention devices and tissues.
rubrics_visual.d4: Color and contrast are natural and realistic; tissue hues are uniform; inflammatory areas exhibit clear layering and contrast without excessive saturation; white balance is stable and neutral without color casts.
rubrics_visual.d5: Proper control of lighting and depth of field, natural subsurface scattering and soft shadows, stable volumetric lighting and reflections without flickering, with distinct depth of field layers that effectively emphasize the focal area.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Comprehensively depict the core scenarios of tension-release within the temporomandibular joint (TMJ) and masticatory muscle fibers under microscopy, as well as joint abnormalities, forming a clear and coherent main narrative.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Highlighting Key Elements and Mechanisms: Clear delineation of muscle fiber texture and detailed visualization of joint surface inflammation; accurate depiction of the immediate alleviation and calibration effects of a stabilization splint (or specified intervention device) at the cellular level, as well as its microscopic interactions with tissues/dentition.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Compliance with visual and technical specifications: high resolution, true-to-life color reproduction, appropriate microscopic depth of field, and precise focusing; continuous lens focus on lesion areas, stable viewing angles, consistent scale, and avoidance of distracting excessive stylization.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Reflects dynamic processes and temporal narration: demonstrates the evolution of pressure changes and contraction–relaxation cycles, as well as the progression of inflammation from onset to resolution, including comparisons before and after intervention; duration and rhythm comply with task requirements and facilitate expert observation.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Critical Violation Penalty: Absence of cellular-level effects of interventions or failure to highlight core elements such as muscle fiber texture or joint inflammation; presence of non-microscopic perspectives, low resolution, or color distortion impacting medical interpretation.

任务: Microscopic visualization of the right knee joint cartilage affected by arthritis, highlighting the delicate textures of cartilage softening and fibrous tissue, contrasting the glossy surface of bone with the metallic prosthesis. The background features a clean, sterile environment. The imagery is detailed and vivid, suitable for a 5-second microscopic world video for medical education.
具体要求: Create a stunning and educational microscopic world video that initially focuses on the intricate details of total knee arthroplasty, emphasizing unprecedented vivid textures and layers of the human knee joint. The central subject in this microscopic scene is the arthritic right knee joint, showcasing areas affected by cartilage softening. As the scene transitions, viewers are guided through the precise surgical procedure, capturing every step including incision, careful exposure of the joint, meticulous removal of the femoral condyle surface, and preparation of the tibial plateau. Immerse the audience in the accurate placement of the femoral condyle prosthesis while demonstrating the complex articulation of the tibial plateau and patellar prostheses, all set against a sterile surgical environment. Pay special attention to textures, displaying the metallic prosthesis's glossy sheen contrasted with the bone surface, as well as the fibrous, almost organic texture of the excised tissue. Conclude with a comparative postoperative X-ray view, allowing viewers to appreciate the seamless integration of the implant, then gradually zoom out to reveal the sutured incision details, highlighting the texture of the sutured skin and the gentle gloss of the drainage tube. This breathtaking animation is ideal for patient education and content marketing, accompanied by professional annotations to enhance understanding, and tagged with #TotalKneeReplacement, #arthroplasty, and #JointReplacement to ensure accessibility and impact across platforms.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accurate representation of the anatomical structures and spatial relationships of the knee joint: the osseous landmarks, cartilage layers, menisci, and associated soft tissues, as well as the relative positions, orientations, and proportions of the implants, conforming to medical standards.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Pathological and Material Texture Scientific Representation: The cartilage softening and fibrotic texture associated with arthritis, the details of cortical and cancellous bone, as well as the surface reflections and edge transitions of the metal prosthesis, conform to pathological and materials science characteristics.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Surgical procedure and tissue-instrument interaction comply with protocols: the correlation between procedural stages and surgical field layers is accurate; tissue retraction, excision, and irrigation responses conform to physiological and surgical principles, while maintaining sterile operative boundaries.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Scale, dynamics, and temporal consistency: The scale proportions of tissues/devices/implants are appropriate; motion, contact, and fluid behaviors conform to biomechanical and physicochemical principles; temporal progression aligns with authentic physiological and procedural rhythms.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Radiographic and postoperative alignment accuracy: The density, contour, and artifact manifestations at the implant-bone interface on X-rays are consistent with imaging physics, and the component positioning and overall load line relationship exhibit no distortion that contravenes accepted anatomical and biomechanical principles.

rubrics_visual.d1: High image clarity with comprehensive presentation of microscopic details; microstructures and texture layers are distinctly discernible.
rubrics_visual.d2: High realism in material properties and modeling, with clear differentiation among biological tissues, bone, and metallic materials; geometric boundaries and transitions appear natural.
rubrics_visual.d3: Lighting and depth of field are handled naturally; reflections and highlights are appropriately controlled; shadow gradations and volumetric stability are well maintained; focus guidance is effective.
rubrics_visual.d4: Consistent color and contrast, stable white balance, balanced local and global exposure, and clean tonal rendition in macro scenes.
rubrics_visual.d5: Effective control of artifacts and noise, avoiding flicker, sampling noise, compression block artifacts, and camera shake.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Accurately reconstruct the specified microscopic core scenes and objects within the task, emphasizing lesion characteristics, material contrast, and consistent representation of a sterile environment.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Coherently present the specified key dynamic processes, covering the main surgical steps, implant positioning and alignment, as well as narrative closure through comparative views and suture completion.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Complies with technical specifications and perspective requirements, utilizing a microscopic/close-up view, with a total duration controlled at approximately 5 seconds; the image is finely detailed and stable, featuring clear textures and well-defined composition.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Key elements and details are thoroughly conveyed, with accurate differentiation of anatomical structures, instruments, and implants; the contrast between metallic luster and bone/soft tissue textures is clearly demonstrated, complemented by professional annotations and labels to enhance educational accessibility.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Presence of content inconsistent with the task requirements or deviations, including irrelevant elements, incorrect anatomy or procedural steps, non-sterile environments, abrupt changes in perspective, or significant discrepancies in duration.

任务: High-resolution microscopic video showcasing the delicate texture of the human cardiac cell membrane and the microscopic interaction with advanced surgical instruments. The cell membrane exhibits subtle dynamic changes under the influence of the tools, featuring vivid colors and clear details that highlight the medical precision and cellular structural characteristics at the microscopic scale.
具体要求: Create a stunning video capturing the complex and high-resolution microscopic world, focusing on human cardiac cells undergoing revolutionary surgical treatment for heart failure. In this captivating scene, the cardiac cells dynamically interact with state-of-the-art surgical instruments, demonstrating a series of intricate medical procedures aimed at restoring and optimizing cardiac function. The video should vividly display the delicate texture and vivid coloration of the cardiac cell membrane, the detailed mechanisms of the surgical tools, and the smooth motions of biological responses at the microscopic scale, emphasizing the precision and transformative impact of modern medicine in treating heart-related diseases.

rubrics_scientific.d1: The morphology and scale relationship between the cell membrane and surrounding subcellular structures are accurate; membrane thickness and curvature are realistic; the relative positions and proportions of membrane protein clusters, cytoskeleton, mitochondria, and tubular structures are appropriate; characteristic structures of the target cell type are consistently represented.
rubrics_scientific.d2: The relative size, surface characteristics, and material properties of the microsurgical instruments and cells are credible; membrane viscoelastic deformation, adhesion, and friction induced by contact conform to biophysical principles; stress transmission and interaction with the cell cortical cytoskeleton are reasonable, continuous, and do not exceed material limits.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Imaging physics are consistent with the display; spatial resolution, contrast, depth of field, and noise levels correspond appropriately to the microscopy techniques employed. Color mapping aligns with fluorescence/dye channels, and false coloring does not mislead structural identification or signal intensity interpretation.
rubrics_scientific.d4: The time scales of physiological and dynamic processes are reasonable, with membrane tension changes induced by mechanical stimuli coordinating with ion channel activity, Ca2+ transients, and microcontraction sequences; molecular diffusion, Brownian motion of particles, and microenvironmental fluid behavior comply with low Reynolds number conditions and physicochemical laws.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Avoid significant scientific inconsistencies, including distortions in tool-to-cell ratios, the presence of details exceeding physical limits in optical imaging, macroscopic turbulence appearing in microscopic scenes, or the interpretation of decorative coloration as quantitative biological signals.

rubrics_visual.d1: High image clarity, with rich and stable presentation of cell membrane textures, edges, and microstructural details at the microscopic scale.
rubrics_visual.d2: High accuracy in 3D modeling and material realism, with consistent geometric proportions and scale between cells and instruments; surface attributes such as translucency, subsurface scattering, and metallic reflection are faithfully reproduced.
rubrics_visual.d3: Color saturation and contrast are naturally harmonized, white balance remains stable, and the microscopic fluorescence/staining color gamut is accurately reproduced with clear gradations.
rubrics_visual.d4: The animation exhibits smooth motion with temporally coherent microscale contact, deformation, and biological responses, free of jitter, motion blur, or interpolation artifacts.
rubrics_visual.d5: Illumination, shadowing, and depth of field control conform to microscopic imaging characteristics; light ratio and exposure are stable; reflection and volumetric scattering are treated naturally; the focal plane and bokeh transitions are smooth.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Complete implementation of core scenario requirements: direct interaction between human cardiac cell membranes at the microscopic scale and advanced surgical instruments, presenting fine textures and subtle dynamic changes that highlight medical precision and cellular structural characteristics.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Accurately includes and presents key elements and mechanisms: cardiac cells/cell membranes, details and operational mechanisms of surgical instruments, observable biological responses, and related procedural steps.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Compliance with Image and Perspective Technical Specifications: High resolution with clear details; vivid and scientifically accurate coloration; microscope perspective consistent with scale; stable imaging and proper control of illumination and focus.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Comprehensive expression of dynamic processes: continuous tool-cell interactions, clear logical and causal relationships within the process, smooth integration of motion and biological feedback, and well-paced sequencing of shots to facilitate understanding.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Major Deviation Penalty: Presence of macroscopic rather than microscopic perspective, non-human cardiac cells or instruments unrelated to the surgical procedure, absence of core interactions, severe blurring or noise obscuring textures, exaggerated hemorrhage, or depictions inconsistent with medical scenarios.

任务: Under the microscope, focus on the cellular and fibrous microstructures of healthy and degenerated cervical intervertebral disc tissues, capturing subtle intercellular movements, clearly presenting contrasts in color, morphology, and density, highlighting tissue details and microscopic changes, suitable for a 5-second immersive microscopic world video.
具体要求: Create an engaging immersive microscopic world video focusing on cervical spine anatomy and surgical procedures. Begin by showcasing the complex and detailed structures of the cervical spine, emphasizing the intervertebral discs, spinal cord, and surrounding soft tissues. Illustrate age-related progressive changes within the context, including spinal canal stenosis and intervertebral disc material degeneration, as if observed under high magnification. Subsequently, dynamically depict the anterior cervical discectomy and fusion procedure, capturing the precision and complexity of surgical instruments and techniques used to relieve spinal cord compression. Emphasize contrasts such as the delicate fibers of the spinal cord, the smooth surface of healthy intervertebral discs, and the calcified and degenerated tissues. The animation should clearly demonstrate natural differences in tissue color, density, and movement, providing healthcare professionals and patients with a clear understanding of the intricate biomechanics within the cervical spine. The animation is intended to be both educational and engaging for patient education and content marketing in clinical settings.

rubrics_scientific.d1: The spatial relationships and dimensional accuracy of key cervical vertebral anatomical structures—including vertebral bodies, intervertebral discs (nucleus pulposus and annulus fibrosus), vertebral canal, spinal cord, and surrounding soft tissues—conform to established standards in terms of their hierarchical organization, relative thicknesses, and curvatures. The transition from macroscopic to microscopic magnification maintains consistent proportionality.
rubrics_scientific.d2: The microscopic histological features of the intervertebral disc and spinal cord are accurately represented, with cellular morphology of healthy and degenerated states, fiber orientation and density, differences in matrix hydration and viscoelasticity, as well as pathological characteristics such as calcification, fibrosis, and fissures depicted through color, texture, and translucency consistent with authentic patterns.
rubrics_scientific.d3: The dynamics and causality of physiological and pathological processes are coherent; the pathways of age-related degeneration and the formation of spinal canal stenosis, the deformation and rebound induced by mechanical loading, and the micro-movements of cells and fibers all comply with tissue viscoelasticity and physical laws.
rubrics_scientific.d4: The key steps and instrument–tissue interactions in anterior cervical discectomy and fusion demonstrate scientific validity. The decompression effects on the spinal cord and neural structures, the mechanical outcomes of bone/soft tissue resection and implantation, as well as the protection of adjacent tissues conform to clinical guidelines and anatomical boundaries.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Exaggerated or erroneous color, density, scale, or time compression leading to misinterpretation of tissue properties and lesion severity (e.g., representing viscoelastic tissue as free fluid, unconfined cellular drift, or disproportionate scaling shifts) shall be penalized.

rubrics_visual.d1: Image clarity and the rendering of microscopic details are precise, with high resolution of tissue boundaries, cells, and fiber textures, while noise and blurring are effectively controlled.
rubrics_visual.d2: Color and density contrast appear natural and realistic, white balance is accurate, hue and saturation remain stable, and the tonal and density differences between healthy and degenerated tissues are clearly expressed without exaggeration.
rubrics_visual.d3: The animation exhibits smoothness and coherent micro-movements, with temporal sampling being continuous and free of stuttering, motion blur artifacts, or frame skipping. The motion rhythm and scale are consistent and well-matched.
rubrics_visual.d4: High accuracy in 3D modeling and realistic material rendering, clear structural hierarchy, reasonable normal and displacement details, credible surface reflection, subsurface scattering, and viscoelastic behavior.
rubrics_visual.d5: Lighting and depth of field effects are natural; volumetric lighting and soft shadow transitions are smooth; focus control is stable; microscopic optical distortions and chromatic aberrations are well controlled.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Comprehensively present the core anatomical structures and hierarchical relationships of the cervical vertebrae (intervertebral discs, spinal cord, surrounding soft tissues), utilizing high-magnification microscopic views throughout the entire specimen.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Accurately reflects the contrast between healthy and degenerative tissues in terms of color, morphology, and density, encompassing the microscopic dynamics and prominent details of cells and fibers.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Coherently demonstrate the age-related progression leading to spinal canal stenosis and intervertebral disc degeneration, and accurately interpret the key steps and instrument interactions involved in anterior cervical discectomy and fusion, with an emphasis on the decompression mechanism.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Meets the requirement of approximately 5 seconds of immersive duration and pacing; shot composition and information density are clearly distinguishable; expression is easily understood by healthcare professionals and patients.
rubrics_instruction.d5: The perspective, scale, depth of field, and illumination conform to microscopic observation characteristics; the material properties and background settings are realistic and consistent, avoiding macroscopic or stylistic distortions.

任务: 3D microscopic animation focusing on left ventricular cardiomyocytes, dynamically illustrating the morphological differences in myofibrillar structure and vascular microenvironment between healthy and HLHS (Hypoplastic Left Heart Syndrome) cells, with detailed depiction of cellular-level anatomy and blood flow dynamics, featuring realistic colors and textures, suitable for a 5-second scientific educational video.
具体要求: Create a captivating microscopic world video that deeply explores the cellular anatomy of the human heart, with an emphasis on the complexity of Hypoplastic Left Heart Syndrome (HLHS). This scene should feature 3D animation showcasing the internal structure and dynamic blood flow of a healthy heart, contrasted sharply with the subtle alterations caused by HLHS congenital defects. The video must vividly depict the anatomical layers of the heart, including the endocardium, myocardium, and epicardium, highlighting their unique textures and emphasizing the significant structural and functional differences between a normal heart and one affected by HLHS. Expert-level visualization of microcellular components such as myofibrils, blood vessels, and cells is essential for delivering an accurate and engaging educational visual experience. Additionally, the video should explain common HLHS treatment protocols and surgical interventions, underscoring the precision of surgical instruments and the delicate nature of cardiovascular procedures. Include smooth transitions guiding viewers seamlessly from one microscopic detail to another, ensuring clarity and immersion. The animation should leverage realistic color gradients, motion effects, and sound design to enhance the visual narrative, aiming to improve health literacy and patient education among healthcare professionals, patients, and authorized entities. This compelling scientific visualization, curated by a hospital for educational programs and content marketing, reflects Nucleus Medical Media's expertise in producing comprehensive medical animations for the healthcare industry.

rubrics_scientific.d1: The hierarchical representation of left ventricular myocardial fiber orientation and density is accurate. The observed trends of fiber disarray in the comparison between healthy controls and HLHS, as well as differences in cavity hypoplasia, wall thickness alterations, and endocardial elastin proliferation, are consistent with consensus in the literature.
rubrics_scientific.d2: The microvascular network structure and capillary hemodynamic performance are scientifically credible, with laminar flow characteristics, velocity gradients, red blood cell deformation and single-file passage, as well as flow distribution at bifurcations, all consistent with physiological scales.
rubrics_scientific.d3: The spatial positional relationships and thickness ratios among the endocardium, myocardium, and epicardium are accurate; the tissue texture and characteristics of the boundaries between each layer are clear, and consistent with structural differences observed between healthy and HLHS conditions.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Good spatial and temporal consistency: The size ratios among cells, myofibrils/sarcomeres, erythrocytes, and microvessels, as well as motion velocities and time constants, remain scientifically coherent during camera switching and zoom transitions.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Occurrence of cross-scale mismatches and misleading visual encoding (mixing macroscopic surgical instruments with cellular-level scenes resulting in scale distortion, or implying non-existent structures or lesions through color/texture effects)

rubrics_visual.d1: High image clarity and faithful preservation of microscopic details, with clear delineation of cell boundaries, muscle fiber textures, and substructural layers; resolution and sharpness remain stable during zooming and close-up views.
rubrics_visual.d2: Lighting and color rendering are natural and realistic; volumetric light, subsurface scattering, and translucency of semi-transparent tissues are appropriately controlled; color saturation and contrast are balanced; depth of field and focal guidance effectively emphasize key microstructures.
rubrics_visual.d3: Animation is smooth and temporally coherent; microfluidic trajectories are continuous, and the velocity field is smooth; tissue deformation and camera motion transitions are seamless without abrupt changes; the guidance path is clearly defined.
rubrics_visual.d4: High precision in 3D modeling with consistent material properties; microstructural scale proportions are reasonable; topology and normals are error-free; layered structural boundaries are well-defined and exhibit texture consistent with geometry.
rubrics_visual.d5: Presence of visual artifacts such as aliasing, noise, compression blocks, color banding, shadow flickering, or reflection jitter, with motion blur and excessive depth of field causing information occlusion.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Complete focus on the left ventricular cardiomyocyte level, clearly contrasting the morphological and functional differences in myofibrillar architecture and vascular microenvironment between healthy and HLHS conditions, while presenting dynamic blood flow.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Accurately present the anatomical layers and texture characteristics of the endocardium, myocardium, and epicardium, encompassing key microscopic elements (myofibers, blood vessels, and cells) while maintaining scale consistency.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Effectively integrate popular science presentations of common treatments and surgical interventions for HLHS, reflecting the precision of surgical instruments and techniques, thereby enhancing educational objectives without compromising the core microscopic comparison.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Compliance with technical and presentation standards: three-dimensional microscopic perspective, realistic colors and materials, smooth camera movements and information guidance, coordinated motion and sound design, and adherence to prescribed duration and pacing requirements.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Avoidance of instruction deviation and medical inaccuracies: omission of key comparisons, anatomical or pathological misdirections, shift from microscopic to predominantly macroscopic focus, inconsistency between scale and annotation, etc.

任务: From a microscopic perspective, the soft, translucent fibrous tissue of abdominal adhesions forms a striking contrast with the smooth and resilient surface of the intestinal wall. Under the operating room lighting, laparoscopic surgical instruments gently touch and separate the adhesions, dynamically showcasing the fibrous texture and tactile qualities, highlighting the microscopic anatomical aesthetics.
具体要求: Create a breathtaking microscopic world video that closely focuses on the core theme of abdominal adhesions, providing an engaging and educational journey exploring this complex phenomenon. The video should vividly depict the internal abdominal environment where adhesions form, illustrating potential complications such as obstruction, twisting, and displacement in the small intestine region. Capture the dynamic process of laparoscopic surgery in detail, demonstrating how surgeons skillfully navigate and utilize advanced laparoscopic instruments to separate these adhesions. Every frame must be rich in astonishing detail and texture, emphasizing the fibrous nature of the adhesions, the smooth and resilient surface of the intestinal wall, and the precision of the surgical tools. 任务: From a microscopic perspective, the needle precisely penetrates the vaginal incision, meticulously demonstrating the dynamic interactions between the transobturator tape (TOT) woven fibers and the surrounding biological tissue cells, highlighting the fiber texture and tissue morphology with scientific accuracy and focused imagery, suitable for a 5-second microscopic world video.
具体要求: Produce a stunning microscopic world video that deeply explores the complexity of the transobturator tape (TOT) surgical procedure, emphasizing the detailed surgical steps addressing stress urinary incontinence. Showcase the moment a skilled surgeon initiates the operation by making small incisions in the patient's groin and vagina, precisely capturing the needle insertion through the vaginal incision and its careful passage through the body, followed by its emergence from the groin incision. Highlight the meticulous placement of the tape, vividly illustrating the needle-guided path of the sling and the subsequent tension adjustment behind the urethra to achieve optimal support. Present the microscopic structure of the tape in vivid detail, demonstrating the woven fibers and their interactions with surrounding biological tissues. At the conclusion of the surgery, depict the suturing of the vaginal incision and the application of skin adhesive or sutures at the groin incision, capturing the perfect integration of the tape with the progressively forming scar tissue for secure fixation. Incorporate textures reflecting the complex interweaving of muscles, tissues, and surgical materials, capturing the transformative journey from initial incision to final healing stages. The video should be richly detailed, providing viewers with an unparalleled microscopic exploration of this medical procedure, perfectly balancing scientific accuracy with visual brilliance, serving as a valuable resource for medical, academic, and library professionals seeking to deepen their understanding of this critical surgical intervention.

The mesh is positioned posterior to the mid-urethra without any distortion.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Consistency in organizational hierarchy and scale proportion: the relative dimensions of mesh belt fiber diameter to pore size, cells to collagen bundles, and capillaries to muscle fibers are appropriate; variations in magnification maintain spatial continuity and morphological integrity.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Biomechanical interaction fidelity: Tissue deformation, rebound, and stress distribution induced by needle and mesh traction, compression, and shear conform to physiological mechanics. The urethral support mechanism is characterized by dynamic tension modulation rather than sustained excessive compressive occlusion.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Organizational response and healing time-course science: immediate events (hemorrhage, exudation, mechanical displacement) and delayed events (inflammatory cell recruitment, fibroblast proliferation, collagen deposition, scar maturation, and tissue ingrowth) are presented in phased stages, with temporal compression preserving causal sequence and spatial constraints.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Accurate characterization of material properties and tissue integration: The pore size, compliance, and surface texture of the polypropylene monofilament woven mesh are appropriate, allowing vascular and connective tissue ingrowth, without exhibiting unreasonable dissolution, absorption, or instantaneous “fusion” effects.

任务: Highly realistic microscopic video depicting the dynamic binding of chemotherapy drug molecules to receptors on a single ovarian cancer cell, with detailed and clear cell surface textures. The moment of interaction between the molecules and the cell membrane is prominently highlighted. The background features a simplified ovarian cancer cellular microenvironment, with a vivid color contrast between healthy cells and cancer cells. The video dynamically presents the precise attachment of drug molecules and local changes in the cell membrane, lasting approximately 5 seconds.
具体要求: Create a captivating and highly realistic video exploring the cellular-level aspects of ovarian cancer treatment within the microscopic world, vividly illustrating the complex interactions and processes occurring inside the human body. Begin with a central focus on a cluster of abnormal, rapidly dividing ovarian cancer cells in the ovary, visually detailing their proliferation and invasion into surrounding healthy ovarian tissue. As the scene progresses, depict the dynamic and intricate processes of medical interventions such as chemotherapy and targeted therapy, emphasizing their effects on cancer cells. Capture the moment when chemotherapy drug molecules enter the bloodstream as molecular structures and precisely target cancer cells, visualizing the remarkable chemical interactions and reactions occurring within the cytoplasm and nucleus. Simultaneously, use advanced 3D animation to demonstrate the mechanism of targeted therapy, showing how these specialized drugs bind to cancer cell receptors, inhibiting abnormal cell division and growth, and revealing the resulting cellular changes. Pay close attention to texture details, showcasing the distinct surfaces of cancer cells, the contrast between healthy and malignant cell membranes, and the dynamic, complex textures of the intracellular environment, including organelles such as mitochondria and endoplasmic reticulum. Employ a vivid color palette to differentiate cancerous and healthy cells, enhancing visual clarity and impact. Integrate molecular-level details to illustrate cellular processes, DNA repair mechanisms, and drug interactions, providing an immersive educational experience designed to enhance patient engagement and educational content marketing.

rubrics_scientific.d1: The receptor-ligand binding and interaction mechanism with the cell membrane conform to molecular biology and physical chemistry principles, embodying diffusion-driven contact, specific and reversible binding, and reasonable dynamics of local membrane remodeling or receptor clustering, while avoiding transmembrane instantaneous migration and exaggerated nonspecific adhesion.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Scale and Time Series Rationality: The size proportions and orders of magnitude of molecules, receptors, cells, and organelles are accurate; the sequence and rate orders of magnitude of processes such as diffusion, binding, and endocytosis conform to established kinetics; the pacing of events within a 5-second frame does not violate real-time scales.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Accurate differentiation and correct presentation of causal pathways between chemotherapy and targeted therapy mechanisms: Chemotherapy corresponds to intracellular effects such as DNA damage and cell cycle arrest; targeted agents inhibit abnormal proliferation by acting on membrane receptors or downstream signaling nodes, avoiding conflation of the two mechanistic categories.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Accurate morphological and ultrastructural representation of ovarian cancer cells compared to healthy cells: correct visualization of nucleus-to-cytoplasm ratio and nuclear atypia, differences in membrane texture/microvilli, cell polarity, and the morphology and distribution of organelles (mitochondria, endoplasmic reticulum); spatial relationships at the tissue hierarchy level are appropriately maintained.
rubrics_scientific.d5: The microenvironment and molecular transport processes conform to physiological and fluid/thermodynamic principles: the pathways from blood/interstitium to tumor cells, concentration gradients, restricted diffusion, matrix and vascular permeability, as well as shear and viscous effects, are represented plausibly, avoiding unrestricted membrane permeation or violations of physical laws.

任务: Microscopic close-up of the arterial endothelium, with blood flow in the background, showing macrophages dynamically engulfing and encapsulating cholesterol particles. The cell surface textures and motility details are clearly depicted, vividly illustrating the early cellular processes of atherosclerosis.
具体要求: Create a stunning and immersive microscopic world video that delves into the complex mechanisms of myocardial infarction, focusing on the core theme of coronary artery occlusion caused by severe atherosclerosis. The scene begins with a close-up view of the arterial endothelium, depicting the early stages of chronic inflammation and leukocyte infiltration into the damaged area. Engage the audience by demonstrating the dynamic transformation of these cells into macrophages that actively phagocytose cholesterol particles. As the narrative progresses, vividly portray how these macrophages convert into foam cells, becoming trapped and contributing to the progressively enlarging plaque on the arterial wall. Emphasize the intricate textures and movements involved in this cellular transformation, highlighting the relentless growth of the plaque over years, culminating in a dramatic rupture of the vessel wall. Capture the chaotic release of plaque contents into the bloodstream, resulting in severe obstruction of the left anterior descending coronary artery (LAD), which supplies blood to the left ventricle. The video concludes with an external view of the heart, marking a distinct dark region symbolizing ventricular wall necrosis, providing a powerful visual narrative of the pathophysiology of myocardial infarction. This keyword-focused video will vividly present the complex processes of atherosclerosis and myocardial infarction through breathtaking microscopic phenomena to captivate the audience.

rubrics_scientific.d1: The morphology and size scale ratios of cells and particles are consistent with physiological ranges (the relative size and morphology of endothelial cells, erythrocytes/leukocytes, macrophages, platelets, LDL/cholesterol particles, and vascular wall thickness are appropriate and realistic).
rubrics_scientific.d2: Correct causality and temporal sequence of critical physiological processes in atherosclerosis (endothelial dysfunction and increased permeability → leukocyte adhesion and infiltration → differentiation into macrophages and lipid phagocytosis → foam cell formation → progressive plaque expansion)
rubrics_scientific.d3: Accurate depiction of plaque microstructure and rupture-thrombosis mechanisms (clear roles of fibrous cap and lipid core, smooth muscle cells and collagen; platelet aggregation and fibrin coagulation post-rupture leading to acute luminal obstruction).
rubrics_scientific.d4: Hemodynamics and microscale motions conform to physicochemical principles (including variations in flow velocity and shear stress at stenotic sites, laminar-to-turbulent transition dynamics, particle diffusion and Brownian motion, as well as cell migration and phagocytosis rates within physiological ranges).
rubrics_scientific.d5: The correspondence between coronary blood supply anatomy and myocardial injury is accurate (the infarct location matches the LAD perfusion territory, and necrotic manifestations correspond to the ischemic timeline); any exaggerated scale or anatomically/physiologically impossible structures or processes are immediately classified as scientific errors.

rubrics_visual.d4: Animation smoothness and realistic motion physics; coherent trajectories of particles and cells; velocity and interaction responses consistent with microfluidic environments; smooth camera movements and editing rhythm.
rubrics_visual.d5: Color reproduction and contrast are natural, with clear separation of tonal layers and moderate saturation; the overall color tone is unified, avoiding excessive filtering and unwanted glare.

任务: Instantaneous interactions between head and neck squamous cell carcinoma cells and healthy cells within the oral microenvironment from a microscopic perspective, focusing on the texture and molecular structure of the cancer cell membrane, showcasing subtle changes in cellular morphology and invasion dynamics, with vivid colors, high contrast, and high-definition details, suitable for a 5-second short video.
具体要求: Produce a stunning microscopic world video that exquisitely depicts the cellular-level interactions of squamous cell carcinoma, focusing on the complex microenvironment of head and neck cancer. The scenes should illustrate the dynamic and immersive exploration of cancer cells forming and proliferating within the environments of the sinuses, nose, oral cavity, throat, larynx (vocal cords), and salivary glands. Observe the interactions between malignant and healthy cells, demonstrating cancer progression with microscopic precision. The video should capture transitions in treatment modalities, such as surgical excision of infected tissue, cellular effects of radiotherapy, chemical reactions induced by chemotherapy, as well as receptor-targeting processes of targeted therapy and immunotherapy—all occurring within this microscopic domain. Emphasize the texture of the cell membrane, complex molecular structures, and subtle morphological changes induced by treatments, rendered with photorealistic accuracy to highlight every detail, providing an educational and visually captivating experience. Ensure each frame is adorned with vivid color gradients and high contrast to distinguish cellular entities, showcasing the critical and intense battles at the microscopic level designed for educational purposes.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accuracy of microanatomy and scale relationships: clear delineation of the mucosal epithelium—basement membrane—lamina propria/stroma layers in the head and neck region, with proportional scaling of cell diameter, intercellular spaces, and extracellular matrix fibers consistent with the microenvironment of the oral cavity, nasopharynx, laryngopharynx, and salivary glands.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Accurate representation of the morphology and invasive dynamics of squamous cell carcinoma: features of squamous differentiation, alterations in cell polarity and adhesion, basement membrane disruption and patterns of stromal infiltration, as well as the formation of leading-edge pseudopodia and processes of extracellular matrix remodeling are scientifically portrayed.
rubrics_scientific.d3: The cell membrane texture and molecular level conform to biophysical and biochemical principles: the scale and density of the membrane bilayer and membrane proteins/receptors are appropriate; receptor-ligand binding, lateral diffusion, endocytosis/exocytosis, and signal transduction follow Brownian motion and confined diffusion without exhibiting supra-scale or transiently unrealistic aggregation.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Accurate expression of the cellular-level effects of therapeutic mechanisms: surgery involves mechanical excision and peripheral tissue responses; radiotherapy induces delayed apoptosis or mitotic death resulting from DNA damage and reactive oxygen species; chemotherapy acts on cell cycle or metabolic targets rather than causing immediate lysis; targeted and immunotherapies demonstrate receptor-specific binding, signal blockade, or immune cell-mediated cytotoxicity.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Scientific Consistency of Temporal and Visual Encoding: Short-term temporal compression preserves event causality and sequential order; rates of cell migration and membrane fluctuations remain within physiologically reasonable ranges; color/fluorescence encoding is temporally consistent and does not imply nonexistent biological entities.

任务: Under a high-definition microscopic perspective, a surgical drainage tube slowly meanders out from a skin incision. The semi-transparent tube material contrasts delicately with the multilayered structure of the skin. Clear fluid flows within the tube, highlighting microscopic details. The background features a clean, sterile environment, focusing on the dynamic interaction between the postoperative drainage tube, the skin, and the fluid.
具体要求: Create a captivating high-definition microscopic video showcasing the complexity of surgical drainage tubes used in postoperative care. The scene should focus on the interaction between the surgical drainage tube and the skin surface, emphasizing the detailed process of fluid discharge and drainage that helps prevent infection and promotes healing. Capture vivid microscopic details as the drainage tube gently winds out from the incision, highlighting the fine texture and semi-transparency of the tube material in contrast with the multilayered structure of the human epidermis. Illuminate the fluid flow within the tube, demonstrating subtle and vivid motion visuals—from the interaction of clear fluid with the semi-permeable membrane to the delicate loosening of clots under gentle pressure. The complex suction mechanism of the bulb is in operation, focusing on compression and expansion, precisely extracting microscopic particles. The camera focuses on the movement of an alcohol wipe sliding along the tube, highlighting the contrast between its fibrous texture and the smooth surface of the drainage tube. Seamlessly emphasize each procedural step, capturing everything with clear detail—from the initial handwashing ritual to the detailed visualization of fluid measurement and recording. The background maintains the sterile environment’s tonal atmosphere, enhancing the focus on minute interactions and providing a stunning in-depth insight into the hidden work of the surgical drainage tube during postoperative recovery, reasserting the significance of this medical marvel.

rubrics_scientific.d1: The spatial relationship and scale proportion between the multilaminar skin structure and the drainage tube at the incision site are accurate, demonstrating clear contrast among the stratum corneum, epidermis, dermis, and subcutaneous tissue layers, as well as a reasonable matching between the tube diameter and tissue thickness.
rubrics_scientific.d2: The drainage system mechanism and fluid dynamics performance are scientifically sound, with the compression-rebound behavior of the negative pressure balloon consistent over time with the laminar flow within the tube, migration of bubbles and particulates/clots, prevention of backflow, and the temporal sequences of flow velocity–pressure differential–tube diameter relationships.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Aseptic technique and care procedures are performed in accordance with standards, including hand hygiene, maintenance of sterile contact interfaces, disinfection wiping from clean to contaminated areas, securement and sequencing of tubing replacement, and preservation of system integrity.
rubrics_scientific.d4: The material and optical properties are rendered realistically, including the translucent refraction and scattering of the silicone tubing, surface wettability, the interaction between alcohol wipe fibers and liquid film, as well as the appropriate optical contrast and textural details across skin layers.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Points Deduction for Major Scientific Deviations: Depicting the drainage tube as a semipermeable membrane or an open system exchanging with the external environment; unreasonable leakage through the tube wall; flow rate inconsistent with physical principles relating to negative pressure and tube diameter; body fluid color and viscosity significantly deviating from postoperative normative ranges; nursing procedures causing cross-contamination.

rubrics_instruction.d3: Compliance with Technical and Visual Specifications: Microscopic-level detail and high-definition imaging quality, stable focus with appropriate depth of field, composition that highlights the subject, and duration and pacing that encompass key stages from preparation through operation to completion.

任务: 3D animated microscopic perspective focusing on the molecular-level structure and dynamic displacement of the soft tissue disc within the temporomandibular joint (TMJ), meticulously depicting the contact, texture, and morphological changes between the disc and the joint bones, with high-definition textures emphasizing the disc's hinge sliding function and movement mechanism, suitable for medical microscopic world education.
具体要求: Create an engaging and educational video that delves into the microscopic world of temporomandibular joint (TMJ) disorders. The main subject of this stunning animation is the complex interaction between the mandible, temporal bone, and the soft pad-like disc facilitating joint movement. Capture dynamic scenes of TMJ opening and closing, showcasing its unique hinge and sliding capabilities, with real-time presentation of muscle spasms or disc displacement vividly illustrating the onset of TMJ disorders. Focus on remarkable details such as the texture of the soft tissue disc, the smoothness of the mandibular condyle, and the intricate muscle fibers controlling jaw motion. Highlight pathological changes including joint degeneration caused by arthritis damage or inflammation, as well as bruxism exacerbating the condition. Utilize high-definition textures to depict joint clicking and popping sounds, the close proximity to the ear, and how inflammation leads to dental misalignment, visually explaining these complex processes. Ensure the audience clearly understands the correlation between TMJ pain and referred symptoms such as headaches by integrating close-up views of localized pain points and muscle tension. This video should employ captivating 3D animation techniques to provide a molecular-level perspective, making it highly suitable for healthcare professionals or students seeking a comprehensive understanding of TMJ disorders.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accuracy of key joint structures and scale relationships: the morphology, thickness, and contact area proportions of soft tissue discs, mandibular condyles, and temporal bone articular surfaces conform to anatomical and physiological scales.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Correctness of kinematics and contact mechanics: the sequential phase transition from hinge to sliding, coordinated displacement among condyle, disc, and fossa, variations in joint space, and synovial lubrication and friction behavior conform to physiological principles.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Multiscale structure-function mapping is appropriate: the influence of collagen and elastin fiber orientation, cross-linking, and hydration at the molecular/fibrillar hierarchy on macroscopic elastic and viscoelastic behavior is scientifically demonstrated, with consistent temporal and spatial scale translation.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Pathophysiological correlation with symptoms: The etiological roles of disc displacement, inflammation and degeneration, and overload/bruxism in tissue damage and joint sounds are accurately presented and consistent with the causal chain involving pain radiation, muscle tension, and occlusal alterations.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Points Deducted for Scientific Inaccuracies: exaggeration of elasticity and deformation, ossification rubberization, molecular visualization exceeding reasonable resolution, unsupported turbulent fluid dynamics, sound timing or intensity inconsistent with mechanical events, spatial displacement between joints and periauricular regions.

任务: From a microscopic perspective, demonstrate the initial contact and invasion between ovarian cancer cells and adjacent healthy cells, with partial abnormal changes appearing in the membranes of healthy cells, which are gradually invaded by cancer cells. The cell membranes are finely detailed and clear, subcellular structures are visible, color contrast is vivid, motion is smooth, and the imagery is realistic, with a duration of approximately 5 seconds.
具体要求: Produce a stunning video that deeply explores the complex microscopic world of the human ovary, focusing primarily on the key cellular structures involved in ovarian cancer progression. The scene captures the dynamic and detailed process of ovarian cancer, vividly presenting the transformation of healthy ovarian cells into malignant cells with photorealistic clarity. As the video unfolds, it illustrates various stages of cancer development, beginning with atypical hyperplasia and progressing through different cancer stages, while emphasizing the intricate cellular processes involved. This immersive animation highlights critical details, including the texture of cell membranes, cancer cell proliferation, and invasion of healthy tissue, providing an educational insight into the complexity of cancer biology. The video emphasizes anatomical detail and texture with remarkable precision, using vibrant colors and sharp contrasts to vividly depict cellular changes and tumor growth. The final segment of the animation includes video imagery of common treatment mechanisms, such as chemotherapy targeting cancer cells, visually explained at the subcellular level. With accuracy and attention to detail, this video aims not only to educate patients but also serves as a comprehensive visual tool for healthcare professionals and content creators, enhancing patient education and advocacy through engaging visual storytelling.

rubrics_scientific.d2: The processes of contact, adhesion, invasion, and tissue penetration between cancer cells and adjacent healthy cells conform to the mechanisms of tumor biology, with adhesion molecules mediating the contact, cytoskeletal remodeling, and extracellular matrix degradation in a causally and spatially consistent sequence.
rubrics_scientific.d3: The staged expression of the carcinogenic progression is scientifically rational, with the sequential and scale-matched characterization of phase-specific features, proliferative kinetics, and microenvironmental alterations from atypical hyperplasia to invasion.
rubrics_scientific.d4: The dynamics at the molecular and cellular levels comply with the principles of physical chemistry and biomechanics; molecular diffusion and receptor binding, membrane fluidity and mechanical deformation, as well as the velocity and trajectory of cell migration coupled with fluid flow, are consistent and reasonable.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Exaggerated color coding, textures, or special effects that lead to misinterpretation of structure or mechanisms, or depict phenomena violating conservation laws, exhibiting superphysical motion, or displaying instantaneous healing beyond physiological capabilities.

任务: From a microscopic perspective, the transparent and flexible cervical cap contraceptive device material exhibits a delicate microporous structure, forming a sharp contrast with the surrounding cervical tissue cellular textures. Subtle light reflections highlight the material's impermeability and sense of scientific innovation, with the imagery rendered in high resolution, focusing on microscopic details.
具体要求: Produce a stunning microscopic world video centered on the cervical cap contraceptive device, showcasing its intricate details. The scene should unfold to demonstrate the complex process of correctly inserting and removing the cervical cap, emphasizing smooth and precise movements that ensure proper placement on the cervix. The animation should continue with graphical illustrations of the cervical cap’s effectiveness in preventing sperm from entering the uterus, thereby avoiding pregnancy. The narration should be textured—focusing on capturing the cervical cap’s smooth, flexible material along with its fine edges and contours, while also displaying the soft, natural textures of the surrounding cervical tissue. The visuals must include a clear contrast between the synthetic material of the cervical cap and the organic structure of biological cells, providing a vivid and informative visual experience. Emphasize the cervical cap’s transparency and impermeability, with subtle light reflections and visible micropores conveying a sense of advanced scientific innovation. This high-resolution, professional video aims to educate viewers, serving both content marketing and patient education purposes by offering a compelling and informative insight into a modern contraceptive method.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accuracy of anatomical structure and placement relationship: The outer edge of the cervical cap closely adheres to and covers the external os of the cervix, with the cap’s position and orientation conforming to the anatomical layers of the cervix; the surrounding squamocolumnar epithelial texture layers are displayed credibly, avoiding misrepresentation of insertion into the endocervical canal or insufficient coverage.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Scale and Proportion Rationality: The dimensional relationships among cervical epithelial cells, cervical mucus reticular structures, sperm size and trajectories, as well as the scale of material micropores/surface textures correspond appropriately in order of magnitude (sperm heads at the micron scale, cells at the tens of microns scale, surface microtextures ranging from submicron to micron scale and consisting of non-through pores); the device thickness and bending radius are proportionate to actual specifications.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Correct expression of the barrier mechanism and physiological processes: Mechanical obstruction is formed through tight sealing at the external cervical os, with sperm not depicted as penetrating the material or passing via “pore filtration”; sperm motility within the mucus is constrained by viscosity and flow fields, resulting in realistic velocities and trajectories. After blockage, sperm are retained on the outer side of the cap or cleared by mucus, without implying comprehensive impermeability to all pathogens.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Correct steps and kinetics in the insertion and removal process: demonstrating the sequence of folding/pinching—positioning—deployment—seal inspection—seal release—extraction; applying force smoothly with appropriate points, angles, and speed; ensuring contact between the rim and dome forms a seal without excessive tissue compression, and avoiding misleading actions that cause traction on the cervical tissue.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Mechanical and optical properties consistent with physical characteristics: The transparent, flexible elastomer undergoes continuous deformation and recovery under applied stress, with smooth edges; surface microtextures induce reflection/scattering matched to their scale, without exhibiting specular highlights or transparency that violate the material’s refractive index and energy conservation; wetting behavior and contact angle at the mucus/tissue interface are physically reasonable.

rubrics_visual.d2: The physical texture of transparent and flexible materials is realistic, with precise control of refraction, reflection, and specular highlights, and a credible representation of microscopic impermeability.
rubrics_visual.d3: High precision in 3D modeling and material texturing, accurate representation of microporous structures and biological tissue textures, consistent scale, and clean topology.
rubrics_visual.d4: The control of lighting and depth of field is natural; color and contrast are consistent and realistic; artifacts and color banding are well suppressed in close-up environments.

任务: Microscopic close-up of breast tissue during the slow compression moment by a dedicated compression paddle, dynamically showcasing the detailed textures and structures of glands, ducts, connective fibers, adipose layers, and blood vessels in slow motion. The interplay of light and shadow enhances depth perception, with realistic coloration, clearly revealing tissue density and subtle fluidity, authentically simulating the microscopic anatomical features observed in mammographic imaging of the breast.
具体要求: Produce a breathtaking microscopic world video that presents the complex anatomical structures of breast tissue during mammographic examination, with a focus on the skilled process of compression and X-ray imaging. The scene depicts a close-up view of breast tissue being compressed by a dedicated paddle, capturing the dynamic interactions among glandular tissue, ducts, adipose tissue, connective fibers, and blood vessels. The motion unfolds in slow motion to highlight the compression and expansion phases, emphasizing changes in tissue density and structure influenced by the X-ray imaging process. Highlight the highly detailed textures of each component: the fibrous network of connective tissue, the fine branching of ducts, the translucent adipose layer, and the intricate vascular patterns formed by blood vessels. The visual interplay of light and shadow enhances depth perception, while the subtle fluidity within the tissue offers a captivating glimpse into the cellular world. Each frame ensures realistic coloration and shading effects, simulating the true appearance of the human breast under microscopic magnification, thereby enhancing the educational value of the depiction for patient awareness and medical content marketing. Employ exquisite transitions and smooth panning techniques to simulate an exploratory camera traversing this vital biological landscape, emphasizing key aspects of breast tissue anatomy and the critical role of mammography in cancer detection.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accurate spatial topology and hierarchical relationships of key breast structures: the glandular tissue and ducts exhibit a tree-like radial branching pattern oriented toward the nipple; connective fibers form supporting bundles continuous with the skin and deep fascia; the adipose layer is appropriately enveloping and filling; vascular pathways and branching are clearly distinguished from the ducts.
rubrics_scientific.d2: X-ray imaging physical consistency achieved: image contrast originates from differences in X-ray attenuation among various tissues and thickness variations caused by compression; projection geometry and stacking relationships are scientifically accurate; surface color and shading are provided solely for illustration and do not replace the corresponding attenuation contrast.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Mechanical response of the tissue during compression is appropriate: characterized by reversible elastic and viscoelastic deformation, restricted lateral slip and rearrangement, morphological changes of blood vessels and catheters under compression with maintained continuity, and smooth temporal sequences during both compression and release phases.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Scale hierarchy and relative size proportions are scientifically accurate: the relative thickness and diameter hierarchies of the skin, adipose tissue, glands, ducts, blood vessels, and connective fibers are appropriate; capillaries are smaller in diameter than small ducts; the size comparison between glandular lobules and adipose compartments is appropriate; and local-to-global proportions are consistent.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Scientific Inaccuracy Penalty: Penalization for depicting the tissue as exhibiting large-scale fluid surges or fragmentation and regeneration, substituting X-ray contrast with colored surface highlights, exaggerating blood flow turbulence, or confusing the function and orientation of catheters with those of blood vessels.

rubrics_visual.d1: High image clarity and superior resolution of microscopic details, with well-defined hierarchical structural boundaries; details are faithfully preserved without excessive sharpening, aliasing artifacts, or compression noise.
rubrics_visual.d2: Material and volume rendering are realistic; subsurface scattering of semi-translucent soft tissues and volumetric absorption/scattering are natural; shading and density gradients transition smoothly due to thickness variations.
rubrics_visual.d3: Consistency in lighting and imaging style, with uniform light source direction and intensity; shadows and contact shadows are appropriately rendered; volumetric lighting and occlusion enhance depth perception; depth of field and macro focus blur are well-controlled; color/false color mapping and contrast appear natural without color bias.
rubrics_visual.d4: Deformations and fluidity in slow motion are coherent and stable, with smooth transitions between compression and rebound phases, free from jitter, ghosting, texture flickering, or crawling artifacts.
rubrics_visual.d5: Camera movement and composition demonstrate professionalism, with exploratory panning and smooth transitions; key focal points effectively guide hierarchical layers, avoiding clipping and unnatural overlaps; image edges are free from distortion, moiré patterns, or compression artifacts.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Fully present the micro-compression core scenario and process within the context of mammographic examination, demonstrating the continuity of the dedicated compression paddle mechanism and the imaging environment.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Accurately includes and clearly depicts key anatomical elements and textural layers (glands, ducts, connective fibers, adipose layer, blood vessels), maintaining structural relationships and spatial hierarchy.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Highlight dynamic variations and phasic patterns (compression and extension) in slow-motion sequences, as well as changes in organizational density and microscale fluidity, ensuring the process is coherent and traceable.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Interplay of light and shadow and realistic color rendering enhance the sense of depth; the overall style corresponds with the microanatomical features observed under X-ray examination; technical specifications such as duration compliance, stable close-up perspectives, and smooth camera panning and transitions are met.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Avoid introducing irrelevant elements or erroneous procedures; excessive special effects and unrealistic rendering that diminish medical realism; camera shake or viewpoint deviation from microscopic close-up.

任务: Close-up of the cellular structures on the inner wall of the colon under a microscope, juxtaposing healthy smooth tissue with granular suspicious plaques, showcasing subtle dynamic interactions between cells, with a faintly visible vascular network, rich textures and colors, and lighting that accentuates cellular morphology and depth, creating an immersive microscopic medical environment.
具体要求: Produce an engaging video set in the microscopic world, primarily depicting the complex cellular architecture of the colon mucosa observed during colonoscopy. The scene begins with the endoscope gently navigating through the tubular sections of the intestine, capturing detailed placement of the instrument. The observing camera meticulously scans the textured surface of the colon lining, revealing dynamic interactions between the endoscope and the surrounding cellular environment. Throughout the examination, the tension increases with the precise biopsy procedures performed on benign and malignant tissues. The perspective then rises above the scene to witness the polypectomy, accurately removing polyps, with each segment highlighting the inherent granular and fibrous structural details and rich coloration. The video should emphasize distinct textures, such as the smooth, glossy surface of healthy tissue, irregular granular plaques in suspicious areas, and the translucent edges of polyps contrasted against the pulsating vascular network background. Include microscopic close-ups that highlight cellular diversity and motility at this scale, crafting a visual narrative that deeply immerses the audience in the microscopic universe of the lower gastrointestinal tract. Use lighting and shadows to emphasize the depth and complexity of these medical phenomena, creating a stunning and educational video spectacle.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accuracy of organizational hierarchy and anatomical positional relationships (correct spatial arrangement and continuity among the epithelial layer, basement tissue, and microvascular network)
rubrics_scientific.d2: Cell morphology, density, and scale proportion conform to biological parameters, with magnification and depth of field exhibiting consistency.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Cellular dynamics and microcirculation conform to physiological patterns, with appropriate ranges of movement, interactions consistent with flow velocity, and pulsatile timing.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Scientific differentiation of imaging characteristics between healthy and suspicious lesion tissues (surface texture, edge morphology, and chromatic variations conforming to pathological principles)
rubrics_scientific.d5: Causal consistency between external disturbances or instrument–tissue interactions and the resulting deformation, rebound, hemorrhage, and local responses induced by contact and manipulation.
