任务: Dynamic changes of early-stage cervical cancer cells within the cellular stromal environment under a high-definition microscopic perspective, meticulously depicting the surface texture, structural deformation of cancer cells, and their microscopic interactions with healthy tissue cells. The visuals are richly detailed, rendered in ultra-realistic high definition, suitable for a 5-second microscopic world video for medical education and training.
具体要求: Create a stunning microscopic world video focusing on the complex cellular landscape of cervical cancer staging, illustrating the precise progression of the disease at the microscopic level. The main theme is the microscopic imagery of cervical cancer cells, demonstrating how their structure and interactions evolve through each stage, from stage 0 to stage IVAB, highlighting metastasis as a critical process. The scenes depict the dynamic changes and dissemination of cancer cells, emphasizing their gradual infiltration into surrounding tissues and organs at the cellular level during each cervical cancer stage, revealing subtle details of cell division, genetic mutations, and tissue invasion. The video should capture the texture and complexity of the cell surface, the structural deformation of cells during cancer progression, and detailed mapping of how cancer cells invade healthy tissue, providing an almost surreal high-definition visualization of the microscopic stages of cervical cancer, comprehensively presenting the characteristics of each stage. The goal is to offer viewers an in-depth understanding of the microscopic battle within the human body, set in a highly detailed and visually stunning rendering, ideal for educational and medical training purposes.

rubrics_scientific.d1: The hierarchical organization and scale proportions comply with histological standards, accurately reflecting the spatial relationships and relative dimensions among the epithelium, basement membrane, stroma, and microvasculature/lymphatics.
rubrics_scientific.d2: The staging progression of carcinogenesis is consistent with the spatial invasion pathways (in situ confined within the epithelium; infiltration breaching the basement membrane with gradual extension into surrounding tissues; distant metastasis occurring sequentially via circulation, adhesion, and extravasation).
rubrics_scientific.d3: Accuracy of cellular morphology and dynamic processes (nuclear-to-cytoplasmic ratio and pleomorphism, cell membrane texture and invasive pseudopodia morphology, coordinated adhesion-traction-contraction during migration, and appropriate mitotic phase morphology and timing)
rubrics_scientific.d4: Accurate understanding of cell–microenvironment interactions and matrix remodeling mechanisms (including alterations in cell–cell/cell–matrix adhesion, matrix degradation and channel formation, changes in endothelial permeability, and clear causative relationships among key steps of transendothelial transport and extravasation).
rubrics_scientific.d5: Penalties for Scientific Violations and Visual Exaggerations (manifestations that contravene the laws of physics, chemistry, and biology, such as cellular teleportation, molecular reverse diffusion, introduction of organ-level structures within cellular-scale scenes causing scale mismatches, or concretizing point mutations as macroscopic luminescence).

rubrics_visual.d1: High image clarity and superior resolution of microscopic details, with discernible cell surface textures and subcellular structures, sharply defined edges, and well-controlled noise, aliasing, compression artifacts, and flicker.
rubrics_visual.d2: The animation and deformation are smooth and coherent; microscopic interactions (adhesion, permeation, repulsion) are stable and credible; camera movements and temporal rhythm are fluid, without stuttering, jitter, or motion blur.
rubrics_visual.d3: Lighting, shadows, and depth of field are naturally integrated; volumetric scattering and subsurface scattering are appropriately controlled; primary and secondary layers are clearly defined; specular highlights are not overexposed, and details in shadowed areas are preserved without excessive occlusion.
rubrics_visual.d4: High realism in 3D modeling and material textures, with precise geometry topology and deformation free of intersections; consistent normal and roughness maps; material response accurately matching lighting conditions.
rubrics_visual.d5: Color management and contrast are accurate and stable, with consistent color space and appropriate saturation control; local contrast emphasizes the subject while avoiding banding, color bleeding, and white balance drift.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Present a comprehensive cell-level progression pathway of cervical cancer staging from a microscopic perspective, highlighting the core narrative of metastasis and gradual infiltration into surrounding tissues.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Accurately reflect key elements and details: cancer cell surface texture, structural deformation, cell division, genetic mutations, tissue invasion, and microscopic interactions with healthy tissues.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Coherently demonstrate the dynamic changes and diffusion across each stage, with clear temporal sequencing and stable camera work; key processes are marked by discernible visual indicators.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Compliance with technical specifications and style requirements: ultra-realistic high-definition rendering, microscopic perspective, 5-second duration, richly detailed imagery, and clarity and legibility adapted for medical education and training.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Points will be deducted for violations of instructions, including the presentation of medically inaccurate stages, perspectives deviating from the microscopic scale, inconsistent duration, interference from irrelevant elements, or confusion of staging information.

任务: From a microscopic perspective within the deep veins of the leg, red blood cells and blood components slowly accumulate around the venous valve, forming a thrombus. The video meticulously depicts the texture of red blood cells and their interactions with blood components, as well as the subtle surface of the venous valve, highlighting the critical moment when the thrombus obstructs blood flow. The imagery is clear, richly detailed, and focused on a single scene.
具体要求: Create an engaging microscopic world video that closely focuses on thrombus formation, capturing the dynamic scene of deep vein thrombosis (DVT) within the leg veins. Showcase the critical moment when a cluster of slowly moving red blood cells and other blood components aggregate around the venous valve, forming a fixed thrombus or blood clot that effectively impedes normal blood circulation within the venous structure. Emphasize an extraordinary level of detail, highlighting the rich texture of red blood cells, the complex interactions of blood components, and the delicate surface of the venous valve during this accumulation. In the subsequent sequence, depict the thrombus detaching from the valve leaflet, transforming into an embolus, and beginning its journey toward the heart and lungs. Capture this sequence with exceptional clarity, underscoring the potential progression to life-threatening pulmonary embolism, vividly illustrating the embolus embedded within lung tissue, poised to trigger fatal complications.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Venous Anatomy and Scale Consistency: Accurate representation of deep vein diameter in relation to tunica thickness, morphology and spatial relationships of bicuspid venous valves and valve sinuses; dimensional proportions and textures of erythrocytes (biconcave discs), platelets, leukocytes, and fibrin consistent with microscopic scale.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Hemodynamic presentation is accurate: low shear and sluggish flow conditions, presence of reflux/vortices within the valvular sinuses, the predominant centripetal direction of blood flow, and the effects of thrombus on flow velocity and shear gradient are consistent with physiological and fluid dynamic principles.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Accurate biological mechanisms of thrombogenesis: platelet adhesion and activation, coagulation cascade–triggered fibrin mesh formation capturing erythrocytes and leukocytes/NETs; clear progression from mural thrombus to partial or complete occlusion.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Embolus migration pathway and pulmonary embolism localization accuracy: after detachment, the embolus travels through the deep veins, inferior vena cava, right atrium, right ventricle, and pulmonary arterial tree, ultimately lodging within the branches of the pulmonary artery and causing perfusion impairment, rather than entering the pulmonary parenchyma or systemic circulation.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Spatiotemporal consistency and physical constraints: The timeline may be compressed while preserving the chronological order of events and reasonable relative durations; temporal scales and directions remain consistent during transitions from microscopic to macroscopic levels; particle and molecular motions conform to fundamental principles such as viscosity, diffusion, and inertia.

rubrics_visual.d1: High image clarity and microscopic detail resolution, with sharp and stable rendering of texture and microstructure.
rubrics_visual.d2: The 3D modeling and material rendering are realistic, with clear proportions and hierarchical organization of microstructures, and the translucency effect appears natural.
rubrics_visual.d3: The lighting and volumetric effects are natural, with balanced local contrast and color saturation, and the color of the fluid medium is consistent with the lighting.
rubrics_visual.d4: The animation exhibits continuous motion, with smooth transitions in the aggregation, separation, and migration of particles or cells, free from jittering and unnecessary acceleration or deceleration.
rubrics_visual.d5: Reasonable depth of field and focus control; coherent shot composition and visual storytelling; clear visual emphasis on key events without background interference.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Accurately depict the critical sequence from gradual thrombus formation at the venous valve, leading to blood flow obstruction, through embolus detachment, to its arrival in the lungs.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Accurately represent microscopic key elements and details: erythrocyte textures, interactions among blood components, and clearly discernible micro-surfaces and leaflet structures of venous valves.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Perspective and scene focus are accurately maintained: consistent close-up view, concentration on a single scene, clear and stable imagery, with no unnecessary scene transitions.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Temporal and physical process alignment: The movement rhythm reflects a "gradual accumulation," with the duration encompassing the causal chain of formation—obstruction—detachment—migration—pulmonary embolism.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Deviation and Misleading Penalty: Penalization applied for the presence of irrelevant elements, incorrect anatomical sites, macroscopic expressions, or editing that causes disruption in procedural continuity.

任务: From a microscopic perspective, depict the intricate dynamic interactions between the surface of the hip joint prosthesis and the surrounding biological tissues, highlighting the prosthesis surface texture, tissue architecture, and the microscopic contact with surgical instruments, showcasing biomechanical precision and fine details, with the visual focus on a single core scene.
具体要求: Create a stunning and highly detailed microscopic world video that complexly and vividly presents the entire total hip arthroplasty procedure, with a focus on the central subject: the microscopic view of the hip joint and surrounding tissues. The scene should portray the precise and delicate maneuvers of the surgical process, starting from the initial incision and exposure of the hip joint, through the meticulous placement of the acetabular prosthetic component or socket, and concluding with the removal of the diseased femoral head and the implantation of the femoral head prosthesis or ball. This impactful animation should emphasize the rich and complex textures and details of biological tissues and surgical materials, capturing the clarity of prosthetic components and their interactions with organic structures. Highlight the dynamic interactions between surgical instruments and human tissues, as well as the biomechanical precision involved in aligning and installing artificial components within the joint. This visual narrative should be both informative and engaging through its vivid depiction of complexity, enhancing patient engagement and serving as a pioneering content marketing tool in the field of medical visualization.

rubrics_scientific.d1: The morphology, stratification, and spatial relationships of critical anatomical structures—including the acetabulum, proximal femur, joint capsule, and cartilage—as well as prosthetic components, are accurate; the interface boundaries and congruency relationships are scientifically valid and credible.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Scale and proportion are appropriate; microscopic textures (pores/roughness), tissue and cellular scales, and the sizes of instruments and prostheses are consistent, with magnification levels presented coherently.
rubrics_scientific.d3: The surgical procedure and biomechanical presentation of alignment placement are accurate; the forces, movements, and sequence involved in incision, exposure, preparation, placement, and reduction conform to clinical and engineering principles.
rubrics_scientific.d4: The physical and tissue responses during the device-tissue-material interaction process are scientifically credible, reflecting appropriate shear/compressive deformation, cutting/debris generation, friction and lubrication, as well as localized fluid dynamics and hemorrhagic responses.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Visual exaggerations and rendering effects that violate physiological or materials science principles (e.g., exaggerated metal/ceramic elasticity, unfounded sparks/smoke, scale discontinuities, instantaneous self-healing) reduce scientific accuracy.

rubrics_visual.d1: High clarity and resolution of microscopic details; stable focus on the primary subject; clear and distinguishable edges and microtextures; well-defined micro-scale contact and deformation features; absence of noticeable noise or compression artifacts.
rubrics_visual.d2: Modeling and material properties exhibit physical realism; prosthetic metals, bone, soft tissues, and instruments demonstrate high geometric accuracy; microscopic material attributes (roughness, reflectivity, anisotropy, subsurface scattering) are consistent; scale proportions and thickness relationships are reasonable.
rubrics_visual.d3: Lighting and color reproduction are naturally unified, with reasonable illumination direction and energy distribution; shadow gradation and highlight control are well-executed, and depth of field along with out-of-focus imaging are clean. Color saturation, contrast, and white balance are naturally stable, with clear differentiation between tissue and metallic material tones.
rubrics_visual.d4: The animation is smooth with precise biomechanical interactions; the contact, alignment, and installation movements among instruments, tissues, and prostheses are coherent. Tissue deformation, friction, and recoil responses are continuous and credible, with well-controlled motion pacing and smooth acceleration and deceleration, exhibiting no interpenetration or jitter.
rubrics_visual.d5: Visual composition and information readability are emphasized, focusing on a single core scene; camera movement is stable with clear visual guidance. Occlusion and layering are handled distinctly (using sectional cuts or translucency as needed), key steps are highlighted and annotated in coordination with the visuals.

rubrics_instruction.d2: Consistently maintain a microscopic perspective with a singular core scenario, ensuring the visual field remains focused on the microscopic view of the hip joint and surrounding tissues.

任务: From a microscopic perspective, dynamically depict chemotherapy drug nanoparticles surrounding and penetrating cervical cancer cells, vividly showcasing the vibrant colors and complex textures of cellular structures, highlighting the molecular-level interactions between the drugs and cells. The background features a flowing interstitial fluid environment, with a realistic and detailed visual presentation that reflects the microscopic mechanisms of medical intervention.
具体要求: Create a captivating video exploring the microscopic world of cervical cancer treatment, focusing on the intricate cellular interactions and mechanisms involved. The scene begins with a vivid and detailed display of cancerous cervical cells selectively targeted and attacked by chemotherapy drugs, represented as dynamic nanoparticles surrounding and penetrating the malignant cells. Concurrently, accurately depict radiotherapy with beams precisely converging on specific cells, triggering molecular cascade reactions that disintegrate cancerous tissue. From a surgical perspective, illustrate how minimally invasive surgical instruments skillfully manipulate and meticulously excise mutated cells from healthy tissue. Every element in this microscopic universe should be rendered with astonishing realism, capturing the vibrant colors and complex textures of cellular structures, the fluidity of organic materials, and the seamless molecular-level medical interventions. Enhance immersion with an ethereal yet precise soundscape that captures the subtle sounds of cellular processes and therapeutic interactions. This engaging microscopic journey aims not only to educate the audience but also to inspire awe by visualizing the hidden world of cervical cancer treatment, celebrating the marvels of modern medicine and technological advancements. #CervicalCancerTreatment #CervicalCancer #Cancer

rubrics_scientific.d1: The structural presentation of malignant cells and their microenvironment is accurate, reflecting cellular morphological features, the nucleus-to-cytoplasm ratio and heterogeneity, the basic morphology of the cell membrane and major organelles, as well as spatial relationships with the surrounding tissue.
rubrics_scientific.d2: The relationship between spatial and temporal scales is appropriate; the relative sizes and orders of magnitude of drug particles, cells, organelles, and molecular targets are accurate; and the time sequences and rates of diffusion/convection and cellular responses fall within credible ranges.
rubrics_scientific.d3: The mechanism of interaction between chemotherapeutic agents and cancer cells is accurately described, encompassing targeted localization and accumulation, transmembrane entry pathways (endocytosis/membrane permeability), intracellular drug release and action sites, as well as the causal signaling cascade related to DNA damage and cell death, with a rational representation of selectivity towards healthy cells.
rubrics_scientific.d4: The energy deposition distribution in radiotherapy and its biological effects are consistent with principles of radiation physics and radiobiology, manifesting as direct and indirect DNA damage (e.g., free radical-mediated), microdosimetric and scattering characteristics, as well as scientifically grounded understanding of dose gradients and bystander effects at relevant scales.
rubrics_scientific.d5: The motion and visualization do not violate principles of physical chemistry and biomechanics; molecular/particle trajectories reflect Brownian motion, diffusion, and fluid shear dominance; deformation and adhesion failure of cells and tissues under mechanical intervention conform to soft matter mechanics; misleading effects such as inertial field-induced orderly formation, instantaneous penetration of dense barriers, sparks, or flames are avoided.

任务: Under extreme close-up, the cellular structure and tissue texture of the arterial wall in the abdominal aortic aneurysm (AAA) dilation region are clearly visible, with prominent dynamic changes between cells, showcasing the microscopic variations in vascular wall elasticity and color. The video is high-definition and realistic, styled in the biological microscopic world, with a duration of approximately 5 seconds.
具体要求: Create a stunning video that reveals the complex microscopic world within the human body, focusing on the abdominal aortic aneurysm (AAA), defined as a localized dilation of the abdominal aorta exceeding 50% of the normal diameter. This visual masterpiece should vividly display the detailed anatomical structure of the aorta, as well as the open surgical and endovascular repair techniques for AAA. Capture the tense moments of opening the abdomen and aorta, highlighting the delicate suturing involved in graft repair during open surgery. In contrast, emphasize the elegance of endovascular procedures, showcasing the precise catheter navigation and accurate deployment of the stent graft within the aneurysm. The scenes should immerse the viewer in the dynamic transition from the dilated aortic structure to the skillful repair, focusing on the texture and color of the pulsating vessel. Utilize extreme close-up shots to reveal the intricate cellular patterns of the aneurysm wall and surrounding tissues, and detail the complex interactions between surgical instruments and biological tissues. Enhance the visual impact with high-definition imagery and realistic animation, demonstrating changes in surface texture, elasticity, and color of the aorta throughout the surgical intervention.

rubrics_scientific.d1: The arterial wall layers (intima/media/adventitia) and the composition of cells and extracellular matrix are accurately represented, with the AAA region exhibiting pathological features such as elastic fiber fragmentation, collagen remodeling, and smooth muscle cell depletion.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Scale and proportion scientifically consistent: the thickness of cells, fiber bundles, and vessel walls, arterial diameter, intraoperative instrument dimensions relative to vascular size, and stent segment length relative to lumen diameter maintain appropriate orders of magnitude.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Hemodynamic and wall mechanics coupling fidelity: Pulsatile flow fields, vortices, and shear stress distributions; wall compliance and deformation amplitude synchronized with the cardiac cycle; texture and color variations consistent with mechanical states.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Surgical Mechanism and Instrument-Tissue Interaction Accuracy: In open repair, clamping, incision, and suture pathways, as well as graft anastomosis biomechanics, are appropriate; in endovascular treatment, guidewire/catheter navigation, stent-graft deployment, and apposition behavior conform to material properties and anatomical characteristics.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Avoidance of violations against biophysical principles (e.g., blood flow direction unrelated to the cardiac cycle, stents or sutures penetrating tissue without corresponding deformation or bleeding, cells floating and proliferating unattached within the blood lumen, etc.)

rubrics_visual.d1: The image exhibits high clarity, with fine presentation of microstructural details and tissue textures; edges remain stable and free from excessive sharpening even under extreme close-up conditions.
rubrics_visual.d2: The handling of lighting and depth of field is natural, with precise and stable control of color and contrast; the overall tonal layering is prominent without distortion.
rubrics_visual.d3: The animation exhibits smooth and continuous motion, with reasonable deformation and interaction rhythms of cells and tissues. Camera movements are fluid, free from jitter and lag.

rubrics_visual.d5: Presence of artifacts such as noise, aliasing, banding, flickering, moiré patterns, compression blocks, or color banding that interfere with the subject's representation.

任务: High-definition microscopic video focusing on the microstructure of female breast tissue under slight compression during mammography, clearly showcasing the intricate ducts, fine blood vessels, and the fibrous texture of connective tissue along with the delicate glandular patterns, emphasizing microscopic dynamics such as blood flow, and authentically reproducing the biological tissue texture, suitable for a 5-second short video presentation.
具体要求: Produce a stunning high-definition microscopic video that deeply explores the complex anatomy of the female breast, with a focus on the microscopic complexity of breast tissue during mammography. In this captivating scene, demonstrate the dynamic process of mammography, where each breast is methodically positioned between two specialized plates, illustrating how mechanical compression flattens the breast to achieve optimal imaging. Detail the interaction between the X-ray machine and breast tissue, capturing vivid images of glandular structures, intricate ducts, adipose tissue, connective fibers, and fine blood vessels. Highlight textures with extraordinary clarity, revealing the soft fibrous nature of connective tissue, the smoothness of glandular elements, and the complex branching of blood vessels. The video should seamlessly integrate these textures and movements, providing viewers with an engaging and immersive perspective into the microscopic mammography process, unveiling the detailed world hidden within breast tissue.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accuracy of breast microanatomical structures and hierarchical scaling: clear branching hierarchy of duct–terminal duct–acinus/lobule, authentic association of microvasculature with connective tissue, physiologically consistent relative distribution and thickness ratio of adipose tissue to glandular tissue, and coherent size stratification.
rubrics_scientific.d2: X-ray imaging physics and contrast mechanisms are correctly described: grayscale is primarily governed by attenuation coefficients and thickness; soft tissue contrast is limited, and edges are affected by scatter and partial volume effects; blood flow color or detail is not directly depicted, with perfusion differences only visualized when using contrast-enhanced imaging protocols.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Mechanical behavior and temporal progression under compression are appropriate: compression induces reversible tissue flattening and anisotropic shear; mild deformation of catheter and vessel occurs while maintaining continuity; the procedure sequence follows localization–compression–short-term exposure–release, with time scale and deformation rate matching physiological viscoelasticity.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Microcirculation and hemodynamics conform to scale-appropriate physics: laminar flow predominates within small vessels, erythrocyte deformation and alignment correspond proportionally to vessel diameter; diameter and flow velocity changes induced by compression are smooth, with no capillary turbulence or abrupt flow fluctuations violating conservation principles.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Common scientific errors penalized: confusing X-ray imaging with optical microscopy (e.g., colored refraction, direct real-time visualization of blood flow), distortion of anatomical hierarchy and scale (e.g., exaggerating catheters as large luminal vessels, alveolar sizes comparable to blood vessels), and tissue compression causing non-physiological tears or vacuum voids.

rubrics_visual.d1: High image clarity and superior restoration of microscopic details; edges are clean without aliasing or excessive sharpening; key textures and microstructural layers are distinctly discernible.
rubrics_visual.d2: 3D modeling and material representation are realistic, with micro-scale tubular/fibrous/particulate structural proportions and topological continuity maintained; normals and UVs exhibit no noticeable stretching; subsurface scattering and anisotropic textures are consistent.
rubrics_visual.d3: Animation is smooth and physically coherent; microscale deformation and compression/rebound processes are stable and seamless; internal flow and structural interactions are natural, without jitter, interpenetration, or temporal drift.
rubrics_visual.d4: Lighting and volumetric imaging effects are natural; soft shadows, volumetric scattering, and transmission contrasts are appropriately controlled; depth of field transitions are smooth; noise and flickering artifacts are suppressed to imperceptible levels.
rubrics_visual.d5: Accurate and consistent color/grayscale and contrast performance, with rich luminance gradation without overexposure or clipping in shadows; local enhancements do not compromise the material’s realism.

rubrics_instruction.d11: Fully present the microscopic scene and compression process in mammography, highlighting the core visualization of breast tissue under mechanical compression and X-ray exposure, while accurately reproducing the tissue texture.
rubrics_instruction.d22: Accurate representation of key anatomical elements and texture layers: complex ducts, fine blood vessels and hemodynamics, glands and connective fibers, as well as the texture and spatial relationships of adipose tissue.
rubrics_instruction.d33: Perspective and image quality conform to microscopy and device settings: high-definition imaging, stable focus, and consistent scale; the imaging environment of the frame matches that between the two plates with no discordant perspective.
rubrics_instruction.d44: Duration and pacing meet the requirements of an approximately 5-second short video; shot transitions are smooth; the compression process and vessel response/blood flow changes are fully discernible within the specified duration.
rubrics_instruction.d55: Avoid content and mechanism bias: exclude irrelevant scenarios or stylistic exaggerations, and prevent ambiguity that obscures key structures as well as obvious anatomical or physical mechanism errors.

任务: Under the microscope, blood cells flow within the newly grafted vessels of a coronary artery bypass graft (CABG), with dynamic interactions between vascular endothelial cells and blood cells. The texture of the vessel walls and the pulsation of the blood are clearly visible, featuring rich details, scientific accuracy, and a microscopic medical style, suitable for a 5-second video.
具体要求: Create a stunning microscopic world video focusing on the complex cellular and molecular processes involved in coronary artery bypass graft surgery (CABG). The visualization should primarily depict the detailed flow of blood through the newly grafted vessels, highlighting cellular interactions within the coronary arteries, thoracic arteries, and leg veins. The video must portray the intricate surgical scene where the heart is temporarily connected to a cardiopulmonary bypass machine. Capture the dynamic process of surgeons carefully connecting these vessels and subsequently restoring the heartbeat through glowing electrical signals. Pay special attention to the textures and details of various tissues, including the smooth muscular walls of arteries, the endothelial lining of the luminal surfaces, and the pulsatile waves of blood cells moving through microscopic channels. Additionally, integrate views of working drainage tubes efficiently removing excess fluid from the incision site. This visual journey should also include alternative CABG methods, demonstrating the nuances of off-pump surgery and the precision of minimally invasive bypass techniques. The video must be visually rich in detail, focusing on biological structures and processes, and use sophisticated animation to transform the complexity of the surgery into a stunning educational visual experience suitable for medical professionals and enthusiasts.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accuracy of Scale and Morphological Proportions: The ratios among blood cells, vascular lumen diameter, and wall layer thickness correspond to the biological ranges observed in coronary arteries and common grafts.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Hemodynamic and rheological processes conform to physiological principles: pulsatile laminar flow predominates, with appropriate velocity profiles and shear stress distributions; correct representation of axial aggregation of erythrocytes, leukocyte margination and rolling, as well as instantaneous platelet adhesion and detachment.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Scientific presentation of vascular wall and endothelial structure: endothelial cells exhibit flow-aligned polarity and continuous tight junctions; arterial and venous graft wall layer distinctions and texture (media smooth muscle thickness, elastic fiber/collagen distribution) are accurately demonstrated.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Geometric and hemodynamic consistency at the anastomotic junction and bifurcation: the anastomotic orifice and transition are smooth; local streamlines, vorticity, and pressure-diameter coupling are appropriate without inducing non-physiological separation, reflux, or stasis.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Consistency between Surgical Procedure and Cardiopulmonary Bypass Mechanisms: The timing of cardiopulmonary bypass and oxygenation, the electro-mechanical coupling during cardiac arrest and resumption of cardiac activity, as well as the hemodynamic and device characteristics in off-pump and minimally invasive approaches should demonstrate no contradictions.

任务: Microscopically display prostate cancer cells and their surrounding vascular network, with clear cell surface textures and flowing blood cells, highlighting intercellular interactions and the microenvironment. The scene unfolds within a highly detailed, clinically precise surgical environment, where laparoscopic techniques are applied with exceptional accuracy, prominently demonstrating the skilled maneuvering of surgical instruments through complex anatomical structures. Focus on capturing the exquisite textures of the prostate and adjacent tissues, emphasizing the unique cellular structures, vascular networks, and muscular textures involved. Highlight the guidance of surgical instruments through the tissue layers with microscopic precision during this delicate and critical procedure, while underscoring the evident tension and accuracy required for effective removal of the enlarged prostate. This vivid portrayal is not only educational but also engages the audience through detailed and precise representation of modern medical intervention in urologic oncology, making it a valuable resource for understanding prostate cancer surgery.

The scene unfolds as a detailed and realistic journey through the colonic mucosal layer, visualized using a high-definition microscopic endoscope. The camera is mounted on a flexible endoscope and operated smoothly to present the mucosal surface with exceptional clarity. The motion involves observing the complex mucosal architecture and precisely documenting any signs of inflammation, ulcers, colorectal polyps, or diverticular disease. The texture of the colonic surface should be vividly and intricately rendered, showcasing the subtle folds and patterns of the colonic wall, the fine tissue movements, and the intricate vascular network visible through the camera’s remarkable zoom capabilities, providing an immersive visual experience. This video should emphasize authentic color variations and detailed textures that can reveal potential abnormalities, encouraging viewers to appreciate both the medical significance and aesthetic beauty of the internal colonic landscape.

任务: From a microscopic perspective, under ultrasound probe guidance, a fine needle precisely penetrates the abdominal wall, uterine wall, and amniotic sac, clearly revealing the microtextures of each tissue layer. Amniotic fluid flows slowly within the syringe, highlighting its translucent crystalline structure. The imagery is delicate and realistic, utilizing high-precision 3D rendering to focus on the microscopic medical details and accuracy of the amniocentesis procedure.
具体要求: Create an engaging and highly detailed microscopic world video that narrates the amniocentesis procedure with exquisite and precise visual artistry. The video’s main content is to demonstrate the complex process of amniotic fluid testing during pregnancy, thoroughly presenting every step of the amniocentesis procedure. Begin by showing the fine needle being accurately inserted through the abdominal wall, entering the uterus, and reaching the amniotic sac. Capture the dynamic interaction as the needle pierces the amniotic sac to extract the amniotic fluid sample. Include detailed ultrasound imagery that accurately depicts the fetus’s position and surrounding structures, emphasizing the cautious and systematic movement of the ultrasound probe capturing real-time images, presented through a sophisticated computer interface. Highlight close-up shots of the needle’s precise insertion, allowing viewers to observe the different layers it traverses, including visible human tissues, uterine wall, and amniotic membrane textures. Meticulously depict the crystalline structure and translucent appearance of the amniotic fluid, enabling viewers to see the fluid’s slow flow within the syringe. Emphasize the complexity and precision of modern medical technology, ensuring the video captures the intrinsic intricacy and aesthetic of this critical prenatal test. Employ advanced 3D rendering techniques to add realistic textures and depth, guaranteeing a surreal visual effect that provides the audience with unprecedented insight into this life-sustaining medical procedure.

rubrics_scientific.d1: The layered structures, relative thickness, and texture of the abdominal wall, uterine wall, and amniochorionic membrane correspond to anatomical and ultrasonographic characteristics, with accurate positional relationships among the fetus, placenta, and surrounding structures.
rubrics_scientific.d2: The amniocentesis procedure and safety precautions comply with clinical guidelines: under real-time ultrasound guidance, the needle path is planned to avoid the fetus and placental vessels; negative pressure aspiration is initiated only after entering the amniotic cavity; puncture depth and angle are appropriately controlled.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Accuracy of Ultrasound Imaging Physical Characteristics: Consistency in inter-tissue echo contrast, speckle texture, posterior acoustic shadowing/enhancement and refraction effects, as well as the influence of probe orientation and incidence angle variations on the image.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Reasonable scale and mechanical interaction: The proportion between needle dimensions and tissue thickness, the membrane surface deformation prior to needle tip penetration and the transient rupture, as well as the local tissue displacement and recoil range, conform to the biomechanics of biological materials.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Scientific characterization of the physicochemical properties and fluid behavior of amniotic fluid: exhibiting translucency with slight suspended particulate features; viscosity and flow properties consistent with fluid mechanics; interfacial tension and flow rate variations within the syringe are reasonable, without misrepresentation as solid crystallization.

任务: The human placental surface from a microscopic perspective, illustrating the dynamic exchange of nutrients and oxygen between maternal blood vessels and placental villi, with clear visualization of cellular and blood flow. The complex structure and vivid colors highlight the placenta's critical role in prenatal health, suitable for a 5-second short video.
具体要求: Create a captivating microscopic world video showcasing the intricate anatomical structure of the human placenta, revealing its vital role in prenatal health and the surprising causes that may lead to cesarean delivery. As the scene unfolds in layers, we delve into the vibrant, pulsating textures of the placental surface, demonstrating the dynamic exchange of nutrients and oxygen between mother and child. Marvel at the detailed depiction of shoulder dystocia, placenta previa, and abnormal fetal heart activity brought vividly to life before your eyes. Capture the exquisite details of the complex cellular and tissue interactions through stunning visual storytelling. This video vividly portrays the life-saving procedure of breech delivery via a bikini incision, emphasizing the obstetrician’s precise maneuvers during surgery. Every texture, from the placenta’s pristine fibrous membrane to the vivid colors of maternal blood vessels, is presented with extraordinary clarity and depth. This video transcends standard medical animation by providing an immersive experience that not only educates but also engages viewers with the beauty and complexity of prenatal medical challenges and solutions.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accurate representation of key microscopic anatomical structures and their spatial relationships; clear delineation between maternal blood spaces, villous structures, and fetal capillaries; continuous barrier layers with reasonable thickness ranges.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Nutrition, gas exchange, and hemodynamics adhere to physiological and physicochemical principles; the dominant roles of diffusion, carrier-mediated transport, and convection correspond correctly to gradient directions; the maternal and fetal circulations are individually closed and exchange occurs exclusively across the barrier; flow patterns and shear stress levels are within appropriate ranges.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Scale and temporal consistency are well maintained; the size ratios between cells and blood cells, as well as microvessels and villi, correspond appropriately to flow velocity magnitudes. Within a 5-second footage, the amplitude and frequency of dynamic variations fall within a reasonable range characteristic of authentic microscopic processes.
rubrics_scientific.d4: The microscopic mapping of pathology and intervention narratives is scientifically reliable, presenting only verifiable microscopic alterations and mechanisms related to complications or surgical procedures, while avoiding the direct simplification of macroscopic events into a single microscopic cause-effect relationship.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Scientific Error Penalty Criteria: Occurrence of direct mixing of maternal and fetal blood, misleading color coding of blood flow direction or oxygenation status, scale mismatch resulting from juxtaposition of macroscopic instruments/incisions with microscopic perspectives, or tissue properties and optical responses that clearly contradict reality.

任务: Dynamic diffusion of malignant breast cancer cells within healthy breast tissue, with clear visualization of cell morphology and nuclei. Neovascularization appears in certain regions. The pink healthy tissue contrasts sharply with the dark cancer cells, highlighting changes in cell size and shape. High-definition microscopic perspective, 5-second short video.
具体要求: Create a stunning video that deeply explores the microscopic world of breast cancer progression, focusing on cellular transformations occurring at various disease stages. Depict a dynamic scene within breast tissue where clusters of malignant cells exhibit distinct characteristics as they proliferate and invade surrounding healthy tissue, demonstrating local spread and metastasis. Capture the intricate details and textures of cancer cells in high resolution, illustrating the differences between normal epithelial cells and cancerous cells, emphasizing variations in size, shape, and nuclei. Visualize angiogenesis, the formation of new blood vessels supplying the growing tumor. Highlight the color contrast between pink healthy tissue and dark aggressive cancer cells to emphasize invasiveness, making the microscopic changes defining each stage of breast cancer according to established medical classifications visible.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Microscopic scale and morphological accuracy of cells and tissues: the size ratio between normal breast epithelium and stroma, cancer cells, nuclear-to-cytoplasmic ratio, morphological heterogeneity, and nuclear detail presentation conform to pathological characteristics.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Stage-specific expression profile of tumor progression and invasion pathways: the sequential and spatial relationships from in situ lesions to basement membrane breach, stromal infiltration, local dissemination, and intravasation into blood and lymphatic vessels are consistent with the architectural organization of breast tissue.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Accuracy of Angiogenesis Process and Morphological Features: Neovascularization arises from the sprouting of pre-existing microvessels towards tumor growth, characterized by irregular vessel diameter, disorganized branching, increased permeability, and consistent with the logical relationship between tumor hypoxia and perfusion demand.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Rational interaction between cellular behavior and microenvironment: proliferation rate corresponds appropriately with division morphology, migration mode, adhesion changes, matrix degradation, and mechanisms of interaction with immune cells, fibroblasts, and the basement membrane in accordance with established biological principles.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Consistency of Spatiotemporal and Visual Encoding: Temporal compression preserves the sequential order and continuity of processes; spatial scale maintains appropriate proportions among cells, nuclei, blood vessels, and stroma; color contrast is salient without misleading structural identification.

rubrics_visual.d1: High-definition clarity with excellent recognition of microscopic details; cell morphology, nuclear structures, and boundaries are sharply and consistently delineated.
rubrics_visual.d2: Color rendering and contrast relations are natural and harmonious, with healthy tissue and lesion layers distinctly differentiated, exhibiting neither oversaturation nor color distortion.
rubrics_visual.d3: The animation timing and motion continuity are excellent, with smooth and stable diffusion and deformation processes, free of stuttering, jittering, or unnecessary frame skipping.
rubrics_visual.d4: The modeling and material shading are realistic, effectively conveying a sense of volume and translucency, with lighting and depth of field harmonized so as not to obscure key information.
rubrics_visual.d5: Visual noise and artifacts are well controlled, effectively avoiding grainy noise, compression blocks, aliasing, banding, and excessive motion blur interference.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Fully implement the core scenarios and objectives described in the task, presenting the dynamic diffusion and invasion of diseased cells within the specified organizational environment, encompassing manifestations of local dissemination and potential metastasis.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Accurately reflect the key biological structures and processes specified in the requirements, clearly present cellular morphology and nuclear characteristics, and demonstrate the task-designated processes (e.g., proliferation, angiogenesis).
rubrics_instruction.d3: The color and visual contrast scheme aligns with the task requirements, effectively highlighting the differences between healthy tissue and pathological cells, while emphasizing variations in cell size and morphology.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Reflect the dynamic, phased process by coherently presenting the microscopic changes in disease progression, enabling distinct characterization of features at different stages along the temporal axis.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Meets technical specifications and perspective requirements, achieves high-definition image quality and microscopic viewpoints, and adheres to task duration guidelines (approximately 5 seconds), ensuring detail discernibility.

任务: From a microscopic perspective, arterial plaque accumulation is depicted with clearly visible layered textures of yellow, white, and red lipids. The translucent arterial wall surrounds the scene, with pulsatile blood flow. Contrast agent is precisely injected into the bloodstream, instantly outlining the arterial structure and highlighting the impact of plaques on blood flow. Suspended plasma microparticles dynamically drift, creating a delicate image suitable for a 5-second medical microscopic world short video.
具体要求: Create a stunning microscopic world video showcasing an extraordinary journey through human arteries, focusing on the central theme of plaque accumulation within the arterial wall. Immerse viewers in a dynamic and educational scene where the microscopic camera angle reveals the intricate details of coronary angiography or cardiac catheterization, cardiovascular diagnostic procedures unfolding inside the heart. Emphasize the precise moment when the needle injects contrast agent into the bloodstream, capturing the captivating flow of fluid outlining the arterial structure and pinpointing blockage locations. Elaborately depict the lipid deposits forming plaques, revealing their layered textures and colors, including yellow, white, and red hues, contrasted against the translucent arterial wall. Display the rhythmic motion of heart valves and their role in pumping blood, illustrating the powerful yet subtle mechanical operation. Capture the pulsatile flow within the blood environment, imparting urgency and vitality inside the artery, surrounded by a symphony of microparticles suspended in plasma. This captivating visual journey should serve as a valuable educational resource with clear imaging and vivid detail, directly engaging medical professionals and students exploring the complexities of cardiovascular disease.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accurate anatomical characterization of the arterial wall and atherosclerotic plaque: appropriate stratification and relative thickness of the vessel layers; plaque located within the vessel wall forming a fibrous cap at the luminal surface; texture and tonal representation of the lipid core and fibrous components without excessive exaggeration.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Hemodynamic and contrast agent behavior conform to physiological and physical principles: pulsatile-driven laminar flow with appropriate acceleration, recirculation, or turbulence distribution in stenotic regions; the contrast agent dilution, attenuation of contrast, and diffusion time series following intravascular injection accurately delineate the stenotic and retention zones.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Valve motion is synchronized with coronary perfusion timing: valve opening and closing correspond to the direction of blood flow, and the rhythm of coronary artery filling predominantly during diastole is coordinated with the imaging frame rate.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Reasonable microscale and component morphology ratios: the relative sizes and densities of vascular lumen diameter, arterial wall thickness, catheter or needle diameter, and blood components such as erythrocytes and platelets correspond to authentic physiological ranges.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Scientific Misleading and Structural Mismatch: Introducing non-arterial related structures, reversing the direction or causality of processes, or applying unrealistic effects such as excessive transparency or luminescence that distort physiological mechanisms.

rubrics_visual.d1: High image clarity with well-resolved microscopic details; clean edges of key structures; clear texture layering; stable resolution under depth of field and high magnification; no excessive sharpening or smearing.

The event pacing is clearly conveyed within a short time span.

Volumetric scattering, environmental fog, and depth of field synergistically enhance spatial layering without obscuring critical information. Highlights and reflections are properly controlled without overexposure.

任务: Under a high-definition microscopic perspective, female pelvic ovarian cells slowly migrate within a rich vascular network, with fine intercellular interactions and tissue textures clearly visible. The background features a colorful biological microenvironment, highlighting the abnormal cellular characteristics of endometriosis, suitable for a 5-second short video.
具体要求: Create a visually stunning and educational microscopic world video focusing on the internal anatomical structures and cellular tissues of female pelvic organs during diagnostic pelvic laparoscopy. Capture the complex process starting from the insertion of the laparoscope into the abdominal cavity through the trocar, providing a captivating internal view of the ovaries, fallopian tubes, and other interconnected reproductive system organs. This scene should showcase colorful tissues, intricate vascular networks, and delicate, complex interactions within the surrounding microenvironment, emphasizing conditions such as endometriosis. Ensure highly detailed textures that reveal the subtle layers and translucency of organ tissues, while highlighting cellular movement and the subtle interplay among different anatomical components. Use visual storytelling to convey the significance of each element, allowing the audience to appreciate the beauty and complexity of the microscopic and cellular world in human biology.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accurate representation of the anatomical structures and their spatial relationships: the topology and hierarchical arrangement of the ovary, fallopian tube, uterus, peritoneum, and surrounding supportive structures conform to female pelvic anatomy; the pathway and perspective of laparoscopic entry through the trocar are demonstrated scientifically.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Multiscale spatial relationships and temporal dynamics are physiologically consistent: the size ratios among cellular, vascular, and tissue levels are accurate; cell migration speed, morphological changes, and tissue deformation within 5 seconds fall within physiological ranges.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Vascular network and hemodynamics conform to physiological principles: clear hierarchical organization of arteries, veins, and capillary beds; reasonable branching density and orientation; flow velocity, pulsatility, and erythrocyte movement consistent with microcirculatory characteristics.

rubrics_scientific.d5: Visual enhancement does not cause scientific misinterpretation: avoid excessive exaggeration of color, transparency, or cross-scale stitching that leads to confusion of tissue types, boundaries, and temporal sequences.

There are no occurrences of stuttering, motion blur, frame skipping, or object interpenetration. Camera movements are coordinated with the overall pacing.

任务: Under the microscope, luminescent semaglutide molecules float within the blood microenvironment, dynamically approaching and binding to GLP-1 receptors on the surface of pancreatic cells, highlighting the delicate contrast between the moment of molecular binding and the cellular membrane structure. The imagery is clear and detailed, with soft ambient lighting, showcasing the microscopic interaction between the drug and the cells.
具体要求: Create an engaging microscopic world video illustrating the complex dynamics of semaglutide molecules moving through the bloodstream and their critical role in diabetes management. The scene begins with semaglutide molecules depicted as dynamically glowing entities navigating the intricate network of capillaries and blood vessels. As the video progresses, it emphasizes the interaction between semaglutide and GLP-1 receptors on pancreatic cells, demonstrating the drug’s mechanism in stimulating insulin release. Include high-resolution close-ups of glucose molecules being metabolized with the assistance of semaglutide, showing their uptake into cells. Throughout the video, the microscopic flowing textures should finely display the exquisite details of these interactions, emphasizing the contrast between the luminescent semaglutide molecules and the vibrant cellular structures. The video should incorporate seamless scene transitions and ambient lighting effects to highlight semaglutide’s therapeutic action and its impact on glucose levels, providing viewers with an immersive visual experience that showcases cutting-edge medical science.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accuracy of scale and order of magnitude relationships: The proportional sizes, spatial densities, and levels of visible detail of molecules, receptors, cell membranes, red blood cells, and capillaries conform to physiological ranges.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Scientific Validity of Receptor-Ligand Interaction: The GLP-1 receptor is localized on the target cell membrane exhibiting an appropriate transmembrane structure; semaglutide demonstrates reasonable affinity and kinetics closely resembling binding and dissociation processes, reflecting the specificity and conformational changes characteristic of GPCRs.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Accuracy of Tissue and Cavity Demarcation: The spatial relationships and permeability characteristics among vascular lumen, endothelium, basement membrane, interstitium, and islet cells are appropriately represented, with the translocation pathways and rates of molecules from plasma to receptors aligning with the features of microcirculation.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Physiological causality and tissue specificity correctness: GLP-1 receptor activation induces intracellular signaling in β-cells and the exocytosis of insulin granules, which subsequently promotes glucose uptake and metabolism in peripheral tissues. This process reflects glucose dependency and temporal consistency, avoiding characterization of the drug as directly metabolizing or transporting glucose.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Manifestations that violate physical and visualization principles (e.g., depicting molecules as spontaneous energy sources, exhibiting linear directed motion, crossing barriers without justification, or interpreting fluorescence as intrinsic emission) resulting in scientific misinformation

rubrics_visual.d1: Image clarity and fine presentation of microscopic details are high; the main subject's edges are sharp, fine textures are discernible, and noise, compression artifacts, and unnecessary motion blur are well controlled.
rubrics_visual.d2: Lighting and depth of field effects are natural; volumetric and ambient lighting are soft; highlights on emissive elements are not overexposed; shadow gradations are distinct, emphasizing the chiaroscuro contrast of molecular and cellular structures.
rubrics_visual.d3: The animation is smooth with coherent camera transitions; microfluidic and particle movement trajectories are smooth and scale-appropriate; the timing and rhythm of molecular-receptor binding events are clear and well-defined.
rubrics_visual.d4: 3D modeling and material representation are credible, with coordinated transparency, refraction, and roughness of biological materials such as cell membranes and protein structures; liquid media are consistent, the scale is uniform, and there are no clipping or flickering artifacts.
rubrics_visual.d5: Color management and contrast coordination are effectively implemented, achieving a consistent and stable overall tone. Luminous elements exhibit high separation from background colors, avoiding color cast, oversaturation, and banding color bleed.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Comprehensively present the core narrative chain: semaglutide labeled with a luminescent probe moves within the blood microenvironment and vascular network, dynamically approaching and binding to GLP-1 receptors on the surface of pancreatic cells, extending to the visualization of insulin secretion and glucose metabolism.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Restoration of Key Elements and Structures: The luminescent characteristics of semaglutide, the textures of blood vessels and capillaries, the ultrastructure of pancreatic cells and cell membranes, GLP-1 receptor sites, and the processes of glucose molecule absorption and metabolism are clearly presented.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Emphasize the integration of instantaneous and detailed contrasts: enhance the subtle contrast between the molecule and the cell membrane upon receptor binding, as well as local details, reflecting the continuous variations of fluid dynamics and microscopic interactions observed under the microscope.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Consistency of Perspective and Technical Specifications: The microscopic perspective is maintained throughout the entire sequence, with consistently high-resolution and clarity. Soft ambient lighting and color contrast serve the narrative, while scene transitions are seamless, with pacing and duration aligned to the information density.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Scientific Communication and Presentation of Therapeutic Effects: Accurately convey the mechanistic role of semaglutide in diabetes management and its impact on glucose levels; ensure consistency between information and visuals, avoiding exaggeration or misinformation.

任务: Under a 3D microscopic perspective, focus on the critical moment of the traction method during percutaneous endoscopic gastrostomy (PEG) tube insertion: the surgical instrument precisely pulls the PEG tube through the gastric wall, with clearly defined layers of the gastrointestinal tissue, smooth and delicate surfaces of the endoscope and tube, highlighting the dynamic microscopic interaction between the instrument and tissue.
具体要求: Create a visually stunning 3D microscopic world video that emphasizes the complex process of PEG tube placement via percutaneous endoscopy, which is vital for patients unable to ingest food orally for extended periods. In this scenario, depict a detailed and dynamic sequence of events showcasing the two primary surgical techniques for PEG tube insertion: the "traction" method and the "push" method. The animation should emphasize fine details and lifelike textures, such as the delicate tissue layers within the gastrointestinal tract, the smooth surface of the endoscope, and the sterile, smooth contour of the feeding tube itself. Capture the subtle movements of the surgical instruments as they operate with precision, highlighting the interaction between medical tools and surrounding tissues. Delve into microscopic details to ensure the audience can appreciate the visual and technical complexity of each step, providing a breathtaking and educational experience that underscores the advanced techniques and skills required to perform PEG procedures.

rubrics_scientific.d1: The multilayered tissue structures of the gastrointestinal tract and abdominal wall are clearly delineated with accurate spatial relationships, and the puncture pathway maintains an appropriate spatial relationship with adjacent critical structures.
rubrics_scientific.d2: The key steps and causal sequence of the traction and pushing methods are scientifically appropriate, with the demonstration of the guidewire, sheath, and catheter pathways and fixation methods being accurate and clearly differentiated.
rubrics_scientific.d3: The dynamic interaction between the instrument and the tissue conforms to soft tissue biomechanics; tissue responses such as deformation, recoil, friction, and minimal bleeding induced by puncturing, traction, and pushing are appropriate, with no physiological violations such as ruptures or exaggerated distortions.
rubrics_scientific.d4: The scale ratio and morphology between the instruments and tissues are precise; the dimensions of the endoscope, puncture needle, guidewire, and PEG tube correspond appropriately to the tissue thickness and lumen diameter; surface texture and distal end structures conform to the characteristics of medical devices.
rubrics_scientific.d5: The physical and physiological environment is realistically represented; the effects of cavity insufflation or fluid filling on the visual field and wall tension conform to principles of pressure and gravity; the movement of fluids and blood flow follows pressure and gravitational laws; endoscopic optical reflection and scattering characteristics are consistent with expected behavior.

rubrics_visual.d3: Material and color are true and consistent; color saturation and contrast are natural; white balance is stable; subsurface scattering of tissues, wet highlights, and reflective characteristics of metals and polymers are accurately represented.
rubrics_visual.d4: Lighting and depth of field are naturally rendered; soft shadows and contact shadows are well-defined; highlights exhibit smooth gradation; volumetric lighting and ambient lighting are properly balanced; depth of field corresponds to the macro scale without obscuring critical information.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Complete presentation of the core event sequence of PEG tube placement, covering both the pull and push techniques, with emphasis on the critical moments of the pull method intubation; the procedural steps are logically clear and coherent.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Accurately reproduces the microscale dynamic interaction between tools and tissues, with clearly defined tissue layers; the endoscope and catheter surfaces are smooth, sterile, and exhibit consistent texture and scale.

rubrics_instruction.d5: Significant deviations conflicting with the instructions, such as omission of any technical procedure, use of a non-microscopic perspective, obvious distortion of tissue material, or interactions that violate medical knowledge leading to misinformation.

任务: From a microscopic perspective, the infant's shoulder slowly releases from the mother's pubic symphysis, with the microtextures and biomechanical interactions of the pelvic bones, ligaments, and muscles clearly visible. The environment is minimalistic and focused, highlighting the critical dynamics of pelvic outlet expansion. The background features Bach's Cello Suite No.1 in G major, suitable for a 5-second short video.
具体要求: Create a stunning microscopic world video focusing on the complex biomechanics of human childbirth, centered on the dynamic interaction between the infant's shoulder and the maternal pelvic bones, particularly the pubic symphysis. The scene captures the precise execution of the McRoberts maneuver during delivery, emphasizing the gentle adjustment and movement of the mother's flexed legs toward the shoulders while supine, facilitating pelvic outlet expansion. This process should be depicted with meticulous detail, especially highlighting the pelvic ghost overlay to emphasize the visible release of the infant's shoulder from the pubic symphysis impasse. The video must accentuate the delicate textures and details of the involved anatomical structures, including ligaments, muscles, and bone surfaces, harmonized with the tranquil background of Bach's Cello Suite No.1 in G major. These elements must be seamlessly integrated to create a powerful visual narrative that is both educational and evocative, resonating with and inspiring the audience through profound microscopic detail and fluid motion.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accurate representation of anatomical structures and spatial relationships: the morphology, position, and proportions of the pelvic bones, pubic symphysis, ligaments, associated muscle groups, and the fetal shoulder girdle conform to human anatomical standards.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Correct biomechanics and kinematics of childbirth: the pelvic motion chain induced by the McRoberts maneuver (hip flexion, pelvic posterior tilt/lumbosacral angle reduction, sacral straightening) is consistent with the increase of the anteroposterior diameter of the pelvic outlet, and the fetal shoulder’s sliding and rotational trajectory around the pubic symphysis is coordinated.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Credibility of the material properties and microstructural texture organization: high stiffness and hierarchical architecture of bone; ligament fiber orientation and limited extensibility; compressive-shear response of cartilage/fibrocartilage; viscoelastic deformation and recovery exhibited by skeletal muscle striations and thickness variations.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Scale and temporal consistency: The transition between microscopic and macroscopic scales maintains dimensional proportionality and consistent order of contact roughness; within a 5-second duration, temporal compression preserves continuity of velocity and acceleration, with deformation rates remaining within physiologically acceptable ranges.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Penalty for Scientific Inaccuracies: Manifestations violating anatomical and biomechanical principles, including exaggerated separation of the pubic symphysis, distortion of the ratio between the fetal shoulder and pelvic outlet, physiologically unjustified hyperelasticity or tearing of tissues without causality, penetration of bone or soft tissues, and displacement occurring without physical contact.

rubrics_visual.d1: The image exhibits high clarity, with discernible microscopic-scale details and textures, sharp edges, and no significant noise or compression artifacts.
rubrics_visual.d2: 3D anatomical modeling and material realism, with consistent surface and volumetric texture of bones, ligaments, and muscles, and unified sense of scale and proportion.
rubrics_visual.d3: The animation is smooth and coherent, with biomechanical responses to contact and deformation appearing natural, exhibiting no jittering, mesh penetration, or temporal interpolation inconsistencies.
rubrics_visual.d4: Natural handling of lighting and depth of field; coherent subsurface scattering, translucency, and shadow layering in microscopic scenes; sharp focus with a prominent subject.
rubrics_visual.d5: Color and contrast are naturally unified; key structural color regions are distinctly differentiated; informative overlays are clear and do not interfere with the main subject.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Comprehensively depict the core biomechanical scenario: from a microscopic perspective, illustrate the infant’s shoulder disengaging from the symphysis pubis stalemate, with pelvic outlet expansion serving as the main visual line and focal point.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Key anatomical elements and microtextures accurately represented: pelvic bones, ligaments, muscles, and bone surface microstructures are clearly defined, with biomechanical interactions precisely depicted to facilitate the release process.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Adherence to prescribed posture and assisted visualization: accurate representation of the McRoberts position (supine with knees flexed toward the shoulders for adjustment and facilitation), enhanced visibility through superimposed pelvic shadowing, and a clean, focused environment free of distractions.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Technical Specification Compliance and Performance Consistency: approximately 5 seconds in duration; camera framing, depth of field, and lighting appropriate for microscopic presentation; smooth motion with stable focus; background music is Bach’s Cello Suite No.1 in G major, synchronized with the visual rhythm.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Deviation and Interference Penalty: Occurrence of non-microscopic first-person perspective, neglect of critical dynamics such as shoulder release and pelvic outlet, incorrect anatomical relationships, redundant background, or failure to adhere to the specified duration and accompanying music, resulting in deviation from the instructions.

任务: Under the microscope, present a microscopic perspective within the joint capsule, showing the exposed fibular bone surface with clear bone texture after cartilage removal. A metallic hollow screw is slowly inserted into the bone, with subtle tactile interaction between the screw and the bone surface. Fibrous structures of the bone graft are visible laterally. The image is clear and the movements are concise.
具体要求: Create an engaging and highly detailed microscopic world video that deeply explores the complex process of lateral fibular ankle arthrodesis, a surgical procedure that fuses the ankle bones to eliminate mobility and associated pain. Begin by showcasing the central subject—the ankle joint, including the tibia, fibula, and talus—observed through advanced microscopy. Focus on the intricate interactions of these bones within the joint capsule. Capture the dynamic surgical scene of the surgeon performing a lateral ankle incision, skillfully removing cartilage and damaged bone from the distal tibia and superior talus, while harvesting a portion of the fibula. Demonstrate the precise placement of a metallic guide pin and the insertion of hollow screws used to stabilize the fusion, along with the careful placement of surrounding bone graft harvested from the resected fibula. Convey the final fixation of the tibia and fused ankle joint with additional screws, culminating in the meticulous suturing of the incision. Highlight the detailed texture and condition of the articular cartilage prior to removal, degraded by osteoarthritis, and the subsequent exposure of the bone. Showcase the subtle texture of the exposed bone surface, the fine tactile interaction between the metal screws and bone, and the fibrous structure of the bone graft, immersing viewers in an astonishing and educational exploration of this complex surgical technique at the microscopic level.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accurate depiction of key anatomical structures and spatial relationships of the ankle joint (distal tibia, distal fibula, talus, joint capsule, orientation of articular surfaces; clear delineation of cortical and cancellous bone layers).
rubrics_scientific.d2: The surgical steps and sequence of operations comply with clinical protocols (lateral approach; removal of lesional cartilage and affected bone; precise guide pin placement; appropriate trajectory and sequence of hollow screws used for fusion; fibular segment harvesting and bone graft placement; supplementary screw compression fixation and suturing).
rubrics_scientific.d3: Authenticity and credibility of micro-scale features and tissue texture (comparison before and after cartilage degeneration and removal; exposure of cortical and cancellous bone surface texture; fibrous structure of bone graft; appropriate size proportionality between instruments and tissues at the microscopic level)
rubrics_scientific.d4: The tool-tissue interactions are scientifically consistent with biomechanical processes (bone debris and friction generated by drilling/implant insertion; engagement at the thread-bone interface and transmission of compressive forces; localized tissue deformation and fluid exudation obeying physical and physiological principles).
rubrics_scientific.d5: Presence of critical scientific errors or exaggerated representations (intact cartilage preservation alongside osseous fusion; screw trajectories contravening mechanical stability lines or abnormally penetrating joint surfaces; bone bridge formation occurring instantaneously inconsistent with physiological time scales; metallic materials exhibiting implausible elasticity or magnetism).

rubrics_visual.d2: Geometric modeling demonstrates rigorous accuracy and scale consistency, with realistic representation of material properties and micro-textures of biological tissues, metallic instruments, and fibrous structures, exhibiting clear differentiation in texture and tactile qualities.
rubrics_visual.d3: Lighting and depth of field are controlled naturally and stably; microscale shadow transitions are delicate; reflections and highlights are rendered smoothly without glare.
rubrics_visual.d4: The animation motion and interaction process are smooth and credible; microscale manipulations and tactile feedback are coherent; slow insertions and surface interaction details are stable and free of jitter.
rubrics_visual.d5: Accurate color reproduction with balanced saturation and contrast, ensuring overall tonal consistency without color cast.
