任务: Microscopically display the core surgical area of thoracic outlet syndrome, focusing on the microscopic structures of the brachial plexus, scalene muscles, subclavian artery, and vein. Highlight the texture and color differentiation of muscle fibers and nerve fibers. Surgical instruments delicately and precisely touch nerves and blood vessels within the narrow space, demonstrating tissue tension and instrument gloss. Use a simple background, with a 5-second microscopic medical perspective.
具体要求: Create a stunning microscopic world video focusing on the complex and dynamic process of thoracic outlet syndrome (TOS) surgery, carefully emphasizing the key anatomical structures involved, such as the scalene muscles, brachial plexus, subclavian artery, and vein, which are central to this procedure. Capture the surgeon skillfully navigating these delicate tissues to relieve compression and ensure vascular and neural function. The video should demonstrate the precision of surgical instruments operating within the confined thoracic outlet space. It should showcase the detailed texture of muscle fibers, the glistening vessels, and the intricate nerve plexus, with vivid colors clearly distinguishing each component. This visualization aims to educate viewers by clearly presenting the interaction between surgical tools and these complex structures, virtually immersing them in the surgical field, while capturing the important yet subtle maneuvers in TOS surgery. Every aspect, from tissue tension to instrument sheen, should reflect the authenticity and complexity of this advanced medical procedure.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accurate identification of the brachial plexus, scalene muscles, subclavian artery, and vein, with precise spatial relationships; correct orientation corresponding to the first rib and the fascial interval (the brachial plexus and subclavian artery are located between the anterior and middle scalene muscles, while the subclavian vein lies anterior and inferior to the anterior scalene muscle).
rubrics_scientific.d2: The morphology and proportions at the microscopic scale are appropriate, with nerve bundle diameters, muscle fiber texture, and arterial and venous wall thicknesses consistent in proportion to the dimensions of the instrument tip and the narrow spatial constraints of the thoracic outlet.
rubrics_scientific.d3: The differentiation of tissue texture and color corresponds to biological and optical characteristics: the neurolemma appears translucent white with a glossy sheen; muscle fibers are reddish-brown with longitudinal striations; arteries have thick walls exhibiting pulsatile reflections; veins have thin walls that can collapse and appear cyanotic; metallic instruments display highlights and reflections consistent with physical optics.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Physiological processes and mechanical responses authenticity: arterial pulsation and blood flow direction are coherent; venous compliance and filling variations are appropriate; tissue tension, deformation and recoil, as well as sliding/friction induced by gentle device contact, correspond to the viscoelastic material properties and tissue mechanics.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Critical Error Penalty: Occurrence of structural mismatches or inversions (e.g., placing veins between scalene muscles), reversal of arteriovenous physical characteristics, instrument clamping or puncturing of nerves, or forceful vascular compression, and deviation from anatomical planes resulting in unreasonable hemorrhage or tissue tearing.

The image is clear and scientifically accurate, suitable for a 5-second microscopic world video.
具体要求: Create a breathtaking microscopic world video that takes the audience on a magical journey deep into the human eye, showcasing its complex anatomical structures and the remarkable processes that enable us to perceive light and color. Focus the video on the core anatomical components of the eye, including the cornea, iris, lens, and retina, demonstrating how they seamlessly cooperate to form our vision. Capture dynamic scenes such as the cornea refracting incident light, the iris adjusting to control pupil size, and the lens finely focusing light onto the retina. Highlight the retina’s photoreceptor cells, including rods and cones, which convert light into neural signals transmitted to the brain via the optic nerve, revealing the complexity of visual science. Emphasize the rich textures and details of ocular components, displaying the transparent layers of the cornea, the muscular fibers of the iris, the crystalline structure of the lens, and the nerve-rich surface of the retina. Include vivid representations of the aqueous humor and vitreous body, illustrating their roles in maintaining the eye’s shape and function. By immersively presenting these elements, provide a profound visual understanding of the structure and physiology of the visual system, underscoring its significance as an evolutionary marvel and a sensory organ critical to human vision, eye health, and ophthalmic research. Use this detailed visualization to educate and inspire across various contexts, from optometry and vision health education to genomic research and advancements in ophthalmology, targeting audiences passionate about human anatomy, vision care, and the scientific basis of eye function and diseases, as well as potential therapies and surgeries aimed at enhancing eye health and visual acuity.

rubrics_scientific.d1: The optical path and refraction behavior conform to physiological and physical principles, with the propagation, deviation, and convergence of light through the cornea, aqueous humor, lens, and vitreous body being appropriate, and the focal point accurately positioned on the retinal photoreceptor layer.
rubrics_scientific.d2: The morphology, stratification, and spatial relationships of key anatomical structures are accurate, with the anterior-posterior order and scale proportions of the cornea, iris, lens, and retina being reasonable and consistent.
rubrics_scientific.d3: The physiological dynamic processes are accurately represented, including the pupil reflex and lens accommodation responses to light intensity and viewing distance, as well as the temporal sequence and causal relationships of photoreceptor transduction of light signals into neural signals.
rubrics_scientific.d4: The optical and material properties of tissues and media are scientifically credible; transparent tissues exhibit low scattering consistent with their refractive indices; pigmentation and muscle fiber textures are appropriate; aqueous humor and vitreous body demonstrate stable weakly scattering fluid characteristics.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Penalty for Critical Scientific Errors: Inversion of anatomical location or hierarchical relationships, confusion between rod and cone photoreceptor functions, violations of geometric optics in light propagation, or severe deviation of the imaging focal point from the retina.

rubrics_visual.d1: Image clarity and the rendering of microscopic details are sharp, with clear edges of key structures. Fine textures and layering are discernible, without excessive noise reduction, over-sharpening, or smearing artifacts.
rubrics_visual.d2: Optical photorealism and accurate representation of transparent media, with natural refraction, reflection, and Fresnel effects; volumetric scattering and shadow energy distribution are physically plausible; depth of field transitions and focal shifts align with macro-scale visual perception; no presence of non-physical internal reflections, chromatic aberration, or light leakage.
rubrics_visual.d3: Accurate color reproduction and contrast control; natural color temperature and saturation; well-defined brightness dynamic range with no overexposure in highlights and preserved details in shadows; overall consistent tonal balance.
rubrics_visual.d4: The animation exhibits smooth kinematics and temporal coherence, with seamless deformation and displacement. Transitions in focal length and aperture are natural, motion blur corresponds appropriately to the frame rate, and there is no jitter, flicker, or sudden changes between frames.
rubrics_visual.d5: High physical consistency between modeling and materials, accurate geometric precision, reasonable surface roughness and anisotropy, matched subsurface scattering and volumetric density parameters, and coordinated texture resolution with spatial scale.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Fully present the continuous and coordinated process from the penetration of incident light through the cornea, the regulation of the pupil by the iris muscles, the focusing by the lens, to the formation of an image on the retina.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Accurately include and emphasize key anatomical and contextual elements: cornea, iris, lens, retina, and rod and cone cells; aqueous humor and vitreous body serving as environmental substrates, reflecting their material properties and refractive characteristics.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Clear presentation of core dynamics and temporal patterns: dynamics such as iris constriction/dilation, lens accommodation, and instantaneous photoreceptor responses exhibit a reasonable rhythm and natural transitions within approximately a 5-second duration.

任务: High-resolution microscopic video focusing on the dynamic interactions between human T cells and macrophages in lupus-associated inflammation. It meticulously depicts the texture of cell membranes and organelles, with intercellular biochemical signaling visualized through fluorescent markers, highlighting color changes in regions of cellular communication. The background is simple and blurred to emphasize the microscopic environment, with clear details and natural dynamics, suitable for a 5-second short video.
具体要求: Create a stunning high-resolution microscopic world video centered on the complex and dynamic interactions of human immune cells responding to lupus, featuring T cells and macrophages as the focal elements of this intricate scene. The video is set in a busy, detail-rich laboratory environment within an inflammation research institute, illustrating the in situ processes of immune cells recognizing, attacking, and communicating with each other, vividly demonstrating their roles in lupus-related inflammation. Capture the subtle textures of cell membranes and organelles, as well as the delicate biochemical signaling between cells, emphasizing the vivid color changes of fluorescent markers that indicate active cellular communication zones. The background should cleverly reflect a cutting-edge laboratory setup, with blurred scientific equipment conveying a high-tech research atmosphere, highlighting the routine laboratory work of dedicated clinical researchers such as Dr. Shereen Oon. The video should effectively convey the complexity of the research processes conducted at the institute and the potential benefits of scientific advancements, presenting this microscopic world with astonishing clarity and detail, transforming unseen microscopic drama into an educational and visually engaging narrative.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accurate identification of cell types and ultrastructural presentation: The morphology, nucleo-cytoplasmic ratio, plasma membrane folds/microvilli and pseudopodia, as well as the texture and distribution of organelles such as lysosomes and phagosomes of T cells and macrophages, conform to the characteristics of human-derived immune cells.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Accurate depiction of immune interaction mechanisms under inflammatory conditions: presenting antigen presentation and immunological synapse formation, costimulatory/inhibitory signaling, and cytokine communication with reasonable spatiotemporal sequence and contact region localization; without misrepresenting T cells as phagocytic or antibody-producing cells.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Reasonable scale and temporal dynamics: The size ratios and relative distances of cells, organelles, and signaling molecules are accurate at the micrometer/nanometer scale; within 5-second intervals, cell movement, deformation, and constrained diffusion speeds conform to cellular dynamics in a viscous medium, with no supraphysical acceleration or teleportation.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Fluorescent labeling and channel mapping are scientifically consistent: color channels clearly correspond to the labeled molecules/structures, and the localization, diffusion, and intensity variations of signals within immunological synapses or intracellular pathways conform to biochemical kinetics, avoiding non-physiological bleed-through or color misrepresentation across cellular volumes.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Consistency between imaging physics and microenvironment: Depth of field, noise/photobleaching, Brownian motion and membrane fluidity, trajectories of organelles along the cytoskeleton, and other factors must conform to the principles of microscopy and cellular biophysics. Medium properties indicated by culture medium or extracellular matrix should not be replaced by vacuum or frictionless scenarios.

任务: The moment of ovulation in the female ovary under the microscope, where a mature oocyte is released from a smooth follicle, with surrounding LH and FSH hormone molecules flowing intercellularly. The cellular structures are clear, the microscopic details are rich, scientifically accurate, suitable for a 5-second short video.
具体要求: Create an engaging and educational microscopic video focusing on the complex processes of fertilization, ovulation, and menstruation within the female reproductive system, detailing the dynamic interactions between hormones and reproductive organs. Begin with a close-up view of the endometrium during menstruation, showing the shedding of the uterine lining followed by its vigorous renewal. Smoothly transition to the follicular phase, illustrating the dynamic development of ovarian follicles, culminating in the spectacular event of ovulation, where a mature oocyte is released amidst a cellular activity marvel. Capture the subtle interplay of hormones such as estrogen, progesterone, luteinizing hormone (LH), and follicle-stimulating hormone (FSH), energetically and purposefully flowing through the bloodstream to coordinate the timing and events of the menstrual cycle. Emphasize the granular texture of menstrual blood, the smooth and glossy appearance of the ovary, and the detailed cellular structures of oocytes and sperm, showcasing the moment of fertilization and the transformation into a fertilized egg ready for implantation. Utilize various close-up shots to reveal the complex patterns of cell membranes, the dynamic hues of hormonal activity, and the rhythmic contractions of the uterus. Employ realistic and scientifically accurate animations to demonstrate how these processes are vital to reproductive health, ensuring an immersive experience that educates and fascinates audiences of all ages about the unparalleled complexity of female biology.

rubrics_scientific.d5: Biomechanical and fluid behavior are consistent: blood flow and tissue contraction direction, velocity magnitude, and viscosity correspond to the tissue scale; tissue deformation and follicle rupture exhibit progressive and localized changes rather than superphysiological jetting.

任务: Close-up of pancreatic islet β-cells under high-definition microscopy, dynamically showing glucose molecules entering the cells and triggering insulin granules to be released via exocytosis. The cell membrane and organelles are depicted with clear texture, with localized blurred immune cells approaching and initiating an attack, highlighting the microscopic moment of insulin secretion and immune assault.
具体要求: Produce a captivating high-definition microscopic world video that meticulously depicts the process of insulin production within the human body and its destruction by the immune system in type 1 diabetes. The primary focus of the video should be on the pancreatic β-cells located within the islets of Langerhans, emphasizing their role in insulin synthesis. The scenes should transition to close-up views of these β-cells actively secreting insulin, vividly illustrating complex cellular mechanisms such as glucose influx, signal transduction pathways, and exocytosis of insulin granules. As the sequence progresses, visualize the onset of type 1 diabetes by depicting the immune system’s attack on these β-cells, showcasing T cells, antibodies, and the release of inflammatory cytokines that lead to the gradual destruction of these critical insulin-producing cells. Emphasize the granular texture and detailed morphology of the cell membrane and organelles, as well as the intricate molecular interactions occurring throughout this process, portraying a dynamic cellular environment alongside the severe damage caused by the autoimmune response. This video should serve as an educational and visually stunning exploration, revealing the microscopic devastation of type 1 diabetes, capturing the tragedy endured by millions worldwide, and underscoring the relentless nature of the disease that necessitates lifelong insulin management.

rubrics_scientific.d1: The morphology, size proportion, and spatial relationships of pancreatic islet β-cells and islet microarchitecture are accurately rendered; the texture of the cell membrane and the ultrastructural characteristics of major organelles are consistent; adjacent capillaries and basement membrane are appropriately localized.
rubrics_scientific.d2: The glucose-stimulated insulin secretion signaling axis is scientifically rigorous, encompassing the causal sequence of glucose uptake and metabolism-induced changes in ATP/ADP ratio, closure of KATP channels, membrane depolarization and opening of voltage-gated Ca2+ channels, and Ca2+-triggered insulin secretion.
rubrics_scientific.d3: The sequential processes of insulin secretory granule storage, transport, docking, fusion, pore opening, release, and membrane retrieval are accurately represented, and the visualization of granule-membrane interactions mediated by SNARE mechanisms is consistent with established cell biology principles.
rubrics_scientific.d4: The immune attack mechanism of type 1 diabetes accurately corresponds to specific cell types, primarily mediated by T cell–driven cytotoxicity, accompanied by macrophages and pro-inflammatory cytokines; autoantibodies serve as disease markers rather than the principal effector agents.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Good cross-scale dynamic consistency, where molecular Brownian motion and diffusion, ionic currents and membrane potential variations, exocytosis event duration and frequency, as well as the effects of blood flow and concentration gradients on cellular responses, align with physical and physiological time scales.

任务: High-definition 3D microscopic animation focusing on female endometrial cells and the microvascular network, meticulously showcasing cellular textures, angiogenesis, and the dynamic moments of cellular secretion of signaling molecules. The environment is the endometrial microenvironment, scientifically accurate, featuring a single core scene, suitable for a 5-second microscopic world video.
具体要求: Create a captivating and scientifically detailed animated microscopic world video that delves into the complex anatomy and fundamental functions of the female reproductive system, with an emphasis on the extraordinary structures and hormonal interactions within the uterus and ovaries. The scene unfolds to present a medically accurate dynamic depiction of the pear-shaped uterus and almond-sized ovaries, revealing the layered complexity of the uterine wall, including the endometrium and myometrium. It captures the passage of the oocyte through the fallopian tube's infundibulum, ampulla, and isthmus, and includes the uterine fundus and cervical canal. Highlight the fascinating interplay of hormones such as FSH, LH, estrogen, and progesterone, illustrating how they coordinate the menstrual cycle, guide ovulation, and influence potential pregnancy or the transition to menopause. Textures should capture cellular structures with stunning precision, depicting endometrial angiogenesis, follicular maturation within the ovarian cortex, and the transformation of the corpus luteum. This immersive video combines high-definition 3D animation with engaging narration, providing an excellent learning experience suitable for biology, anatomy, and medical students, medical educators, curious learners, and advocates of women's health awareness. Keywords: female anatomy, 3D animation, reproductive health, estrogen, progesterone, menstruation, ovulation, pregnancy, menopause, uterine structure, ovarian function, health education, scientific video, medical animation, female hormones, fertility awareness.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accuracy of anatomical hierarchy and positional relationships: The morphology and relative positions of the uterus, ovaries, fallopian tubes, and cervix conform to anatomical standards; the uterine wall layering (endometrium and myometrium) is accurately depicted, and the connectivity and orientation of the endometrial microvascular network are appropriate.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Cellular and Tissue Scale and Morphometric Proportionality Science: The size, morphology, density, and texture of endometrial epithelium, stromal cells, capillary endothelium, and erythrocytes are within physiological ranges, exhibiting consistent cross-scale proportionality.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Hormonal regulation and physiological temporal sequence accuracy: The target sites, directional effects, and relative timing of FSH, LH, estrogen, and progesterone correspond causally and accurately to follicular development, ovulation, corpus luteum formation, endometrial proliferation/secretory transformation, and angiogenesis.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Consistency with dynamics and physicochemical processes: The direction of blood flow and velocity gradients, molecular diffusion and convection, spatial localization of receptor-ligand binding, and viscoelastic responses of cells and tissues adhere to established physicochemical laws without violating conservation principles or rate limitations.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Penalty for Major Scientific Errors: Misleading manifestations resulting from anatomical misalignment or scale distortion by orders of magnitude, reversal of sequential or causal relationships in key physiological processes, erroneous directional effects of core hormones, or inconsistencies across different scales.

任务: From a microscopic perspective, demonstrate gas exchange within the alveoli: oxygen molecules diffuse across the alveolar walls into the dense capillary network, while carbon dioxide molecules are expelled. Highlight the spongy structure of the alveolar walls and the intricate capillary network, dynamically depicting the movement of gas molecules and blood flow. The environment is the active microscopic space of the alveolar sacs, with delicate imagery, rich colors, and scientific accuracy, suitable for a 5-second microscopic world video.
具体要求: Create an engaging video showcasing the microscopic operations within the human lungs. The focus is on the structurally complex alveoli, where the vital gas exchange process occurs, illustrating oxygen diffusion into the bloodstream and carbon dioxide expulsion. The scene unfolds along the bronchial pathway, capturing the dynamic airflow through the bronchi and bronchioles, ultimately reaching the alveolar sacs, presenting vivid imagery of these delicate membranes facilitating this essential respiratory function. Emphasize the detailed texture and spongy appearance of the alveolar walls, along with the complex capillary network intertwined with the air sacs, providing an in-depth view of pulmonary function. The video should also depict the lung’s protective layers while highlighting the distinction between lobes—three unique lobes in the right lung and two in the left—coordinated with the rhythmic motion of the diaphragm, creating a stunning visual narrative designed for educational and medical audiences, perfectly blending science and art to elucidate the critical respiratory process.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accuracy of the alveolar-capillary barrier and network structure: The alveolar walls are thin and spongy, capillaries closely appose the alveolar septa, erythrocytes are confined within the vascular lumen, and the boundary between air and blood spaces is well-defined.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Scientific mechanism of gas exchange: Oxygen enters the blood along its partial pressure gradient, while carbon dioxide diffuses in the opposite direction; the transmembrane process is characterized by passive diffusion rather than active transport or convective transwall movement.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Scale hierarchy and proportions are reasonable: the relative size relationships among molecules, membrane thickness, red blood cells, capillaries, and alveoli are accurate, and the molecular movement step lengths and time scales are not unreasonably exaggerated.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Hemodynamic flow and ventilation dynamics conform to physiological conditions: laminar flow predominates within the microvasculature, with erythrocytes passing continuously through narrow capillary diameters; ventilation from the bronchi to the alveoli varies rhythmically with diaphragmatic movements, with ventilation-perfusion coupling maintaining directional consistency and absence of anomalous turbulence.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Organizational coverage and macroscopic anatomical presentation are appropriate: the expression of the alveolar epithelial lining and protective structures does not violate fundamental physiology; the number of left and right lung lobes and their relative positions, as well as the relationship with the direction of diaphragmatic movement, are accurate.

rubrics_visual.d2: Animation is smooth and adheres to the natural laws of motion; molecular and fluid movements are coherent without stuttering, and camera motion is stable with consistent rhythm.
rubrics_visual.d3: The 3D modeling demonstrates accuracy and a reliable sense of scale; the sponge-like tissue and network structure are coherent without intersections; topology and normals are correct; material thickness and micro-surface details are appropriate.
rubrics_visual.d4: Illumination, shadowing, and depth of field are handled with natural coherence; volumetric lighting and soft shadow transitions are smooth; the distribution of specular highlights and subsurface scattering energy is physically plausible; and the visual focus effectively emphasizes the subject.
rubrics_visual.d5: Color and contrast are harmoniously balanced, key elements are easily distinguishable, saturation and white balance are accurate, with avoidance of overexposure and crushed blacks.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Comprehensively depict the core process of gas exchange within the alveoli: from a microscopic perspective, the diffusion of oxygen across the alveolar wall into the dense capillary network, the removal of carbon dioxide, accompanied by blood flow and the dynamic trajectories of gas molecules.

rubrics_instruction.d3: Reflecting system-level anatomy and coordination: demonstrating the synergistic relationship between the pulmonary protective layer, the asymmetry in the number of left and right lung lobes, and the rhythmic movements of the diaphragm in airflow and alveolar function.

任务: Under the microscope, dynamically winding and unwinding of the DNA double helix structure, with a close-up highlighting the moment of mutation detection during sequencing: mutation sites are emphasized with bright colors and localized light effects, nucleotide gloss and fiber textures are clearly visible, the focus is on the dynamic changes of a single DNA strand, scientifically precise, suitable for a 5-second microscopic world video.
具体要求: Create an astonishing video capturing the complex and dynamic world of DNA under the microscope. The main theme of this scene is the DNA double helix structure intricately winding and unwinding as if alive, demonstrating its role in detecting mutations during sequencing that may lead to cancer. The scene should emphasize detailed visual representation of DNA strand entanglement, with close-up shots of the sequencing process where the strand is meticulously analyzed to identify mutations. Highlight the critical moment of mutation detection—visualized through changes in color, light flickering, or distinct alterations in the DNA strand texture. Emphasize the microscopic texture with stunning clarity, capturing the fibrous details of the DNA helix, the gloss and contours of nucleotides, and the rapid, almost pulsatile motion during genetic analysis. The video should illustrate how this sequencing is used to understand and potentially combat the transmissible cancer affecting Tasmanian devils, showcasing the profound impact of genomics. Conclude the video with a visually striking representation of these findings converging into conservation efforts, providing a powerful narrative of scientific intervention to prevent species extinction.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accurate representation of DNA double helix geometry and topology: right-handed B-form helix under common physiological conditions, distinguishable major and minor grooves, two antiparallel strands with continuous sugar-phosphate backbones, and base pairing that is complementary with appropriate morphological scale and proportions.
rubrics_scientific.d2: The dynamics of unwinding and rewinding are consistent with molecular mechanisms and physical constraints: local strand separation originates from hydrogen bond disruption and torsional stress relaxation, supercoiling and torque transmission follow coherent logic, with no spontaneous breakage or non-physical instant transitions across scales.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Mutation and sequencing visualization correspond to underlying biological principles: mutation markers are localized at the base/pair level and distinguish substitutions, insertions, or deletions; visual signals are consistent with detection mechanisms (e.g., fluorescence emission, nanopore current, synthesis sequencing events), and optical microscopy images are not directly equated with sequencing readouts.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Scale, temporal resolution, and imaging physics consistency: molecular scale matched to field of view magnification; dynamics reflecting Brownian motion and viscous damping; optical effects complying with scattering and diffraction limits, exhibiting photobleaching and noise characteristics.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Causal and Extrapolative Rigor in Scientific Narrative: The linkage from molecular-level signaling to disease or ecological outcomes is grounded in plausible mediating mechanisms and evidence, without overstating the explanatory power of any single observation.

rubrics_visual.d1: The image exhibits high clarity and finely detailed micro-textures, with the edges of the primary DNA strands sharply defined; local details remain free of blurring and moiré artifacts under close-up inspection.
rubrics_visual.d2: The winding and unwinding animations are continuous and smooth, with speed and rhythm consistent with micro-scale pulsations; trajectories remain stable without frame skipping, ghosting, or jittering.
rubrics_visual.d3: The handling of lighting and depth of field is natural; macro highlights and volumetric scattering are well controlled; localized flickering highlights are clean and do not exhibit overflow.
rubrics_visual.d4: The color rendition exhibits distinct gradations, with abrupt changes presenting clear contrast in hue and luminance that harmonize with the background colors without oversaturation, and the overall white balance remains stable.
rubrics_visual.d5: Material and surface texture are realistic, with credible nucleotide gloss, subsurface scattering, and fiber patterns; 3D modeling topology and detail density are uniform without mesh defects.

任务: Under the microscope, juxtapose lung cancer cells with healthy lung cells for comparison. The cancer cells exhibit irregular morphology, clear cell membrane textures, prominent nuclear granules, dynamic cytoplasmic flow, rapid division, and vivid coloration. The background features the lung tissue microenvironment, highlighting the differences in proliferation between cancerous and healthy cells, with rich visual details and dynamic microscopic representation.
具体要求: Create a captivating microscopic world video focusing on the complex development of lung cancer cells within the respiratory system. Depict scenes of abnormal lung cells characterized by irregular shapes and rapid division, uncontrollably proliferating within lung tissue to form small, invasive tumors. Emphasize the unique texture and vibrant coloration of cancer cells and their proliferation, contrasted against surrounding healthy lung cells, showcasing membrane smoothness, nuclear granularity, and cytoplasmic dynamics. Integrate dynamic visual transitions illustrating how carcinogens such as cigarette smoke particles and air pollutants damage DNA, leading to oncogenic mutations. Highlight the textural differences between small cell lung cancer and non-small cell lung cancer, focusing on distinct cellular morphologies and pathological features. Capture the impact on alveolar sacs and bronchi, revealing the microscopic obstructions these tumors cause to oxygen exchange and airflow, further detailing the macroscopic effects of smoking and genetic predisposition. Utilizing sophisticated 3D animation and hyper-realistic close-ups, this video serves as a valuable educational resource for medical students, biology educators, and anyone interested in understanding the biological complexity of lung cancer development, progression, and its effects on the respiratory system. It provides clear insights into cancer stages from initial mutation to potential metastasis. Include information on detection methods and treatment options, such as surgery, chemotherapy, radiotherapy, targeted therapy, and immunotherapy, aiming to enhance awareness and understanding of lung cancer complexity, the importance of early detection, and innovative therapeutic strategies based on current oncological research. This content is crucial for cancer awareness and promoting lung health, with potential themes of prevention and education, utilizing the latest medical animation techniques to offer a clear and comprehensive visual guide to this devastating disease.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accuracy of cellular and tissue scale and morphological relationships: Differences in size, shape, nuclear-cytoplasmic ratio, and membrane/nuclear texture between cancer cells and healthy lung cells, as well as the hierarchical and spatial relationships among alveoli, bronchi, and stroma, conform to established biological consensus.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Cellular physiology and tumor proliferation kinetics are presented coherently: mitotic phases and frequency, cytoplasmic streaming and cell migration velocity ranges, as well as temporal compression and annotations correspond to tumor biology and respiratory physiological principles.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Accurate expression of the mechanisms by which the lung tissue microenvironment and function are affected: the impact of tumors on airflow and oxygen exchange is manifested through mechanisms such as airway narrowing or obstruction, altered diffusion distance, ventilation-perfusion mismatch, and angiogenesis; changes in tissue boundaries and the basement membrane are clearly articulated.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Carcinogenic Effects and Molecular Mechanisms Visualization Science: The deposition and diffusion of inhaled particles in the airways and alveoli follow physicochemical principles; the sequential stages of DNA damage, mutation, clonal expansion, and invasion/potential metastasis are logically coherent; and the fundamental morphological and histological characteristics distinguishing small cell lung cancer from non-small cell lung cancer are clearly delineated.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Accuracy and Non-Misleading Presentation of Detection and Treatment Mechanisms: Principles of imaging and biopsy are correctly illustrated; typical therapeutic targets and cellular response directions for surgery, chemotherapy, radiotherapy, targeted therapy, and immunotherapy are accurately represented; the temporal scale of efficacy and side effects is conveyed without exaggeration.

rubrics_visual.d2: The 3D modeling and material rendering are realistic, with consistent geometric shapes and scale proportions; the semi-transparency and micro-surface roughness of microstructures such as membranes, nuclei, and cytoplasm are naturally represented.
rubrics_visual.d3: The lighting effects and depth of field are natural and stable, accurately reflecting microscopic optical characteristics such as subsurface scattering, volumetric scattering, refraction, and specular highlights, without flickering or exposure fluctuations.
rubrics_visual.d4: The animation exhibits smoothness and kinetic consistency, with coherent trajectories of cell division, cytoplasmic streaming, and particle/molecular motion, free from frame lag or jitter.
rubrics_visual.d5: Color reproduction and contrast relationships are harmonious; saturation and luminance are controlled appropriately; color separation between categories and layers is distinct yet natural.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Under microscopic view, present a comparative juxtaposition of lung cancer cells and healthy lung cells, highlighting key features such as irregular morphology, differences in texture and coloration, cytoplasmic dynamics, and rapid cell division, all situated within the pulmonary tissue microenvironment.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Throughout the disease course, dynamically depict the staged process of carcinogenic factors leading to DNA damage, mutation, proliferation, and potential metastasis, while differentiating morphological and textural differences between small cell and non-small cell lung cancer.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Accurately reflects the microscopic effects on alveoli and bronchi, demonstrating impairment of oxygen exchange and airflow obstruction, with background and details consistent with the respiratory system microenvironment settings.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Compliance with Technical and Optical Requirements: Microscale and hyper-realistic close-ups, complex 3D animations with smooth dynamic transitions, clear visualization of membrane textures and nuclear granules; adherence to specified duration, resolution, and viewing angles.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Educational and Informational Integrity: Covers cancer detection approaches and primary treatment modalities (surgery, chemotherapy, radiotherapy, targeted therapy, immunotherapy); content is scientifically accurate, based on current oncological research, and structured with clear instructional organization.

任务: 3D animation depicting the moment of fertilization inside the female fallopian tube, where a sperm penetrates the oocyte membrane. The scene focuses on the dynamic interaction between a single sperm and the oocyte, highlighting the structural changes of the oocyte membrane and the entry process of the sperm head. The animation delicately presents the texture of the cell surface and the vitality of the microscopic biological activity, with a simple background and an overall scientific and realistic style.
具体要求: Create a stunning microscopic world video that vividly explains female reproductive health through 3D animation, emphasizing the complex processes occurring during the female reproductive cycle. Delve into the microscopic realm by magnifying each subject and detail with unparalleled precision, beginning with the anatomical structures of the female reproductive organs — ovary, uterus, fallopian tube, cervix, and vagina — each rendered with exquisite and realistic detail. Witness the processes of fertilization and conception, where sperm and oocyte cells merge in an enchanting biological dance, showcasing their cellular interactions and biological symphony. Provide an in-depth exploration of the menstrual cycle, illustrating each stage from ovulation to menstruation, vividly portraying the texture and vitality of follicular development and endometrial shedding. Offer a comprehensive understanding of polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS) by observing cyst formation within the ovary and revealing its symptoms, causes, and impact within a highly detailed cellular environment. Ensure the presentation of the ovarian surface, the smooth muscular wall of the uterus, the delicate endometrium of the fallopian tube, and the texture of the cervical epithelium with exceptional clarity and realism, depicting the tactile environment of each organ system. Strive to create a cinematic experience where every frame holds educational value, clearly illustrating complex biological orchestration to engage students, educators, medical volunteers, and general audiences seeking knowledge about female health. Enhance the viewer’s journey through seamless transitions and immersive scenes, celebrating the wonders of reproductive anatomy while ensuring every microscopic component is sharply focused, emphasizing the unprecedented complexity of female health.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accurate Presentation of Key Fertilization Events and Their Timing: The processes of sperm-egg surface recognition, acrosome-related changes, penetration of the extracellular barriers, fusion with the oocyte plasma membrane, and the cortical reaction are presented coherently and in accordance with reproductive biology principles.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Accuracy of female reproductive system anatomy and spatial relationships: the morphology, stratification, and relative positions of the ovary, fallopian tube, uterus, cervix, and vagina conform to anatomical standards; the microscopic textures of tissue surfaces and endometrium closely correspond to histological features; morphological changes under pathological conditions are presented with scientific consistency.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Scale and order of magnitude consistency: The relative sizes and thicknesses of cells, subcellular structures, tissues, and organs are appropriate; the thicknesses of transparent structures and membrane layers are accurate at the correct order of magnitude; changes in microscopic magnification maintain coherent proportionality.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Physiological processes and dynamic behaviors are accurately represented: the temporal sequence of sperm motility and bodily fluid flow, fallopian tube ciliary beating and tubal wall peristalsis, as well as menstrual cycle phases and endometrial changes conform to established physiological and physical principles.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Penalties for Misleading or Pseudoscientific Elements: Inclusion of anthropomorphized causality, incorrect or exaggerated fertilization mechanisms, unsubstantiated optical or acoustic effects that obscure authentic structures, and inaccurately sourced organelles or tissue features.

rubrics_visual.d1: High image clarity and accurate restoration of microscopic details, with cell surface texture, membrane structures, and inner membrane patterns rendered sharply without excessive sharpening.
rubrics_visual.d2: High accuracy of 3D modeling and realistic material representation, with biologically accurate tissue morphology and proportions, showcasing delicate subsurface scattering, translucency, and viscoelastic texture.
rubrics_visual.d3: Natural control of lighting and depth of field; stable color reproduction and contrast; highlights are not overexposed, shadows retain gradation; background is simple and clearly guides the subject through focal shifts.
rubrics_visual.d4: The animation movement and camera transitions are smooth; cellular interactions and deformations are physically coherent, with no jitters, frame skipping, or excessive motion blur.
rubrics_visual.d5: Obvious artifacts and image defects (aliasing, noise, banding, compression blocks, texture stretching, shadow flickering, color bleeding)

rubrics_instruction.d4: Perspective and Camera Standards: Appropriate magnification at the microscale, continuous clear focus on the subject, seamless camera transitions and scene changes, with key processes unobstructed and identifiable.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Educational Expression and Timing Rhythm: The overall duration and pacing facilitate comprehensive understanding of all topics, with adequate time allocated to key moments, complemented by necessary annotations/narration to enhance learnability.

任务: High-resolution visualization of the dynamic release of the oocyte within the female follicle, with flowing LH hormone molecules traversing intercellular spaces, finely depicting the follicular cellular structural textures and vascularization features, while highlighting the impact of hormonal fluctuations on the ovarian microenvironment, such as early cellular changes associated with cyst formation. Vivid colors emphasize the ovarian microenvironment, scientifically accurate and visually immersive, suitable for a 5-second short video.
具体要求: Create a stunning and scientifically immersive video that delves into the microscopic world of the female menstrual cycle and polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS), focusing on the dynamic and complex details of oocytes and hormones at the cellular level. The core theme of the video should be the intricate ovulation process within the female reproductive system, emphasizing the journey of the oocyte, follicle formation, and the release of hormones such as LH, estrogen, and progesterone. This microscopic journey will showcase, through high-resolution imagery and seamless animation, how hormonal imbalances lead to ovarian cyst development, providing detailed insights into the mechanisms of PCOS. Depict hormonal exchange as a vibrant, flowing current regulating menstruation and ovulation, using textures to reveal the subtle structural details of follicles and corpora lutea. Illustrate ovarian vascularization throughout the menstrual cycle, emphasizing the cellular dynamics that cause common PCOS symptoms such as irregular menstruation, cyst formation, and hormonal fluctuations. Integrate scenes demonstrating the impact of insulin resistance on ovarian cells and how lifestyle changes and medication alleviate PCOS symptoms at the microscopic level. Employ a vivid color palette to portray different hormones and cellular elements, creating a visually engaging and educational experience that captures the complexity of PCOS and its effects on female health.

rubrics_scientific.d1: The morphology, stratification, and size proportions of ovarian follicles and oocyte-related cellular structures are scientifically consistent, with accurate spatial relationships among the oocyte, cumulus oophorus/radiate corona, granulosa cells, theca layers, basal membrane, and surrounding microvasculature.
rubrics_scientific.d2: The temporal sequence and causal chain of the ovulation process are accurate, with the LH surge preceding follicular wall rupture and cumulus expansion, followed by corpus luteum formation and revascularization. The concise narrative maintains causality without reversal or confusion.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Accurate representation of hormone dynamics and feedback mechanisms, with physiologically plausible spatial gradients and concentration variations of LH, estrogen, progesterone, and insulin signaling; molecular movements conform to diffusion/convection processes and receptor-ligand binding kinetics, without trajectories that violate physicochemical principles.
rubrics_scientific.d4: The organization of the microenvironment and hemodynamic characteristics are scientifically sound; the vascularization features of follicles and corpora lutea, capillary permeability and interstitial flow, extracellular matrix remodeling, as well as the mechanical representation of follicular wall tension and rupture are all appropriately demonstrated.
rubrics_scientific.d5: The pathological mechanisms related to PCOS are presented accurately without oversimplification, reflecting follicular development arrest and anovulation, the distinction between cystic changes and functional cysts, the impact of insulin resistance on steroidogenesis and cellular responses, as well as the progressive cellular effects of interventions.

rubrics_visual.d1: High image clarity with finely discernible microstructural textures; edges are clean and free of artifacts.
rubrics_visual.d2: Particle and cellular-level animations are coherent and smooth, camera movements are stable, and the temporal rhythm aligns with the narrative structure of the 5-second short film.
rubrics_visual.d3: Color coding differentiates distinct molecular and cellular components, with saturation and contrast harmonized naturally, while minimizing color bleed and banding artifacts.
rubrics_visual.d4: 3D modeling and texturing are realistic, with consistent proportions and morphology of cells, membranes, fluids, and blood vessels; translucency and viscoelastic texture are accurately represented.
rubrics_visual.d5: Volumetric lighting and depth of field are naturally and stably controlled; subsurface scattering is accurately represented; noise and flickering do not interfere with visual perception.

任务: Inside the coronary artery from a microscopic perspective, meticulously depicting the texture of the vascular wall and blood flow, focusing on the dynamic process of plaque gradually forming on the vessel wall. The visuals are delicate and realistic, emphasizing microscopic structures, light and shadow, and texture.
具体要求: Create a stunning and visually immersive microscopic world video that vividly brings to life the complex operation of the human heart, focusing on the captivating dynamics of cardiac function and the treatment of heart blockages. Begin by showcasing a magnified view of the heart’s interior, highlighting the atria, ventricles, and coronary arteries as they work in concert to pump blood throughout the body. As the heartbeat pulses on screen, introduce scenes of cardiac blockage, capturing in detail the process of plaque accumulation within the coronary arteries. Seamlessly transition into the angiography procedure, demonstrating how this diagnostic technique uses X-ray imaging to visualize blood vessels in real time. Through animation, illustrate various angioplasty maneuvers such as balloon angioplasty, carefully inflating a small balloon to clear the obstruction, followed by the precise insertion of a stent to keep the artery open. Transport the audience into a simulated open-chest coronary artery bypass grafting surgery, thoroughly presenting the creation of new blood flow pathways bypassing the blocked regions. Emphasize the texture of cardiac tissue and the anatomical features of cardiac instruments like atherectomy devices and excision catheters, which effectively break down stubborn plaque deposits. Capture the serene yet powerful imagery of these complex procedures that protect the heart from blockage threats, providing an educational and engaging visual experience. A wireless micro-camera traverses the bloodstream, capturing dynamic blood flow post-angioplasty, illustrating the heart’s restored vitality. This video serves not only as an educational tool for medical students and healthcare professionals but also appeals to anyone interested in understanding cardiac function. Employing rich detail, precise textures, and realistic illustrations, craft an eye-opening and informative portrayal that highlights the marvels of cardiology and the latest advancements in cardiac care treatments.

rubrics_scientific.d1: The stratification of the coronary artery wall and its spatial relationship with cardiac anatomy are accurately depicted, with plaques forming within the intimal layer and exhibiting physiologically plausible inward protrusion toward the lumen.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Hemodynamic and cardiac cycle synchronization: predominance of diastolic perfusion; flow velocity, shear stress, recirculation zone distribution before and after stenosis, and erythrocyte trajectories conform to principles of fluid mechanics and hemorheology.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Consistency of Scale and Proportion: The sizes of red blood cells and platelets, the thickness of the vascular wall and plaques, and the dimensions of stent struts are correctly scaled relative to the coronary artery lumen diameter; the temporal scale corresponds accurately to the heart rate and angiographic video frame rate.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Mechanistic presentation of the diagnostic and therapeutic process is scientific: contrast agent used in angiography fills and visualizes appropriately; balloon dilation transiently occludes and enlarges the lumen; stent apposes the vessel wall maintaining patency without obstructing critical branches; atherectomy devices remove plaques without damaging normal tissue layers; bypass surgery establishes collateral circulation and alters blood supply pathways.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Deductions for Scientific Inaccuracy and Perspective Confusion: instantaneous disappearance or absorption of plaques, blood flow not varying with the cardiac cycle, X-ray images displaying colors and perspectives inconsistent with imaging physics, and mixed use of microscopic/endoscopic and X-ray viewpoints.

rubrics_visual.d2: High fidelity in modeling and material realism, with accurate representation of the roughness, reflectivity, and translucency characteristics of biological tissues, fluids, and instruments.
rubrics_visual.d3: The animation and motion are coherent and smooth; blood flow and particulate dynamics are natural; structural growth and device interaction exhibit stable timing; camera movement is steady.

rubrics_visual.d5: Color and cross-paragraph style consistency is well maintained, with harmonious color temperature, contrast, and saturation, and smooth transitions between different imaging styles.

rubrics_instruction.d3: Compliance with perspective and camera instructions: Consistency between microscopic subjective perspectives (endoscopic/wireless miniature cameras) and macro-microscopic transitions; natural camera movements and transitions; focus on the target area.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Visual realism and technical specifications compliance: microstructures, lighting, and textures are lifelike; blood flow dynamics are credible; duration, pacing, and clarity meet the required standards.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Inclusion of content that deviates from the task or contradicts the given parameters: introducing irrelevant scenarios, omitting core steps, exhibiting disordered logical sequence, or presenting scientific inaccuracies.

任务: In the authentic skin tissue microenvironment, healthy melanocytes closely interact with keratinocytes, with clear visualization of cytoplasm, nucleus, and cell membrane structures. Pigment granules dynamically transfer between cells. Some melanocytes in the scene exhibit slight morphological and pigment distribution abnormalities, highlighting early cellular anomalies and intercellular biological interactions. The colors are vivid, and the details are rich, reflecting the dynamic changes within the microscopic world of the skin.
具体要求: Produce a stunning microscopic world video focusing on melanocytes and keratinocytes within the human skin environment, meticulously depicting the cellular biology and interactions between these cells. Illustrate the dynamic progression of melanoma development, showcasing the transformation of healthy melanocytes into malignant cells, while emphasizing rapid cell proliferation and invasion into deeper skin layers. Highlight exquisite details and textures within the cytoplasm, nucleus, and cell membrane, ensuring visualization captures color variations, intracellular structures, and interactions among different cell types. The video should vividly and clearly present early cellular abnormalities and changes, effectively conveying the importance of early detection, creating an engaging and informative visual journey into the microscopic universe of skin cells.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accurate correlation between skin tissue hierarchy and cellular localization: clear demarcation between epidermal layers and dermis with an intact basement membrane; melanocytes located in the basal layer forming the epidermal melanin unit with surrounding keratinocytes; directional and spatial pathways of malignant invasion breaching the basement membrane into the dermis are plausible.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Scientific accuracy in cellular and subcellular morphology and scale proportion: dendritic-like extensions of melanocytes; polygonal, layered arrangement of keratinocytes; nuclear-to-cytoplasmic ratio and cell size within conventional ranges; clearly defined but not exaggerated layers of cell membrane, nucleus, and cytoplasm; melanosome size and density appropriate relative to cellular scale.
rubrics_scientific.d3: The processes of melanogenesis and intercellular transport conform to physiological mechanisms: melanosomes are generated within melanocytes and transported along the cytoskeleton to dendrites, then transferred via exocytosis and vesicle-mediated pathways to keratinocytes through phagocytosis; post-transfer, melanosomes are distributed protectively in the perinuclear region of keratinocytes. The directionality and relative rate of pigment transfer between cells are consistent with established biological norms.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Malignant transformation and tumor growth dynamics conform to pathophysiological principles: progressive manifestations include cellular atypia, loss of polarity and adhesion, nuclear enlargement with hyperchromasia, increased mitotic figures, transition from radial to vertical growth with invasion into deeper layers; temporal sequence is coherent, avoiding abrupt, instantaneous transformation.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Exhibits exaggerated visualizations inconsistent with physiological significance or violations of microscopic physical principles (e.g., misleading structural implications due to overly saturated colors, super-scaled high-velocity particle movements, distortions in fluid viscosity and diffusion behavior, or clearly erroneous preservation of intact nuclei in the stratum corneum).

rubrics_visual.d1: Image clarity and fine presentation of microscopic details, with clear boundaries of cytoplasm, nucleus, and cell membrane; rich texture layers without excessive sharpening or smearing.
rubrics_visual.d2: The animation is temporally coherent and smooth, with pigment granule transport, cellular deformation, and division processes exhibiting fluid and stable transitions; camera movements and pacing are natural and free of stutters.
rubrics_visual.d3: Color and contrast are natural and accurate, with moderate saturation; color gradients and intensity variations are clearly distinguishable, highlighting key structures while avoiding color casts.
rubrics_visual.d4: The 3D modeling and material rendering are realistic, with cellular and microenvironment scales consistent; translucency and subsurface scattering are appropriately represented; light-shadow interaction and depth of field control are natural, enhancing volumetric perception and layering.
rubrics_visual.d5: Visual artifacts are well controlled, with the image free of noticeable noise, aliasing, compression blocks, ghosting, or flickering, and without excessive motion blur.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Comprehensively depict the interactions between melanocytes and keratinocytes within the skin microenvironment, including the dynamic transfer of pigment granules between cells, and coherently demonstrate the transition from healthy melanocytes to malignancy, accompanied by rapid proliferation and deeper tissue invasion.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Clear and distinguishable key structures such as cytoplasm, nucleus, and cell membrane; accurately representing intracellular texture and color variations; highlighting morphological and functional differences among distinct cell types.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Highlight early abnormal manifestations and the effect of information transmission, presenting subtle morphological and pigment distribution abnormalities, and emphasize the importance and scientific accuracy of early detection through annotation or comparison.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Maintain the hierarchical and contextual settings of the authentic skin tissue microenvironment, ensuring coherent and consistent element arrangement, cell density, and spatial relationships to accurately reflect the fidelity of the scene reconstruction.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Duration, clarity, magnification, and viewpoint stability that meet task requirements, with camera angles and editing supporting the recognizable and coherent presentation of dynamic processes.

任务: From a microscopic perspective within the bone marrow hematopoietic environment, healthy hematopoietic stem cells gradually transform into structurally abnormal leukemic cells, with delicate cell membrane textures and distinct structural differences. Chemotherapeutic drug molecules dynamically penetrate the bloodstream, precisely targeting and destroying leukemic cells, highlighting microscopic details and medical realism.
具体要求: Create a video that microscopically demonstrates the complexity of leukemia, emphasizing the formation and transformation of blood cells within human bone marrow. In this visually captivating scene, hematopoietic stem cells are initially depicted as healthy, progressively transitioning into leukemic cancer cells exhibiting multiple characteristic functional abnormalities. As the animation progresses, chemical interactions are vividly portrayed to reflect various therapeutic mechanisms. Observe chemotherapeutic agents, presented as dynamic, vivid molecular entities, traversing the bloodstream to actively locate and eradicate rapidly dividing cancer cells, while radiation therapy is depicted as focused beams penetrating the cellular environment to disrupt abnormal cell growth. At the molecular level, targeted therapy drugs bind through precise lock-and-key mechanisms to specific markers on leukemic cells, effectively inhibiting their proliferation. Experience the powerful symbolism of immunotherapy, where monoclonal antibodies are illustrated as protective shields attaching to leukemic cells, marking them for immune-mediated destruction. Watch the detailed process of stem cell transplantation, with bright healthy stem cells integrating into the bloodstream to initiate normal hematopoiesis. From the texture of the cell membrane, the structural complexity of cancer markers, to the hemodynamics of blood vessels, every detail is meticulously rendered to convey the immense struggle at this microscopic scale, aiming to understand and combat leukemia. #LeukemiaFight #MicroscopicWorld #MedicalAnimation

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accuracy of bone marrow microenvironment structure and cellular composition: appropriate spatial relationships and magnitude-level proportions among sinusoidal vasculature, stromal cells, hematopoietic stem/progenitor cells, and mature blood cells.
rubrics_scientific.d2: The pathological progression from hematopoietic stem cells to leukemic cells is scientifically presented, with features such as clonal expansion, differentiation arrest, and proliferative imbalance displayed in a coherent chronological sequence, accompanied by consistent morphological and functional alterations.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Visualization of therapeutic mechanisms and accuracy of molecular action pathways: Chemotherapy targets the DNA/mitotic processes of rapidly dividing cells; targeted drugs specifically bind to pathogenic markers or signaling pathways; radiotherapy induces DNA damage with spatial dose attenuation; immunotherapy achieves antibody labeling and recruits effectors for clearance; stem cell transplantation demonstrates homing, engraftment, and hematopoietic reconstitution.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Good consistency between scale and dynamics: coordination of cell-to-molecule size ratios, diffusion and convection, membrane permeability and receptor binding–dissociation kinetics, as well as hemodynamic shear and viscosity characteristics across temporal and spatial scales.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Ultrastructural and surface marker characteristics of cells are credible: features such as the bilayer texture of the cell membrane, distribution of receptors/antigens, nucleocytoplasmic ratio, and chromatin status are consistent with the differences between healthy and leukemic cells.

rubrics_visual.d1: High clarity and readability of microscopic details, with clean edges of key cellular and molecular structures, and fine, non-blurred texture.
rubrics_visual.d2: High accuracy in cellular and molecular modeling, with realistic representations of membranes, nuclei, proteins, and other materials; clear differentiation in the expression of normal and abnormal structures.
rubrics_visual.d3: The animation is smooth and consistent with microscopic dynamics, with continuous and stable deformation, splitting, penetration, and fusion processes, free of stuttering or unnatural abrupt transitions.
rubrics_visual.d4: Lighting and depth of field are handled naturally; volumetric scattering, subsurface scattering, and refraction/reflection are coherently integrated; spatial layering and focal guidance are clear.
rubrics_visual.d5: Color saturation and contrast are scientifically harmonized, ensuring a credible medical texture that emphasizes key features without excessive enhancement or color distortion.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Comprehensively depict the progressive transformation of healthy hematopoietic stem cells to structurally abnormal leukemic cells within the bone marrow microenvironment, with core scenarios and task objectives effectively implemented.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Comprehensively present the therapeutic mechanisms explicitly outlined in the task, including their dynamic roles at molecular and cellular levels, reflecting key processes such as targeting, binding, disruption, and inhibition.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Consistency of Perspective and Medical Texture: A microscopic perspective is maintained throughout; the cell membrane texture is delicate, pathological structural differences are clearly defined, and the hemodynamic behavior of blood and vessels is convincingly represented.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Elements and Temporal Specifications: Comprehensive inclusion of key cellular, molecular, and environmental components; clearly defined stages of transformation and therapeutic processes; logical coherence; and emphasis on critical information.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Compliance with Technical Specifications: Video duration, resolution, frame rate, and shot transition pace conform to the specified requirements; the narrative is clear and maintains readability appropriate for medical science communication.

任务: From a microscopic perspective, the tricuspid structure of the aortic valve dynamically opens and closes within the cardiac tissue microenvironment. The texture details of healthy and diseased regions on the valve leaflets are clearly visible. Minimally invasive surgical instruments delicately touch the edges of the valve, highlighting the valve's microanatomy and biological functions. The overall scene is scientific and refined, focusing on a single minimally invasive surgical scenario.
具体要求: Create a captivating microscopic world video that deeply explores the complex process of aortic valve replacement surgery, with particular emphasis on detailed anatomical structures and the surgical techniques involved. The primary subject of the video is the aortic valve located between the left ventricle and the aorta, showcasing its unique biological structure and functional mechanisms. The scene should depict a vivid surgical procedure, meticulously replacing a malfunctioning aortic valve, emphasizing surgical maneuvers such as making incisions around the damaged valve, the removal process, and the implantation of the new valve. Highlight the cardiopulmonary bypass machine as a technological marvel, demonstrating its role in diverting blood and taking over cardiac and pulmonary functions during surgery. Add realistic textures and details to the valve leaflets, illustrating the differences between healthy, smooth tricuspid leaflets and defective valves exhibiting features of aortic stenosis or insufficiency. Capture subtle yet critical biological changes by demonstrating their evident impact on the myocardium, engaging the audience with depictions of heart failure conditions, as well as the complexity of the pericardium and sternum essential to the surgery. The video should present microscopic details of human tissue, cardiac environment, and medical instruments with stunning clarity, ensuring every microscopic element is vividly brought to life through exquisite animation, educating and captivating viewers into the fascinating cellular-level world.

rubrics_scientific.d1: The anatomical depiction of the aortic valve tri-leaflet morphology and its spatial relationships with adjacent structures is accurate, encompassing the tri-leaflet configuration, the annulus and the sinuses of Valsalva, as well as the continuity between the left ventricular outflow tract and ascending aorta; the morphological differences between healthy and pathological leaflets in terms of thickness, calcification/hypertrophy, and marginal defects correspond to established pathological principles.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Valve opening and closing kinetics and hemodynamics conform to the cardiac cycle pattern, with correctly timed pressure gradient-driven flow; coaptation lines and regurgitant pathways in case of insufficiency are appropriately represented; the trends and magnitudes of stenotic jet, turbulence, and shear stress distribution are scientifically consistent.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Multiscale and material consistency achieved: cellular-level textures, tissue morphology, and instrument size proportions are coherent; elastic/viscoelastic deformation amplitudes and response speeds of valve leaflets and myocardium are realistic; temporal scales and sequences of events correspond to the context of cardiac surgery.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Surgical Workflow and Instrument-Tissue Interaction Scientific Validity: Logical correctness in lesion excision, implant placement positioning, and fixation steps; tissue deformation, hemorrhage/hemostasis, and frictional effects induced by instrument contact conform to biomechanical principles and fundamental surgical techniques.
rubrics_scientific.d5: The mechanism of extracorporeal circulation operation and intraoperative physiological environment changes are accurately demonstrated: correct direction of blood diversion and oxygenation circuit, clear cardiopulmonary function takeover effect; reasonable trends of cardiac chamber filling and contractility changes, as well as perfusion and temperature management impacts on tissue coloration and hemodynamics.

rubrics_visual.d1: Image clarity and microscopic detail presentation are finely rendered, with clear delineation of tissue texture, instrument markings, and boundaries; noise is controlled without excessive sharpening or smudging.
rubrics_visual.d2: Animation is smooth and temporally stable, with coherent deformation, fluid, and tissue interactions; contact and sliding are natural, exhibiting no jitter, stutter, or temporal flickering.
rubrics_visual.d3: Material and lighting color are physically plausible; subsurface scattering and metallic/dielectric reflections are realistic; specular highlights and volumetric lighting are coherent; white balance, saturation, and contrast appear natural; depth of field and motion blur correspond appropriately at the microscale.
rubrics_visual.d4: High-quality modeling and texturing with accurate geometric details and proper topology; no broken faces or low-polygon errors; UV unwrapping free of stretching; consistent normal, displacement, and roughness maps with sufficient resolution.
rubrics_visual.d5: Visual artifacts and technical defects, such as aliasing, moiré patterns, compression blocks, color banding, shadow bleeding, texture clipping, lighting flicker, or noise accumulation

rubrics_instruction.d1: Fully accomplish the core scenarios and themes of the task by focusing on a single minimally invasive surgical procedure from a microscopic perspective, coherently presenting the dynamic functions and key steps related to the specified target structure.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Accurately represents the key anatomical structures and pathological contrasts required by the task, with clear detailed textures and functional characteristics of the target structures, and distinctly demonstrates the differences between healthy and diseased tissues.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Includes and accurately demonstrates the specified key elements and the functions of devices within the environmental context; establishes a logical closed loop among surgical instrument interactions, the operation of blood diversion devices, the relationships and processes involving related tissues and biological effects, and the surgical procedures.
rubrics_instruction.d4: The perspective and technical specifications meet the required standards; microscopic clarity and stable lens focus are achieved; duration and pacing cover the key task segments with clear information delivery.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Presence of off-topic content or violations of scientific principles and instructions, such as multiple scene stacking, deviation from a microscopic perspective, omission of key elements, divergence from technical specifications, or exaggerated and inaccurate representations.

任务: From a microscopic perspective, the glomerulus' dense capillary network dynamically filters blood within Bowman's capsule. The diameter difference between the afferent and efferent arterioles generates high filtration pressure, driving water, amino acids, glucose, and ions through a selectively permeable membrane into Bowman's capsule, while plasma proteins and red blood cells are retained. The granular texture of the cell membranes and the delicate flow of transparent fluid are finely rendered, highlighting the microscopic dynamics and intricate structures of glomerular filtration.
具体要求: Create a breathtaking video capturing the microscopic world of renal function, focusing on an astonishing level of detail. This scene should depict the complex process of urine formation within the nephron, emphasizing the functions of the glomerulus and renal tubules. The video should dynamically present glomerular filtration beginning in the renal corpuscle, illustrating the rich capillary network of the glomerulus interacting with Bowman's capsule, and highlighting the high filtration pressure caused by the diameter difference between the afferent and efferent arterioles. It should demonstrate the selective permeability of the membrane, where smaller molecules such as water, nitrogenous wastes, amino acids, glucose, sodium ions, and calcium ions are forced into Bowman's capsule under this pressure, while larger entities like plasma proteins and red blood cells remain in the bloodstream. As the scene progresses, animate tubular reabsorption in the renal tubules, focusing on the proximal tubule, loop of Henle, distal tubule, and collecting duct, showing glucose, amino acids, and various ions being actively transported into the peritubular capillaries, accompanied by osmotically driven water reabsorption. Finally, depict tubular secretion in the distal tubule, emphasizing the transfer of nitrogenous wastes, hydrogen ions, and potassium ions from the peritubular capillaries into the tubular fluid, culminating in urine formation. Throughout the video, emphasize textural details such as the granular quality of cell membranes, the smooth and complex surfaces of the tubules, and the contrasting transparency of fluids during transformation and flow, ensuring the complexity and precision of renal function are clearly conveyed.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accurate anatomical structure and scale relationship of the glomerulus and nephron: the continuity, relative positioning, and proportional diameters of the afferent arteriole—glomerular capillary tuft—Bowman's capsule—proximal convoluted tubule—Henle's loop—distal convoluted tubule—and collecting duct are reasonable; the glomerular capillaries are densely intertwined and located within the lumen of Bowman's capsule.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Glomerular hemodynamics and pressure sources are correct: the afferent arteriole has a larger diameter than the efferent arteriole, generating higher filtration hydrostatic pressure; the direction of blood flow and velocity gradient are appropriate; only filtrate without blood cells returns to Bowman's space.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Scientific demonstration of selective permeability of the filtration barrier: intact trilaminar structure comprising endothelial fenestrae, glomerular basement membrane, and podocyte slit diaphragms; permeable to water, nitrogenous waste, amino acids, glucose, and common ions; plasma proteins and erythrocytes are restricted, resulting in low-protein filtrate.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Accurate segment-specific mechanisms of reabsorption and secretion: the proximal tubule reabsorbs large amounts of glucose, amino acids, and Na+ accompanied by osmotic water flow; the thick ascending limb of the loop of Henle actively transports NaCl and is impermeable to water, establishing a medullary osmotic gradient; the distal tubule and collecting duct regulate Na+, K+, H+, and water, with directional substance exchange across peritubular capillaries accurately maintained.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Scale, temporal, and physical consistency: molecular diffusion, convection, and osmosis conform to physico-chemical laws; liquid transparency, viscosity, and flow velocity correspond appropriately to the scale; the process sequence from filtration → reabsorption → secretion → urine formation is coherent and continuous.

rubrics_visual.d1: Image clarity and fine representation of microscopic details are evident, with clean edges and distinct hierarchical layers of key structures.
rubrics_visual.d2: High realism in 3D modeling and material rendering: accurate representation of the granular texture of the cell membrane, refraction and volumetric effects of transparent fluids, and the microstructure and thickness variation of the tubular walls.
rubrics_visual.d3: Animation Smoothness and Physical Realism: Molecular and microfluidic motions are coherent, with smooth transitions in deformation and transmembrane processes, exhibiting no stuttering or jittering.
rubrics_visual.d4: Excellent lighting and color management: consistent light direction, appropriate shadows and subsurface scattering, effective use of volumetric lighting and depth of field to guide the viewer's attention, with natural color saturation and contrast.
rubrics_visual.d5: Visual Artifacts and Technical Defects: Issues such as noise, flickering, moiré patterns, compression blocks, banding, aliasing, color bleeding, and exposure shifts are prominent and interfere with the image quality.
