任务: From a microscopic perspective, dynamically depict the early formation of diverticula as the mucosal and submucosal layers slightly protrude at weak points of the colonic wall due to increased pressure. Provide a detailed presentation of the texture of each colonic layer and the microvascular structure of the rectal arterioles. Contrast the microscopic states of healthy tissue with inflammatory purulent sacs during diverticulitis episodes. The imagery should be clear, scientific, and emphasize changes in microstructures.
具体要求: Produce a stunning microscopic world video focusing on the complex structure and function of the human colon, with particular emphasis on diverticular disease. The core theme should highlight the layers of the colon, illustrating the formation and progression of diverticula in the distal large intestine. Dynamic scenes will depict the development of these sac-like structures, showing how the mucosal and submucosal layers protrude through weak points in the colonic wall, visualizing the direct impact of increased pressure caused by factors such as constipation and straining during defecation. Pay meticulous attention to detail and texture, emphasizing the distinct layers of the colon: mucosa, submucosa, muscularis, and serosa, including the fine vascular network supplying the colon known as the rectal arterioles. The video should capture subtle textural differences among these layers and demonstrate how diverticular disease manifests and progresses, illustrated by comparisons between healthy tissue and inflammatory purulent sacs during diverticulitis attacks. Highlight the motility and contraction of the colonic wall in response to a fiber-rich dietary intervention aimed at promoting peristalsis and preventing internal pressure buildup. The visual texture should be rich and scientifically accurate, making this video a valuable educational tool for understanding the pathophysiology and management of diverticular disease and diverticulitis.

rubrics_scientific.d1: The layered structure and tissue texture of the colonic wall are accurately represented, with appropriate thickness and proportion of each layer. The boundaries and continuity between the mucosa, submucosa, muscularis, and serosa/adventitia are clearly delineated, exhibiting characteristic relative thinning at sites of vascular penetration.
rubrics_scientific.d2: The dynamics and morphology of diverticulum formation are consistent with pathophysiological mechanisms: when intraluminal pressure increases, the mucosa and submucosa herniate outward through areas of muscularis weakness, with the muscularis not constituting the diverticular wall; the development process is continuous and can be tracked.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Microcirculatory anatomy and hemodynamic features: The orientation, branching patterns, and caliber hierarchy of straight vessels and the mucosal–submucosal capillary network are appropriate; arterial and venous wall characteristics are distinctly differentiated; erythrocyte scale and flow velocity correspond proportionally to vessel diameter.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Accuracy of microscopic changes in the inflammation and suppuration phases: the temporal and spatial distribution of local edema, hyperemia, exudation, and neutrophil infiltration is consistent and appropriate; the degree of tissue structural damage and boundary indistinctness correlates with the severity of inflammation and is scientifically contrasted with healthy tissue.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Good consistency in scale and temporal sequence reflecting intervention causality: coordinated relative scales among cells, blood vessels, diverticula, and wall thickness; reasonable temporal relationship between peristaltic waves and luminal pressure changes; scientifically causal chain demonstrating the effects of a fiber-rich diet in enhancing fecal volume and peristalsis while reducing luminal pressure.

rubrics_visual.d1: High image clarity and fidelity of microscopic details, with clearly defined structural layering boundaries and richly detailed textures without excessive sharpening.
rubrics_visual.d2: High fidelity in 3D modeling accuracy and material representation, with coherent tissue layering and vascular network topology, consistent scaling, and credible subsurface scattering and moist surface texture.
rubrics_visual.d3: Light and color management demonstrate a natural scientific basis; macro lighting is uniform; shadow transitions are smooth; color accuracy and contrast are precise; white balance is stable; depth of field guidance is clear.
rubrics_visual.d4: The animation exhibits excellent temporal coherence, with continuous and stable deformation of structures, fluid, and particle motion. Camera movement is smooth, free of jitter and stuttering.
rubrics_visual.d5: Artifacts and quality defects are well controlled; deductions apply when noise, compression block artifacts, moiré patterns, edge flickering, texture stretching, and aliasing are conspicuously present.

任务: Under a high-precision microscopic perspective, dynamically display the weakening elasticity of the fibrous structures in the human pelvic cavity tissues, with clear visualization of local bulging in the bladder urethra, fiber rupture, and elastic changes. The environment should be minimalistic, highlighting the regions with diminished support, and the imagery must deliver a strong visual impact and immersive experience, lasting approximately 5 seconds.
具体要求: Produce a visually stunning and content-rich microscopic world video focusing on the complex structures within the human pelvic cavity, emphasizing pelvic tissue weakening that may lead to organ displacement. The scene should dynamically depict medical conditions such as bladder urethral bulging, rectal prolapse, small intestine prolapse, and uterine prolapse, with detailed explanations of their pathogenesis and potential subsequent surgical interventions. Ensure the video presents the texture of pelvic tissues with high precision, capturing their fibrous and elastic properties, and prominently highlighting the affected areas where tissue support weakening causes organ sagging and displacement. This animation must immerse viewers in microscopic details, clearly illustrating tissue layers and vividly portraying memorable surgical techniques.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accuracy of pelvic anatomical layers and topological relationships: The hierarchical structure, orientation, and relative positions of the bladder, urethra, uterus/vagina, rectum, small intestine, pelvic floor muscles, fascia, and ligaments conform to standard human female anatomy.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Scale and proportion rationality: The thickness of tissue layers, fiber diameter and bundle density, organ size, and their micro-to-macro scaling relationships are consistent, with deformation scales corresponding appropriately to the actual physiological range.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Scientific Representation of Tissue Mechanics and Material Properties: The anisotropy, viscoelasticity, and stress–strain response of collagen and elastic fibers are plausibly exhibited, with credible thresholds and morphological manifestations of elastic degradation and fiber rupture.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Correct pathological process and organ displacement mechanism: The weakening of support structures under increased intra-abdominal pressure induces bladder/urethral prolapse, rectal prolapse, small bowel prolapse, and uterine prolapse, with their sites, directions, and causal sequences consistent with biomechanical principles and clinical understanding.
rubrics_scientific.d5: The description of surgical treatment and repair mechanisms is accurate: the surgical anatomical planes, anchoring points, and the biomechanical principles of materials (such as the improvement of mechanical support through suspension and repair) are presented scientifically, avoiding risks of misrepresentation and overstatement of effects.

任务: Microscopic close-up of cyst cells in polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS), delicately showcasing the cellular surface texture and contours, with dynamic interactions of three hormone molecules (androgens, insulin, luteinizing hormone) surrounding the cells. The cellular microresponses under hormonal influence gradually emerge, set against the microscopic structure of ovarian tissue. The imagery is richly colored, evoking a sense of mysterious exploration.
具体要求: Create a visually stunning and intricately detailed microscopic world video focusing on the complex and hidden universe within the female reproductive system, with a particular emphasis on the hormonal interactions involved in polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS). Deeply explore the awe-inspiring cellular processes by capturing the dynamic interplay of hormones such as androgens, insulin, and luteinizing hormone (LH) within the intricate ovarian environment. Depict the enigmatic development of cysts at the cellular level, illustrating their formation process and impact on ovarian tissue, with close-up shots detailing their unique texture, contours, and transformations. Translate hormonal fluctuations and cellular responses into animated sequences that demonstrate PCOS-related symptoms, including menstrual irregularities, weight gain, and acne. Enrich the scene through hyper-realistic representations of genetic and environmental factors interacting with these processes. Employ advanced visualization techniques to present precise diagnostic criteria at the microscopic scale, such as ultrasound imaging and blood test results. Capture the effects of various treatment modalities—from lifestyle modifications to pharmacological and fertility therapies—through detailed animations of molecular changes and the challenges faced by PCOS patients. Integrate layers of organic detail, color, and texture to emphasize the complexity and beauty of the reproductive system under this common hormonal disorder. Design the video to engage, educate, and inspire viewers, fostering a comprehensive understanding of PCOS and its management by seamlessly weaving elements of mystery, exploration, and education. The production should emulate a high-quality scientific documentary grounded in sophisticated graphics and visual storytelling, providing profound insights into female health, hormonal dysregulation, and the PCOS journey.

rubrics_scientific.d1: The relationship between tissue organization and cellular morphology and scale is accurate; hierarchical structures and arrangements are reasonable; pathological features are presented in accordance with academic consensus, avoiding the exaggeration of microscopic units as macroscopic structures.
rubrics_scientific.d2: The hormone-receptor localization and interaction mechanisms are accurate, with clear differentiation between molecular roles and targets of action; the direction of signal transduction and the expression of primary cellular effects are logically consistent.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Dynamics and temporal scale science: hormonal fluctuations, diffusion and receptor saturation, as well as delays and feedback loop manifestations in cellular responses, conform to physiological principles.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Molecular and cellular movements comply with physicochemical laws; Brownian motion and concentration gradient-driven processes, as well as transmembrane transport mechanisms and their energy dependence, exhibit consistency; the microenvironmental viscosity and flow field magnitudes are within reasonable ranges.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Multiscale information is presented with clear boundaries; the visualization of clinical imaging and blood biomarkers, as well as their mapping to microscopic scenarios, is scientifically valid; the depiction of therapeutic intervention mechanisms and outcomes is evidence-based and does not exaggerate causality.

rubrics_visual.d1: The image exhibits high clarity with strong discernibility of microscopic details, presenting fine resolution of cell surface texture and contours as well as tissue stratification.
rubrics_visual.d2: The animation is smooth and stable, with molecular movement trajectories exhibiting natural and coherent gradients and transitions corresponding to cellular responses, free from jitter and lag.
rubrics_visual.d3: Color and contrast are properly controlled, with consistent and clear color coding of hormones and tissues, resulting in an overall rich yet scientifically credible presentation.
rubrics_visual.d4: The light and shadow rendering and depth of field are realistic, with clearly defined microenvironmental layers; shadow and highlight transitions are smooth, without noticeable noise or color banding.
rubrics_visual.d5: The 3D modeling and material consistency are well-maintained, with appropriate proportions between cells and cyst structures. Surface undulations and textures are harmoniously integrated, without geometric interpenetrations or aliasing artifacts.

rubrics_instruction.d33: Technical specifications and visual style compliance: The microscopic close-up/macro perspective is stable, with camera movements and editing rhythm supporting the gradual emergence of microscopic reactions; the duration, resolution, and color gradation of the footage meet the description requirements, while creating a consistent sense of mysterious exploration and the tone of a scientific documentary.
rubrics_instruction.d44: Effective integration of popular science extension content: presented in an auxiliary manner to illustrate the influence of genetic and environmental factors, diagnostic information (such as visualization of ultrasound imaging and blood markers), and treatment methods on the molecular level, without interfering with the core narrative while enhancing the educational completeness.
rubrics_instruction.d55: Penalty for Major Deviations: Points will be deducted according to the severity of issues such as missing or diminished core components, omission or mislabeling of key hormonal elements, scenes departing from the microscopic context or backgrounds inconsistent with ovarian tissue settings, significant deviations from technical specifications, or an excessive proportion of irrelevant content.

任务: In the microscopic world, T cells dynamically interact with foreign antigens through extended green pseudopodia, with detailed visualization of surface microvilli structures. The contact sites emit a bright glow, highlighting their critical role in immune surveillance. The background is blurred, with other immune cells faintly visible, focusing the composition on the core interaction between T cells and antigens. The scene is vivid and delicate, carrying significant medical educational value.
具体要求: Create a visually stunning microscopic world video that delves into the complex dynamic environment of the human immune system, showcasing the central theme of T cell and antigen dynamic interactions. Present a vivid and captivating scene that reveals the complexity of inflammation in autoimmune diseases. Emphasize richly animated interactions, with T cells actively engaging foreign antigens through their extendable pseudopodia, demonstrating their key role in immune surveillance and defense mechanisms. Capture the remarkable details of T cell surface textures, characterized by intricate microvilli structures and varying shades of green, which transform into a bright glow upon synapse formation with antigens. The background should be filled with lively depictions of other immune cells, including B cells and macrophages, each rendered with ultra-fine realistic textures and authentic movements, emphasizing their unique functional mechanisms within this microscopic arena to enhance educational understanding.

rubrics_scientific.d1: The immunological synapse exhibits accurate structural and compartmental organization, demonstrating spatial stratification characterized by microvilli-mediated initial contact, a central activation zone with receptor-ligand microcluster aggregation, and a peripheral adhesion molecule-dense stabilization ring.
rubrics_scientific.d2: The morphological features and relative size proportions of cell types are appropriate; the size, contour, and surface texture of T cells, B cells, and macrophages/antigen-presenting cells fall within biological norms, with consistent units of scale and magnification.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Dynamic interactions and temporal sequences consistent with immune surveillance and inflammatory processes, reflecting the temporal order and duration of T cell rapid scanning—brief arrest—stable synapse formation—signal integration—dissociation and migration.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Signal visualization and spatial localization correspond with activation mechanisms; localized enhancement at contact sites is confined to the immunological synapse, accompanied by receptor clustering and intracellular signaling fluctuations, without non-specific whole-cell or adjacent cell synchronous luminescence.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Molecular and cellular movements adhere to biophysical principles; intramembrane molecular diffusion coexists with confined diffusion; cellular deformation corresponds to adhesion forces; Brownian motion of particles aligns with the viscosity of the medium.

rubrics_visual.d1: Image clarity and fidelity of microscopic details: The subject edges are sharp and stable, microstructures (such as cell membrane textures, surface protrusions, and granules) exhibit clear hierarchical distinctions, without excessive sharpening or blurring, and the focus is precise, highlighting the core interactions.
rubrics_visual.d2: 3D Modeling and Material Realism: Geometry topology is reasonable with consistent scale proportions; materials accurately represent microscopic properties such as translucency and subsurface scattering, while normal and displacement maps exhibit continuous detail without stretching or surface artifacts.
rubrics_visual.d3: Natural control of lighting, color, and depth of field: lighting exhibits rich layering with soft shadows free of light leakage; glow and volumetric lighting are moderate without overexposure; color saturation and contrast are balanced, with a pure hue in the dominant color without color cast; depth of field and bokeh are smooth, with background layers distinctly separated to emphasize the subject.
rubrics_visual.d4: Animation Smoothness and Temporal Consistency: Continuous and jitter-free transitions in deformation, contact, and separation actions without ghosting; smooth inter-frame interpolation without tearing; micro-scale motion rhythm and damping are consistent, with natural velocity curves.
rubrics_visual.d5: Visual Artifacts and Noise: Presence of noticeable flickering, banding, aliasing, blocky compression artifacts, or detail loss caused by excessive denoising; severe highlight clipping or prominent volumetric/particle rendering sampling noise.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Prominently display the dynamic contact between T cells and foreign antigens mediated by green pseudopodia, with a bright glow appearing at the immunological synapse, and maintain the focal plane consistently centered on the core interaction.
rubrics_instruction.d2: High-resolution details capturing the microvilli on the surface of T cells with varying depths of green layers; the texture is realistic and exhibits coherent variations.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Proper application of background blurring and depth of field; B cells and macrophages are presented at a subordinate level with realistic motion and fine textures, without interfering with the primary interactions.
rubrics_instruction.d4: The visual narrative supports the objectives of medical education by clearly conveying the key points of immune surveillance and defense mechanisms, while highlighting the complexity of autoimmune inflammation.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Significant deviations conflicting with the instructions (including divergence from core interactions, absence of critical elements such as pseudopodia/glow/microvilli, background subjects overshadowing the focal point, and disruption of color and lighting settings)

任务: Under the microscope, a fine needle precisely penetrates the dura mater, with colorful anesthetic droplets instantly diffusing within the subarachnoid space, dynamically interacting with the microscopic structure of spinal nerve fibers, highlighting the delicate details of tissue texture and fluid flow.
具体要求: Create a captivating microscopic world video showcasing the complexity of the spinal cord and epidural anesthesia. Begin with a central focus on close-up shots of the vertebrae and surrounding soft tissues. Delicately depict a fine needle passing through multiple skin layers, crossing ligaments, and piercing the dura mater to simulate the process of spinal anesthesia, emphasizing the precise penetration reaching the cerebrospinal fluid in the subarachnoid space. Demonstrate the instantaneous diffusion of anesthetic droplets, highlighting their impact on neural signaling. Transition to epidural anesthesia by showing the needle carefully stopping before the dura mater, with the drug gently accumulating outside the protective membrane. Capture the microscopic texture details of vertebrae, nerves, and dura mater, displaying their unique organic patterns under high magnification. Emphasize the colorful and ethereal movement of the anesthetic solution, illustrating its diffusion interactions with nerve fibers. Highlight the complex monitoring equipment in the scene by including miniature sensors representing blood pressure, pulse, and oxygen saturation measurements, all dynamically responding to the administered anesthesia. Conclude by presenting the rapid yet controlled physiological responses within the microscopic world, providing the audience with a stunning and scientifically accurate perspective of this precisely orchestrated medical procedure.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accurate anatomical layers and spatial relationships: The needle trajectory sequentially passes through the skin, fascia/ligament complex, ligamentum flavum, dura mater, and arachnoid mater, with clear differentiation between the epidural space and the subarachnoid space; the relative positions and orientations of the vertebrae, dural sac, nerve roots, and blood vessels are correctly identified.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Scale and temporal proportions are appropriate: anatomical thickness, gap width, needle tip to nerve fiber scale, fluid diffusion distance, and onset time are within physiological ranges; under varying magnification factors, motion velocity and displacement are proportionally consistent.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Fluid dynamics and diffusion behavior correctness: The diffusion and convection of the anesthetic solution within the subarachnoid space and epidural space conform to physicochemical principles as well as the geometric and resistance characteristics of these compartments, without exhibiting instantaneous transmembrane crossing or flow contrary to physical direction.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Reasonable needle–tissue interaction and tissue mechanical behavior: the elastic deformation and recoil of the tissue during puncture, the characteristic features at the moment of dura mater puncture, the epidural "loss of resistance" phenomenon, as well as the friction and deflection of the needle in contact with the tissue conform to biomechanical principles.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Accurate expression of neurological function and physiological responses: The anesthesia-induced neural conduction blockade demonstrates a reasonable concentration-time-spatial gradient (faster and more extensive onset in the subarachnoid space, slower and segmental onset in the epidural space); monitored parameters (blood pressure, pulse, oxygen saturation) exhibit amplitude and temporal changes consistent with anesthetic physiology.

rubrics_visual.d1: High image clarity with finely rendered microscopic details; edges are sharp and clean, without noticeable noise or artifacts.
rubrics_visual.d2: The animation depicting fluid diffusion and microscale interactions is coherent and smooth, with velocity changes and transitions occurring naturally without frame skipping.
rubrics_visual.d3: High fidelity in 3D modeling accuracy and material texture realism, with clear delineation of tissue structures and fluid layers, maintaining consistent scale relationships.
rubrics_visual.d4: Lighting and depth of field are controlled naturally; volumetric lighting and shadow transitions are smooth; reflections and translucency effects are stable and free of flickering.
rubrics_visual.d5: Color saturation and contrast are well balanced; key elements exhibit clear color differentiation without distortion, and the overall tonal harmony is maintained.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Complete Process Presentation and Core Scenario Reconstruction: Starting with detailed close-ups of vertebral bodies and surrounding soft tissues, sequentially demonstrate puncture, drug diffusion, two anesthesia pathways, and the resulting physiological responses under microscopic perspective.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Accurate differentiation of key spatial layers and procedural zones: clearly distinguish scenarios where the needle punctures through the skin, ligaments, and dura mater into the subarachnoid space from those involving epidural needle placement and extramembranous drug accumulation.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Completeness of Key Elements and Interactive Presentation: microscopic textures (vertebrae, nerves, dura mater), diffusion of multicolored anesthetic fluids and their interaction with nerve fibers, and the dynamic response of small monitoring devices and indicators throughout the process.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Perspective and technical specifications meet requirements: high-magnification microscopic imaging and close-up composition are stable, lens transitions are smooth, and the pacing and duration correspond to the task-specified stages.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Severe deviation from instructions characterized by fundamental confusion or omission: misidentification of the spatial locations and endpoints of the two anesthetic pathways, or absence of critical frames depicting drug diffusion and physiological responses.

任务: From a microscopic perspective, precisely capture the moment when the focused laser beam irradiates the trabecular meshwork in the anterior chamber during laser trabeculoplasty. Clearly demonstrate the subtle changes in the trabecular meshwork fibers and porous structure under laser influence. Highlight the localized aqueous humor flow through the newly formed channels, dynamically emphasizing the details of microscopic structures and fluid movement. The overall visualization is scientific, delicate, and dynamic.
具体要求: Produce a stunning microscopic world video focusing on the complex cellular-level processes during glaucoma surgery. Depict the aqueous humor circulating within the eye's anterior chamber as a dynamic interactive fluid responsible for cleansing and nourishing the cornea and lens, illustrating its pathway through the trabecular meshwork between the iris and cornea. Emphasize precise surgical interventions such as laser trabeculoplasty and iridotomy, capturing with remarkable detail the creation of channels and openings by the focused laser beam to restore fluid balance and alleviate intraocular pressure. Visualize the fine structural and textural details of the trabecular meshwork being remodeled, revealing its fibrous and porous architecture, along with the iris exhibiting its complex woven pattern during fluid channel formation. Capture the process of the ciliary processes under micropulse laser treatment with striking clarity, showing the destruction of aqueous humor production sites, highlighting cellular transformation and subsequent reduction in fluid generation. Finally, demonstrate the captivating removal of a portion of the ocular wall during trabeculectomy, depicting microscopic surgical instruments cutting tissue and leaving a small drainage opening, revealing subtle textural changes in postoperative tissue and fluid dynamics. Convey these actions through cutting-edge visual effects, capturing the vitality and interactivity of cellular movements and transformations, immersing the audience in an exhilarating microscopic journey through human eye glaucoma treatment.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accurate representation of the key anterior segment anatomical structures and their spatial topology, with scientifically sound and reasonable relative positions and connections among the corneal endothelium, anterior chamber, iris, trabecular meshwork, Schlemm’s canal, ciliary body/process, and sclera.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Scale and temporal sequences are appropriate; the proportions between cells and fibers/pores, the sequencing of laser pulses and tissue responses, as well as the magnitude and timing of aqueous humor flow rates all conform to physiological ranges.
rubrics_scientific.d3: The mechanism of laser–tissue interaction is scientifically sound, with clearly defined spatial scope and boundaries of energy deposition, thermal/photothermal effects, tissue denaturation or contraction, and channel formation, consistent with the distinct characteristics of trabeculoplasty, iridotomy, and micropulse cyclophotocoagulation.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Aqueous humor dynamics and outflow pathway are accurately represented, with the site of generation and pressure gradient-driven flow exhibiting physiologically consistent streamlines and shear characteristics through the trabecular meshwork, Schlemm’s canal, collector channels, and episcleral veins, as well as postoperative pathways (filtering bleb or iridectomy).
rubrics_scientific.d5: Surgically induced tissue remodeling is consistent with functional alterations, manifesting as increased trabecular meshwork permeability, stable openings at the iris margin, reduced ciliary body secretory activity, formation of scleral filtration channels, and peripheral tissue texture changes in accordance with expectations.

rubrics_visual.d1: Image clarity and fine preservation of microscopic details, with well-defined structural boundaries, textures, and pore hierarchies, free from blurring and over-sharpening artifacts.
rubrics_visual.d2: The fluid and particle animations are coherent and stable, with accurate streamlines, shear, and vortex structures. Interface tension and adhesion behaviors are depicted naturally, without penetration artifacts or temporal jitter.
rubrics_visual.d3: Physically plausible lighting and volumetric effects; harmonious integration of subsurface scattering, transmission, refraction, and depth of field; stable micro-scale specular highlights and shadow gradations without flickering.
rubrics_visual.d4: High-quality 3D modeling and texturing with accurate microstructure geometric proportions; micro-surface roughness, anisotropy, and translucency responses are consistent; cellular and fibrous materials are distinguishable.
rubrics_visual.d5: Color and contrast are naturally restrained, with strong readability of key structures; color casts, oversaturation, and banding are avoided; overall color tone is consistent and conducive to scientific interpretation.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Full implementation of the core scenarios and main processes described in the task, with a focus on the moments of laser intervention and microscopic structural remodeling, emphasizing the narrative of fluid balance restoration.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Accurately present the key structures and elements required by the task, including microfibers and porous textures, liquid pathways and flow details, channels/openings formed by interventions, and tissue and fluid dynamics following changes in yield and pressure.
rubrics_instruction.d3: The perspective and cinematographic language conform to microscopic/cellular-level specifications, with stable focus, depth of field, and motion enhancing detail readability; temporal sequence and process transitions are clear.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Technical specifications meet requirements (duration, resolution, pacing, lighting, and color); the overall imagery is scientifically precise, detailed, and dynamic.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Introduction of scenarios unrelated to the task, deviation from the microscopic perspective, or distortion of physiological/surgical mechanisms.

任务: A dynamic microscopic video within 5 seconds showcasing a single intestinal villus under the microscope, illustrating its transition from healthy to mild atrophy. The video highlights detailed features of epithelial cells, microvilli, and intercellular junctions. Inflammatory responses are depicted by subtle redness and swelling at the intercellular junctions, while diverse surrounding microbiota are represented with various morphologies and colors encircling the villus. The imagery employs soft lighting and subtle color variations, maintaining an overall scientifically refined aesthetic.
具体要求: Create a captivating microscopic world video that immerses viewers into the complex landscape of the intestinal villus, with the central scene vividly and subtly reflecting the manifestations of celiac disease. The video will present a dynamic sequence traversing the small intestine, emphasizing different stages of villus health and degeneration during interaction with gluten proteins, potentially leading to inflammation. The stunning visuals will accentuate the remarkable details of the villus’s elegant, finger-like projections composed of epithelial cells, showcasing their initially tall and dense structure transitioning to blunted and atrophic forms. The texture of the surface—including microvilli and intercellular junctions—will be captured to reflect changes during resistance to the autoimmune response triggered by celiac disease. The scenes should be rich with interplay of light and shadow to highlight subtle color variations across different cellular layers within the epithelium and the diversity of the surrounding microbiota. This visually breathtaking presentation will provide an almost tactile exploration, revealing the hidden complexities of disease progression in genetically susceptible individuals, with Australia’s unique genetic landscape vividly portrayed through this microbiological lens.

rubrics_scientific.d11: The scale relationships and morphological proportions among villi, epithelial cells, microvilli, and surrounding microorganisms are accurate, reflecting orders of magnitude differences as well as appropriate aspect ratios, densities, and spacing.
rubrics_scientific.d22: The spatial architecture and positioning of the epithelial tissue are accurate: the brush border is oriented toward the luminal surface, cell polarity is well-defined; tight junctions are located at the apical lateral membrane region and continuous, with the hierarchical organization of intercellular junctions correctly corresponding to their anatomical locations.
rubrics_scientific.d33: The dynamic pathological process from healthy to mild atrophy is consistent with physiological mechanisms: slight reductions in villous height and density, sparse or shortened microvilli, mild intercellular edema, and localized erythematous inflammatory signals concentrated at the junctions; the transition occurs smoothly and naturally within 5 seconds without exaggeration.
rubrics_scientific.d44: The morphology and ecological behavior of the microbiota are scientifically and rationally represented: exhibiting diverse morphotypes such as rod-shaped, coccal, and spiral bacteria at the micrometer scale; motility conforms to Brownian motion or flagella-driven trajectories under low Reynolds number conditions; predominantly residing within the mucous layer lining the lumen without transgressing the intact epithelial barrier.
rubrics_scientific.d55: Avoid misleading elements that contradict established mechanisms: mistaking microvilli for motile cilia, depicting turbulent and jet-like fluid flow, exaggerating microorganisms to a size comparable to cells or invading intact epithelium, and representing exogenous factors directly as acute cytotoxic agents.

rubrics_visual.d1: The image exhibits high clarity, with well-defined microstructural details (epithelial cells, microvilli, and intercellular junctions) displaying clear stratification and sharp edges.
rubrics_visual.d2: Morphological and motility transitions are smooth, with tissue exhibiting continuous and natural deformation, texture, and volumetric changes from healthy to mild degeneration. Microbial motility is rhythmic without abrupt or erratic shifts.
rubrics_visual.d3: The interplay of light and color is harmoniously rendered, with soft lighting, natural and stable depth of field, and subtle color gradients; functional color cues are used sparingly to enhance readability.
rubrics_visual.d4: 3D modeling and texturing are realistic, with reasonable geometry and scale relationships; surface normals and translucent materials are credible; diverse microbial morphologies are consistent with interactions with the main subject.
rubrics_visual.d5: Visual artifacts and stability are well controlled, with significant reductions in aliasing, flickering, banding, interlacing, spatiotemporal noise, and fluctuations in exposure/white balance.

rubrics_instruction.d1: A single intestinal villus serves as the central subject and extends throughout the entire section, fully presenting the core narrative and context from healthy morphology to mild atrophy.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Accurate representation of key microscopic structures and inflammatory signals: epithelial cells, microvilli, and intercellular junctions are clearly distinguishable, with mild erythema and edema prominently observed at the junctions.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Dynamic transition is coherent and rhythmically precise: a continuous change from high and dense to passivated with slight atrophy is completed within approximately 5 seconds, reflecting an inflammation trend triggered by causative factors.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Consistency of Perspective and Aesthetic Style: The microscopic viewpoint and composition remain stable or transition smoothly, accompanied by soft lighting and subtle color variations throughout, with diverse surrounding microbial communities encircling but not obscuring the main subject.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Deduction for Critical Violations: occurrence of multiple main subjects or non-microscopic perspectives, significant deviation from the 5-second duration, excessive or absent inflammatory manifestations, omission of key structures, and coarse or abrupt stylistic execution.

任务: Under high-definition dynamic microscopy, the malignant Plasmodium parasite is actively penetrating and invading human red blood cells, with the cellular membrane structure clearly visible. The parasite's motility details and the microscopic changes in red blood cells are presented with vivid colors and sharp contrast, while rich textural details highlight the scientific beauty of microscopic life.
具体要求: Create a captivating microscopic world video that captures the complexity of malaria transmission at the cellular level, emphasizing the scientific intricacy and aesthetic through detailed visual effects. In this stunning sequence, showcase the malignant Plasmodium parasite as the central subject within a dynamic microscopy scene navigating through the host's bloodstream. The video should vividly depict the parasite's journey, illustrating the moments from mosquito transmission to human infection and back to the mosquito, completing the entire transmission cycle. Enhance the scene with rich textural details and visual effects to capture the fluidity and movement of red blood cells, the parasite's cell invasion actions, and the seamless transitions between hosts. Clarity must emphasize the parasite's structure, its interactions with blood cells, and reflect the transformative 4D processes revealed by cutting-edge scientific discoveries, immersing viewers in the vivid world of microscopic life. Employ a visual style encompassing vivid colors, sharp contrast, and high-definition microscopy techniques to ensure every microscopic detail is clearly visible—from the characteristic oscillatory motion of blood cells to the precise cellular activities during transmission stages—bringing the microscopic world to life for the audience.

rubrics_scientific.d1: The ultrastructure and morphology of erythrocytes and Plasmodium parasites are accurately presented, reflecting the biconcave shape and anucleate characteristic of erythrocytes, as well as the key structural features and stage-specific morphologies of the parasite.
rubrics_scientific.d2: The physiological process of parasite invasion into red blood cells is accurately described, including the steps of attachment, reorientation, formation of a tight junction, and active invasion, as well as the corresponding deformation and remodeling of the red blood cell membrane and cytoskeleton.
rubrics_scientific.d3: The sequence of key stages in the malaria transmission cycle is consistent with host transition biology, encompassing the mosquito internal phases, human infection onset, and erythrocytic development, while maintaining causal continuity and temporal coherence between stages.
rubrics_scientific.d4: The spatial scales, temporal scales, and motion velocities of cells, parasites, and bloodstream exhibit coherent relationships that accurately reflect scientifically valid proportions of actual sizes, dynamic frequencies, and process durations.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Scientific performance of hemodynamics and microenvironmental physical processes, including the flow behavior and deformation of erythrocytes within microvessels, shear forces, as well as the thermal motion and diffusion of particles, all conforming to physical and physiological principles.

rubrics_visual.d1: Image clarity and precise presentation of microstructural details; clear delineation of cell membrane boundaries, subcellular structures, and surface textures; well-defined layering with local details remaining discernible under high dynamic range conditions.
rubrics_visual.d2: High fidelity in 3D modeling and material authenticity, accurate geometric precision, credible surface roughness combined with subsurface scattering, membrane elasticity, and fluidity; detailed depiction of deformation during contact, adhesion, and penetration processes.
rubrics_visual.d3: The animation demonstrates smoothness and temporal coherence, with microorganism movement trajectories and cellular deformations appearing naturally continuous. Transitions between camera shots and scenes are seamless, maintaining consistent speed and scale perception, while the pacing remains stable and free of abrupt changes.
rubrics_visual.d4: Color and contrast are scientifically harmonized; false color/fluorescence mapping is stable and consistent; saturation and brightness are well-controlled; hue separation of key objects is clear, avoiding detail loss due to overexposure or underexposure.
rubrics_visual.d5: Lighting, depth of field, and volumetric representation are naturally and harmoniously integrated; specular highlights and shadow gradations on translucent materials are finely detailed; the depth of field focus clearly guides the subject; volumetric scattering and suspended particle density are appropriately balanced; exposure and noise levels are consistently controlled.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Comprehensive presentation of core scenarios and key interactions: The contact, penetration, and invasion processes of the specified microscopic subject with the target host cell are clearly visible under a high-definition dynamic microscopy perspective, with the subject serving as the narrative focus.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Comprehensively and coherently presents the complete transmission chain: sequentially demonstrating the critical stages from the medium to the host and back to the medium, with natural and discernible transitions between hosts.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Visual and Imaging Specifications Compliance: Utilizes high-definition microscopic imaging with vivid coloration and high contrast; cell membranes and main structural boundaries are clearly defined, with rich textural detail.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Adequate representation of dynamic processes and temporal dimensions: reflecting continuous 4D progression along with microscopic flow/deformation, with duration and rhythm supporting the complete presentation of critical stages.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Severe deviation from perspective and thematic focus: employing non-microscopic or macroscopic viewpoints, with prolonged framing that diverges from the specified microscopic subject and cellular-level processes.

任务: From a microscopic perspective, display in high resolution the moment when bavituximab molecules bind to phosphatidylserine on the surface of cancer cells, meticulously presenting the texture of the cell membrane. Cytotoxic T cells approach and recognize the cancer cells labeled by bavituximab, demonstrating the dynamic process of the immune system precisely targeting tumor cells.
具体要求: Create a visually stunning microscopic world video focusing on the central theme of bavituximab interacting with cancer cells at the molecular level. The scene should depict the dynamic binding of bavituximab to phosphatidylserine on the cancer cell surface, highlighting the critical moment when the drug facilitates immune recognition and response. The video must finely capture the delicate texture and vivid details of the targeted phosphatidylserine molecules, showcasing the transformative immune activity as antibodies and cytotoxic T cells cluster on the labeled cancer cells. Ensure the visualization vividly emphasizes the contrast between healthy cells and the upregulated phosphatidylserine expression on cancer cells, which appear subtly shielded but ultimately fully exposed. Present the complex, high-resolution details of the cell membrane and the active, dynamic interactions of immune cells eliminating cancer cells. Through meticulously detailed and scientifically accurate CGI animation, immerse the audience in an engaging and educational journey that highlights the innovative mechanism by which bavituximab empowers the body’s immune defense within the tumor microenvironment.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Antibody-target molecular mechanism consistency: antibody specificity aligns with epitope location; bivalent binding geometry corresponds with valency effects; affinity and dissociation kinetics are consistent with literature consensus; unrelated antibodies are not paired with irrelevant molecules.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Accuracy of Immune Cell Recognition and Effector Mechanisms: T cells recognize antigens via TCR-MHC-peptide complexes or CAR-mediated pathways; antibody-mediated effector functions correspond appropriately with Fc receptor-positive effector cells and complement pathways; the immunological synapse structure and temporal dynamics are presented coherently.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Accuracy of Membrane Phospholipids and Cellular Membrane Ultrastructure: The spatial distribution and relative abundance of phosphatidylserine externalization, membrane bilayer thickness and texture, lateral mobility and phase separation, as well as the visualization of membrane protein and cholesterol density, conform to biological principles.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Scale, temporal, and kinematic plausibility: The size ratios of molecular and cellular structures are accurate; Brownian motion and diffusion constraints, lateral membrane diffusion and binding/unbinding rate magnitudes, as well as the sequence of reaction times, conform to microscale physical and physiological principles.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Penalty for Critical Mechanistic Errors: applicable in cases involving the direct attribution of antibody as a T cell recognition signal, mismatched antibody-target molecule pairing, incorrect cell types assumed to perform Fc receptor functions, or renderings of details that exceed the resolution limits of imaging, all of which contradict established consensus.

rubrics_visual.d1: Image clarity and richness of detail levels, with sharp microstructural textures free from noticeable noise or blurring.
rubrics_visual.d2: The animation exhibits high rhythm and motion continuity, with smooth molecular and cellular interactions, and natural transitions free of stuttering or frame skipping.
rubrics_visual.d3: High realism in 3D modeling and material appearance, consistent geometric accuracy with roughness/normal map details, and unified scale and proportions.
rubrics_visual.d4: The gradation of light and shadow and depth of field control are natural; volumetric presence and reflection/scattering effects are well-coordinated; the primary subject is prominently illuminated without overexposure.
rubrics_visual.d5: Color accuracy and balanced contrast, with appropriate saturation control, maintaining subject legibility and clear layering in complex scenes.

rubrics_instruction.d11: Microscopic Perspective and High-Resolution Core Presentation: Focused at the molecular scale from a microscopic viewpoint, clearly capturing the moment of bavituximab binding to phosphatidylserine on the cancer cell surface, and meticulously depicting the texture of the cell membrane.
rubrics_instruction.d22: Completeness of the immune recognition dynamic cascade: Demonstrates the continuous process following antibody binding, including the marking of cancer cells, the approach and recognition by cytotoxic T cells, their aggregation, and execution of the attack, highlighting the critical moments.
rubrics_instruction.d33: Key elements and comparative expression are well-executed: finely depicting the targeted phosphatidylserine details, emphasizing the contrast between upregulated expression in healthy versus cancer cells, and presenting a visual narrative from “camouflage to exposure,” accompanied by vivid interactions with immune cells.
rubrics_instruction.d44: Scientific and Technical Performance Criteria: Ensure the proportionality of molecular and cellular structures, as well as the logical consistency of their movement and interactions, within the given task parameters; maintain high-quality CGI with clear and stable visuals, coherent camera work and pacing; duration and editing must comply with the specified instructions.
rubrics_instruction.d55: Deviation from task requirements or omission of critical components: includes perspectives unrelated to the microscopic view, failure to depict the moment of antibody–phosphatidylserine binding, and absence of T cell recognition and attack processes.

任务: Under high-resolution echocardiography, focus on the microscopic structures of the heart, dynamically demonstrating the rhythmic opening and closing of the cardiac valves and the movement of red blood cells within the cardiac chambers following the blood flow. Color Doppler blood flow is clearly visible, highlighting the delicate motion changes of the myocardium and valves, reflecting the microscopic interactions between blood flow and cardiac tissues.
具体要求: Create a stunning microscopic world video that emphasizes the complex process of echocardiography, a commonly used diagnostic tool that employs sound waves to generate detailed images of cardiac structure and function. The scene begins with a skilled sonographer applying cold gel on the chest, laying the foundation for a detailed view of the probe gliding over the skin. The footage captures the conversion of sound waves into dynamic, high-resolution visualizations of the myocardium, cardiac chambers, and valves, displayed in real time on the screen. Emphasize the echogenic texture of cardiac tissues, the rhythmic motion of the valves, and subtle changes in the contracting muscle fibers. Integrate vivid Doppler ultrasound animations to depict blood flow velocity and direction, revealing the complex journey of red blood cell echo signals. The video should capture cardiac responses before and after motion or pharmacologically induced simulations, providing critical insights into coronary artery disease during activity. Additionally, demonstrate transesophageal echocardiography, where the probe is gently passed through the throat under anesthesia to provide enhanced proximity cardiac assessment, revealing unparalleled details of each valve movement and chamber contraction. Ensure the microscopic view encompasses unmatched precision and clarity, fostering a profound understanding of cardiac health.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accuracy of Cardiac Anatomical Structures and Dimensional Relationships: The spatial positions and relative sizes of the cardiac chambers, myocardial layers, valves, and supporting structures correspond to conventional echocardiographic views and physiological proportions.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Valve rhythmic opening and closing synchronized with the cardiac cycle: timing and amplitude of leaflet motion correspond appropriately to systolic and diastolic phases; coordinated and coherent movement of leaflets, chordae tendineae, and papillary muscles without unreasonable delay or excessive deformation.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Hemodynamic and Doppler characterization consistency: The color Doppler directional coding correctly corresponds to the insonation angle; velocity gradients and aliasing phenomena are appropriate; the morphology and timing of laminar/turbulent flow and regurgitant jets conform to hemodynamic principles.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Ultrasound echotexture and imaging physics credibility: The echogenicity and speckle texture of myocardium, valves, and blood conform to scattering and attenuation principles, with imaging effects such as acoustic shadowing, enhancement, and reverberation occurring consistently with tissue properties and ultrasound beam path.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Spatiotemporal consistency between imaging approach and physiological responses: The differences in field of view and resolution arising from transthoracic and transesophageal perspectives are appropriate; the temporal sequences of heart rate, wall thickening, and strain changes before and after exercise or pharmacological stress are coherent and correspond with perfusion-related functional alterations.

rubrics_visual.d1: Image clarity and the presentation of microstructural details are precise, with sharp edges and well-defined texture stratification.
rubrics_visual.d2: Color reproduction and contrast are naturally unified, with harmonious coordination between grayscale and chromatic information; spectral transitions are smooth and without abruptness.
rubrics_visual.d3: High animation pacing and motion fluidity, with coherent periodic movements and smooth fluid/particle trajectories free of jitter and motion blur.
rubrics_visual.d4: High fidelity in 3D modeling and material realism, consistency between tissue and fluid textures, accurate scale proportions, and spatial hierarchy.
rubrics_visual.d5: The lighting effects and depth of field are rendered naturally, with a clear sense of volume and spatial perception; highlights and shadows are consistently distributed without abrupt changes.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Comprehensively covers the critical procedures and core scenarios from ultrasound examination preparation to imaging and advanced assessments, including technician operations, probe contact, real-time screen imaging, and microscopic view focusing.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Accurately depict the cardiac microstructure and dynamic processes, emphasizing the rhythmic opening and closing of valves, subtle myocardial motions, and the movement of red blood cells within blood flow, while clearly representing blood flow direction and velocity using color Doppler imaging.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Compliance with the specified examination method and viewing angles (e.g., transthoracic and transesophageal), meeting technical specifications such as resolution, frame rate, duration, and composition; with stable imaging and natural transitions.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Reflect the comparison and functional changes before and after induction (exercise or pharmacological), highlighting key differences and insights related to coronary artery disease.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Avoidance of violations of ultrasound imaging principles or deviation from the task theme (such as incorrect imaging styles, medically inaccurate use of scale or color coding, or excessive proportion of irrelevant narrative).

任务: High-definition microscopic video focusing on the moment of oocyte release from the ovary during ovulation, with the oocyte slowly moving through the fallopian tube, surrounded by multiple motile sperm cells dynamically swimming toward the oocyte. Interactions between cell membranes are clearly visible, and LH hormone signaling is visualized as fluorescent trajectories. The overall presentation is scientifically accurate and suitable for a 5-second short video.
具体要求: Create a stunning microscopic world video exploring the complex and fascinating processes of fertilization, ovulation, and menstruation within the female reproductive system, emphasizing the intricate cellular interactions and hormonal changes. The scene begins by depicting the vivid journey of the oocyte originating from the ovary during ovulation and moving through the fallopian tube, surrounded by motile sperm cells progressing toward fertilization. Subsequently, showcase the captivating transformation of the endometrium during the menstrual cycle phases, highlighting the structural complexity of the endometrium under hormonal regulation by estrogen and progesterone. Illustrate the release of GnRH, FSH, and LH, tracing their intricate pathway from the hypothalamus in the brain to the pituitary gland and further into the bloodstream targeting the ovary, with visible networks demonstrating hormonal signaling pathways. Capture key developments of follicles and the corpus luteum in high definition, providing a comprehensive understanding of these microscopic structures. Emphasize the vivid texture of menstrual blood during menstruation, detailing the natural shedding and renewal process. Utilize immersive visual effects to portray ovulation symptoms and menstrual impacts such as cramps and hormonal imbalances, presenting a microscopic world rich in biological discoveries. Reveal the fertilization process through engaging close-ups, focusing on the fusion of sperm and oocyte to form the zygote, followed by the zygote’s journey toward implantation. Finally, depict menstrual health management by showcasing the microscopic characteristics of menstrual products such as tampons and sanitary pads, emphasizing menstrual hygiene and the importance of maintaining hormonal balance and cycle health. Ensure the video is filled with scientific terminology, educational content on reproductive health, and insights into menstruation, aiming to deliver an engaging, informative, and visually breathtaking experience.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accuracy of Anatomical Structures and Scale Proportions: Correct spatial relationships among the ovary, fallopian tube (infundibulum and ampulla), uterus, and endometrium; relative size and order of magnitude consistency between the oocyte, spermatozoa, and tissue structures.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Physiological timing and causal sequence consistency: The LH surge triggers ovulation; fertilization occurs only after the oocyte enters the fallopian tube; following fertilization, the zygote migrates toward the uterus. The menstrual cycle phases (follicular phase – ovulation – luteal phase – menstruation) are distinctly presented and not confused.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Accurate gamete interactions and fertilization mechanisms: sperm chemotaxis and flagellar propulsion, acrosome reaction and zona pellucida binding and penetration, oolemma fusion and cortical reaction preventing polyspermy, and proper sequence of pronuclear fusion.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Scientific Understanding of Hormonal Pathways and Target Organ Responses: The directional flow and anatomical sites of the GnRH → pituitary → FSH/LH → ovary axis are accurately depicted; estrogen and progesterone-induced proliferative and secretory changes in the endometrium conform to established physiological patterns; the fluorescent hormone tracking corresponds consistently with vascular and neural pathways.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Scientific Invalidity Penalty: Deduction applied when core elements contradict established physiological facts (e.g., active motility of the oocyte, overlap of menstruation and fertilization events in the same temporal-spatial context, hormone signaling direction opposite to anatomical pathways), resulting in temporal-spatial or mechanistic inconsistencies.

rubrics_visual.d1: Image clarity and richness of microscopic detail levels are high, with sharp and natural structural boundaries; fine textures and interface interactions are discernible, and noise, aliasing, color banding, and compression artifacts are effectively controlled.
rubrics_visual.d2: 3D modeling accuracy and material physical plausibility; realistic representation of translucency, refraction, and subsurface scattering; consistent tissue thickness and scale relationships; accurate rendering of fluid and colloidal textures.
rubrics_visual.d3: The animation kinematics and interactions are coherent; cellular and particle trajectories are natural; collisions and deformations are smooth without frame skipping; camera movements and temporal rhythm are stable and free of jitter.
rubrics_visual.d4: Lighting, shadows, and volumetric effects are harmoniously integrated; soft shadows and scattering are consistent; depth of field intensity corresponds appropriately to the micro-scale; focal clarity effectively guides attention; exposure is well-balanced without overexposure or underexposure.
rubrics_visual.d5: The color and fluorescence channels are scientifically consistent; saturation and contrast appear natural; fluorescence trajectory emission decay and overlay are appropriately represented; color mapping is uniform; information overlay and annotations are clear and do not interfere with the main subject.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Comprehensive presentation of the main scenario: starting from the moment of ovulation, the movement of the oocyte within the fallopian tube, the progression of sperm toward fertilization, fertilization and the early journey of the zygote, as well as a coherent depiction of the key phases of the menstrual cycle and the regulation of the endometrium.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Key microscopic elements and interactions accurately depicted: Clearly present intercellular membrane interactions, visualize hormone signaling pathways/networks, and illustrate the hierarchical and dynamic changes in tissue structure, encompassing the microscopic features of follicular and corpus luteum development as well as associated reproductive health management factors.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Scientific Accuracy and Educational Expression: The anatomical and physiological mechanisms are rigorously presented, with consistency in hormone origin, pathways, timing, and causality; terminology is standardized, and the density of information combined with visual materials enhances the value of science communication.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Perspective and Technical Specifications Compliance: Predominantly high-definition microscopic textures and close-up shots; within a duration of 5 seconds, the shot composition and rhythm are coherent; motion speed and scale appropriately reflect the microscopic scene; signal visualization style is consistent and legible.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Points Deduction for Major Deviations: Occurrence of scientific errors, omission of core phases or critical elements, deviation from the micro-reproduction theme, failure to meet duration and perspective specifications, or insufficient image clarity.

任务: Under a high-definition microscopic perspective, depict thyroid cells secreting thyroid hormones into adjacent blood vessels, meticulously showcasing the cellular membrane structure, the dynamic process of hormone molecules traversing the membrane into the blood vessels, and their flow within the vasculature. Emphasize the textures and microscopic details of the cells and blood vessels, ensuring clear imagery with strong color contrast to illustrate the microscopic mechanisms of thyroid secretion function.
具体要求: Produce a stunning microscopic world video that finely presents the complex structure and function of the thyroid gland. In this vivid scene, depict the thyroid located above the trachea, dynamically demonstrating how it directly secretes thyroid hormones into the bloodstream. Capture the thyroid’s role in energy metabolism and thermoregulation, detailing the rapid secretion response of thyroid hormones when the body encounters cold stimuli to prevent heat loss. Highlight the interactions between the thyroid, blood vessels, and surrounding tissues during typical functional processes, and portray surgical intervention in the form of thyroidectomy. Showcase the detailed surgical procedure, illustrating a transverse cervical incision, removal of one lobe or the entire gland depending on the condition, followed by insertion of a drainage tube to remove excess fluid over 1–2 days. Convey the precision of concluding the surgery with sutures or surgical adhesives, and the careful removal of the endotracheal tube to ensure postoperative respiration. Delve into postoperative care by displaying intravenous administration of antibiotics and analgesics, depicting the recovery room environment and patient monitoring, culminating in discharge within 1–2 days. Explain subsequent medical recommendations, including calcium supplementation and, if the entire gland is removed, daily thyroid hormone replacement therapy. The video should be rich in high-definition textures, featuring close-up shots of the cellular composition and intricate details of the thyroid, blood vessels, and surgical instruments, with movements and transitions reflecting biological essence and clinical procedures.

rubrics_scientific.d1: The microscopic structure and scale relationships of thyroid tissue and cells are accurately represented, reflecting the spatial relationships among the follicular lumen, the polarity of the simple epithelial cells, and adjacent capillaries, with reasonable relative sizes of cells, erythrocytes, and hormone molecules.
rubrics_scientific.d2: The secretion pathway and transmembrane mechanisms of thyroid hormones are accurately described, including apical endocytosis of colloid, intracellular proteolytic release of hormones, and specific transport across the basolateral membrane into capillaries. The membrane is a phospholipid bilayer and follows physicochemical principles such as carrier-mediated transport and diffusion.
rubrics_scientific.d3: The blood flow and molecular motion within capillaries conform to microscopic physical principles, exhibiting laminar flow characteristics. Red blood cell deformation and viscous effects are consistent and appropriate. Hormone molecules are transported by convection accompanied by scale-dependent diffusion/Brownian motion. The concentration gradients correspond consistently with the temporal sequence.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Portraying thyroid hormone as the primary rapid mechanism for immediate cold defense, instant significant thermogenesis, or instantaneous metabolic elevation, while disregarding the hours- to days-scale dynamics of the hypothalamic-pituitary-thyroid axis and the acute effects of the sympathetic nervous system on brown adipose tissue.
rubrics_scientific.d5: The thyroidectomy procedure and postoperative physiological presentation are scientifically accurate; anatomical localization and incision layers are appropriate, reflecting the principles of preserving the recurrent laryngeal nerve and parathyroid glands. Hemorrhage control and airway management comply with standard protocols, and postoperative drainage, hospitalization duration, as well as calcium metabolism monitoring and hormone replacement therapy are appropriately indicated.

rubrics_visual.d1: Image clarity and the presentation of fine microscopic details are high; structural edges are sharp, texture layers are distinct, and the microscopic scale is consistent.
rubrics_visual.d2: The 3D modeling and material realism are high, with accurate representation of surface texture and translucency characteristics; geometric topology is standardized without noticeable intersections or distortions.
rubrics_visual.d3: Color, contrast, and lighting are harmoniously balanced and natural; depth of field is appropriately controlled; the main subject is prominently layered without excessive exaggeration or distortion.
rubrics_visual.d4: The animation and motion transitions are smooth, with coherent particle and fluid dynamics, and the rhythm and temporal sampling are stable without jitter or frame skipping.
rubrics_visual.d5: The image contains noise, compression artifacts, edge aliasing, banding, or inappropriate motion blur, which adversely affect visual quality.

rubrics_instruction.d1: Complete implementation of the core microscopic secretion scenario: thyroid cell secretion, transmembrane hormone entry into blood vessels, and intravascular flow, with emphasis on the texture and microscopic details of cells and blood vessels.
rubrics_instruction.d2: Coherent presentation of multiscale mechanisms and processes: from the anatomical location and physiological functions of the thyroid gland, to secretory responses under cold stimulation, and subsequently to interactions with blood vessels and tissues, followed by the sequential integration of clinical surgery and postoperative care.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Accurate coverage of key elements and procedures: detailed depiction of cell membrane structure, high-definition textures with strong contrasting colors, critical surgical steps (incision, resection extent, drainage tube management, closure methods, tracheal tube removal), postoperative intravenous infusion and monitoring, discharge and follow-up medication guidance.
rubrics_instruction.d4: Compliance with Perspective and Technical Specifications: Stable and clear microscopic perspective, multiple close-up shots with natural transitions, high-definition and detailed imagery with strong color contrast, effectively conveying the specified duration and time points.
rubrics_instruction.d5: Control of Deviations and Omissions: Avoid inclusion of irrelevant content and conflicts with scene settings; prevent omission of core stages and key elements; ensure image clarity and stable focus to maintain the discernibility of critical information.

任务: Under a high-definition microscopic perspective, focus on the abdominal aortic aneurysm expansion region, meticulously displaying the vascular wall texture and the deployment of polyester and metallic endovascular stents within the aneurysm. The stents are secured by metallic hooks, highlighting the contact between the stent and the aortic wall as well as the redirection of blood flow, showcasing the intricate structure and material texture of minimally invasive repair.
具体要求: Produce a high-definition microscopic world video capturing the detailed complexity of the abdominal aortic aneurysm repair procedure. The main subject is the abdominal aorta, the largest and terminal segment supplying blood to the lower body, with special focus on the aneurysmal region. The scene begins with a visualization of the thickened aortic wall, gradually transitioning to an internal view of the balloon-like dilation caused by the aneurysm. The action centers on the careful repair surgery under real-time fluoroscopic guidance, starting with an incision above the femoral artery in the groin, followed by the gentle insertion of a guidewire into the artery. Through this guidewire, a catheter or hollow tube is introduced to the aneurysm site. The video details the insertion and deployment of polyester and metallic endovascular stent grafts within the aneurysm, with particular emphasis on stent deployment and fixation via metallic hooks. Special attention is given to displaying the texture and details of the aortic wall, the synthetic graft materials, and surrounding anatomical features, illustrating how the graft redirects blood flow and alleviates pressure on the aneurysm sac. The video concludes with catheter withdrawal and suturing of the groin incision, clearly demonstrating the entire process from placement to completion, highlighting the marvels of modern surgical techniques and the skills required for this delicate, life-saving procedure. Elements emphasizing the precision and innovative nature of this minimally invasive technique are included, providing an engaging visual experience for audiences interested in medical advancements.

rubrics_scientific.d1: Accurate anatomical structure and scale relationships: correct spatial positioning of the abdominal aorta, aneurysm sac, renal artery orifices, and iliac artery bifurcation; realistic depiction of the three-layered vascular wall texture and thickness; appropriate ratio of aneurysm diameter to the parent vessel, and matching diameters of stent graft and catheter.
rubrics_scientific.d2: Correct intervention procedure and device deployment mechanism: femoral artery access established; guidewire/catheter navigated to the target lumen under fluoroscopic guidance; stent graft accurately positioned and deployed at the proximal landing zone; metallic hooks/barbs anchored in the healthy neck segment ensuring apposition to the vessel wall; withdrawal of sheaths and suturing performed in a technically appropriate sequence.
rubrics_scientific.d3: Hemodynamic redirection and mechanical response are consistent with physiological and fluid dynamic principles: the newly formed intraluminal channel guides the primary flow, aneurysmal sac perfusion and wall stress decrease, shear stress and vortex distribution are appropriate, and pulsatile phase coherently corresponds with flow velocity variations.
rubrics_scientific.d4: Materials and Imaging Physical Representation Science: The elastic recoil/expansive behavior of the metallic scaffold is realistic with authentic radial support; the polyester graft exhibits appropriate texture and permeability characteristics; under fluoroscopy, metallic radiopaque markers are clearly visible while soft tissue and fabric visualization is limited.
rubrics_scientific.d5: Deduction for Critical Scientific Errors: Significant distortions that violate medical and physical principles (e.g., blood flow direction opposite to pulsation, stent crossing and obstructing important branches, metal hook penetrating full thickness causing extravasation, fluoroscopic presentation inconsistent with imaging physics).

rubrics_visual.d1: High image clarity with thorough restoration of microstructural details;关键 edges are sharp without excessive sharpening or noise interference.
rubrics_visual.d2: Material texture and light-shadow rendering are realistic: reflections, specular highlights, roughness, and subsurface scattering of metals, polymers, and soft tissues are consistent; color reproduction, saturation, and contrast appear natural and stable; depth of field and exposure are properly controlled.
rubrics_visual.d3: 3D Modeling Accuracy and Structural Proportional Consistency: The geometry exhibits rational topology and continuous, smooth surfaces without noticeable low-poly edges; the scale hierarchy transitions coherently from macro to micro levels.
rubrics_visual.d4: Animation Smoothness and Physical Plausibility: Continuous and stable progression of device deployment, tissue deformation, and fluid redirection; smooth camera movement without inter-frame jitter, motion blur, or abrupt rhythm changes.
rubrics_visual.d5: Obvious visual defects and numerical artifacts (noise, compression blocking, aliasing, flickering, banding, overexposure/underexposure, model interpenetration, lighting flicker)

rubrics_instruction.d1: Comprehensively present the core process of image-guided minimally invasive repair, encompassing key stages from the initiation of the microscopic field and area dilation focus through intervention, deployment, fixation, and completion, highlighting the continuity of the procedure and the achievement of task objectives.
rubrics_instruction.d2: The perspective and technical specifications meet the requirements of high-definition microscopy; the imagery is focused on the lesion and operative area, with clear and discernible details. Camera movements and transitions are stable, and the duration and pacing support comprehension of the surgical procedure.
rubrics_instruction.d3: Key elements and material textures are effectively rendered, including vascular wall texture and dilation morphology, polyester and metallic stent grafts, metallic hook fixation details, as well as stent-to-vascular wall contact and blood flow redirection effects.
rubrics_instruction.d4: The scenario restoration and medical consistency are properly achieved, with accurate anatomical structure localization, appropriate instrument and operation handling consistent with minimally invasive intervention logic, and an environment and background aligned with the task settings, avoiding distortion or excessive embellishment.
rubrics_instruction.d5: The content exhibits significant deviation or errors, including incorrect anatomical locations, omission of critical stages, substitution or mislabeling of materials, shots that conflict with instructions, or missing endings.
